mapper.select: SELECT BAS_YYYY AS CD, BAS_YYYY||'년' AS CD_NM FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY NOT IN ('9999') ORDER BY BAS_YYYY DESC

SELECT T.CD, T.CD_NM, T.GRP_CD FROM( SELECT DTL_C AS CD, DTL_C_NM AS CD_NM, GRP_C AS GRP_CD FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE 1=1 AND USYN = 1 AND GRP_C IN ('S001','P001') ) T GROUP BY T.CD, T.CD_NM, T.GRP_CD ORDER BY CASE WHEN T.GRP_CD = 'S001' THEN 1 WHEN T.GRP_CD = 'P001' THEN 2 END, TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(T.CD, '[0-9]+')) NULLS LAST

SELECT T.CD, T.CD_NM, T.GRP_CD FROM(
SELECT DTL_C AS CD, DTL_C_NM AS CD_NM, GRP_C AS GRP_CD FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE 1=1 AND USYN = 1 AND GRP_C IN ('S003','P003') ) T ORDER BY CASE WHEN T.GRP_CD = 'S003' THEN 1 WHEN T.GRP_CD = 'P003' THEN 2 END, TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(T.CD, '[0-9]+')) NULLS LAST
SELECT CD, CD_NM FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYYY AS CD, BAS_YYYY||'년' AS CD_NM FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY NOT IN ('9999') ) GROUP BY CD, CD_NM ORDER BY CD DESC

SELECT BAS_YYMM AS CODE , BAS_YYMM || '월' AS NAME FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_D_M WHERE BAS_YYMM IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BAS_YYMM)) != 0 ) A ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC
SELECT A.BIZ_RPT_ID AS CODE ,A.BIZ_RPT_NM || '(' || A.BIZ_RPT_ID || ')'AS NAME FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_M A ORDER BY A.BIZ_RPT_ID

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,GRP_C ,GRP_C_NM ,GRP_B_C ,NOTE_CTNT ,DR_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM ,CHG_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_B_C LIKE #{CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%' AND (GRP_C LIKE #{CODE_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%' OR GRP_C_NM LIKE '%'||#{CODE_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%') ORDER BY GRP_C

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.GRP_C /* 그룹코드 */ , DTL_C /* 상세코드 */ , DTL_C_NM /* 상세코드명 */ , USYN /* 사용여부 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , HGRK_GRP_C /* 상위그룹코드 */ , (SELECT GRP_C_NM FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C) AS HGRK_GRP_C_NM /* 상위그룹코드명 */ , HGRK_DTL_C /* 상위상세코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C AND DTL_C = T1.HGRK_DTL_C) AS HGRK_DTL_C_NM /* 상위상세코드명 */ , TMP01 /* TMP01 */ , TMP02 /* TMP02 */ , DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호 */ , CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ FROM SRBA_DTL_C T1 WHERE 1=1 AND GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY GRP_C, SNO
mapper.update: MERGE INTO SRBA_GRP_C USING DUAL ON (GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET GRP_C_NM = #{GRP_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GRP_B_C = #{GRP_B_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOTE_CTNT = #{NOTE_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GRP_C ,GRP_C_NM ,GRP_B_C ,NOTE_CTNT ,CON_YN ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{GRP_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{GRP_B_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{NOTE_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{CON_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.GRP_C /* 그룹코드 */ , DTL_C /* 상세코드 */ , DTL_C_NM /* 상세코드명 */ , USYN /* 사용여부 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , HGRK_GRP_C /* 상위그룹코드 */ , (SELECT GRP_C_NM FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C) AS HGRK_GRP_C_NM , HGRK_DTL_C /* 상위상세코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C AND DTL_C = T1.HGRK_DTL_C) AS HGRK_DTL_C_NM , TMP01 /* TMP01 */ , TMP02 /* TMP02 */ , DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호 */ , CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ , (SELECT GRP_B_C FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R300') AS GRP_B_C /* 그룹분류코드 1:RBA 2:System */ FROM SRBA_DTL_C T1 WHERE 1=1 AND GRP_C = 'S001' ORDER BY GRP_C, SNO

SELECT GRP_C ,DTL_C /*상세코드 */ ,DTL_C_NM /*상세코드명 */ ,USYN /*사용여부 */ ,SNO /*순번 */ ,HGRK_GRP_C /*상위그룹코드 */ ,(SELECT GRP_C_NM FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = A.HGRK_GRP_C) AS HGRK_GRP_C_NM /*상위그룹코드명 */ ,HGRK_DTL_C /*상위상세코드 */ ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = A.HGRK_GRP_C AND DTL_C = A.HGRK_DTL_C) AS HGRK_DTL_C_NM ,DR_DT /*등록일자 */ ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /*등록시간 */ ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호*/ ,CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ FROM SRBA_DTL_C A WHERE GRP_C = 'S002' AND HGRK_GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HGRK_DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY DTL_C,SNO

SELECT GRP_C ,DTL_C /*상세코드 */ ,DTL_C_NM /*상세코드명 */ ,USYN /*사용여부 */ ,SNO /*순번 */ ,HGRK_GRP_C /*상위그룹코드 */ ,(SELECT GRP_C_NM FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = A.HGRK_GRP_C) AS HGRK_GRP_C_NM /*상위그룹코드명 */ ,HGRK_DTL_C /*상위상세코드 */ ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = A.HGRK_GRP_C AND DTL_C = A.HGRK_DTL_C) AS HGRK_DTL_C_NM ,DR_DT /*등록일자 */ ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /*등록시간 */ ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호*/ ,CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ FROM SRBA_DTL_C A WHERE GRP_C = 'S003' AND HGRK_DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY DTL_C,SNO
mapper.update: MERGE INTO SRBA_DTL_C USING DUAL ON ( GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET DTL_C_NM = #{DTL_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,USYN = '1' ,CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GRP_C ,DTL_C ,DTL_C_NM ,USYN ,HGRK_GRP_C ,HGRK_DTL_C ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{DTL_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,'1' ,#{HGRK_GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{HGRK_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
DELETE FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE HGRK_GRP_C = 'S001' AND GRP_C = 'S002' AND DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE HGRK_GRP_C = 'S002' AND GRP_C = 'S003' AND DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.GRP_C /* 그룹코드 */ , DTL_C /* 상세코드 */ , DTL_C_NM /* 상세코드명 */ , USYN /* 사용여부 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , TMP01 /* TMP01 */ , TMP02 /* TMP02 */ , DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호 */ , CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ FROM SRBA_DTL_C T1 WHERE 1=1 AND GRP_C = 'R309' ORDER BY GRP_C, SNO

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.GRP_C /* 그룹코드 */ , DTL_C /* 상세코드 */ , DTL_C_NM /* 상세코드명 */ , USYN /* 사용여부 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , HGRK_GRP_C /* 상위그룹코드 */ , (SELECT GRP_C_NM FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C) AS HGRK_GRP_C_NM /* 상위그룹코드명 */ , HGRK_DTL_C /* 상위상세코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C AND DTL_C = T1.HGRK_DTL_C) AS HGRK_DTL_C_NM /* 상위상세코드명 */ , TMP01 /* TMP01 */ , TMP02 /* TMP02 */ , DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호 */ , CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ FROM SRBA_DTL_C T1 WHERE 1=1 AND HGRK_GRP_C = 'R309' AND HGRK_DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY GRP_C, SNO
mapper.update: MERGE INTO SRBA_DTL_C USING DUAL ON ( GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET DTL_C_NM = #{DTL_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,USYN = '1' ,CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GRP_C ,DTL_C ,DTL_C_NM ,USYN ,HGRK_GRP_C ,HGRK_DTL_C ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{DTL_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,'1' ,#{HGRK_GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{HGRK_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.GRP_C /* 그룹코드 */ , DTL_C /* 상세코드 */ , DTL_C_NM /* 상세코드명 */ , USYN /* 사용여부 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , HGRK_GRP_C /* 상위그룹코드 */ , (SELECT GRP_C_NM FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C) AS HGRK_GRP_C_NM , HGRK_DTL_C /* 상위상세코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C AND DTL_C = T1.HGRK_DTL_C) AS HGRK_DTL_C_NM , TMP01 /* TMP01 */ , TMP02 /* TMP02 */ , DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호 */ , CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ , (SELECT GRP_B_C FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R300') AS GRP_B_C /* 그룹분류코드 1:RBA 2:System */ FROM KRBA_DTL_C T1 WHERE 1=1 AND GRP_C = 'P001' ORDER BY GRP_C, SNO

SELECT GRP_C ,DTL_C /*상세코드 */ ,DTL_C_NM /*상세코드명 */ ,USYN /*사용여부 */ ,SNO /*순번 */ ,HGRK_GRP_C /*상위그룹코드 */ ,(SELECT GRP_C_NM FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = A.HGRK_GRP_C) AS HGRK_GRP_C_NM /*상위그룹코드명 */ ,HGRK_DTL_C /*상위상세코드 */ ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = A.HGRK_GRP_C AND DTL_C = A.HGRK_DTL_C) AS HGRK_DTL_C_NM ,DR_DT /*등록일자 */ ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /*등록시간 */ ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호*/ ,CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ FROM KRBA_DTL_C A WHERE GRP_C = 'P002' AND HGRK_GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HGRK_DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY DTL_C,SNO

SELECT GRP_C ,DTL_C /*상세코드 */ ,DTL_C_NM /*상세코드명 */ ,USYN /*사용여부 */ ,SNO /*순번 */ ,HGRK_GRP_C /*상위그룹코드 */ ,(SELECT GRP_C_NM FROM SRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = A.HGRK_GRP_C) AS HGRK_GRP_C_NM /*상위그룹코드명 */ ,HGRK_DTL_C /*상위상세코드 */ ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = A.HGRK_GRP_C AND DTL_C = A.HGRK_DTL_C) AS HGRK_DTL_C_NM ,DR_DT /*등록일자 */ ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /*등록시간 */ ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호*/ ,CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ FROM KRBA_DTL_C A WHERE GRP_C = 'P003' AND HGRK_DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY DTL_C,SNO
mapper.update: MERGE INTO KRBA_DTL_C USING DUAL ON ( GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET DTL_C_NM = #{DTL_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,USYN = '1' ,CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GRP_C ,DTL_C ,DTL_C_NM ,USYN ,HGRK_GRP_C ,HGRK_DTL_C ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{DTL_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,'1' ,#{HGRK_GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{HGRK_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT '' AS SELECTED , GYLJ_LINE_G_C , GYLJ_LINE_NM , USYN , DR_DT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM , CHG_DT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM FROM SRBA_GYLJ_M WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY GYLJ_LINE_G_C

SELECT '' AS SELECTED , GYLJ_LINE_G_C , SNO , GYLJ_ROLE_ID , NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID , RTN_ROLE_ID , DR_DT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM , CHG_DT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE 1=1 AND GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SNO
mapper.update: MERGE INTO SRBA_GYLJ_M USING DUAL ON (GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET GYLJ_LINE_NM = #{GYLJ_LINE_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USYN = #{USYN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,GYLJ_LINE_NM ,USYN ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{GYLJ_LINE_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{USYN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
DELETE FROM SRBA_GYLJ_M WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'P002' AND HGRK_DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'P003' AND HGRK_DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'S001' AND HGRK_DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'S002' AND HGRK_DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND HGRK_DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT BAS_YYMM AS CODE,
SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,5,6) AS NAME FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM != 999912 ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC

SELECT BAS_YYMM AS CODE,
SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,5,6) AS NAME FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != 999912
AND BAS_YYMM = #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC

SELECT VALT_YYMM AS CODE,
SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM,0,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM,5,6) AS NAME FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R GROUP BY VALT_YYMM ORDER BY VALT_YYMM DESC

SELECT AA.BAS_YYMM ,NVL(VALT01,0) AS VALT01 /*수기대상*/ ,NVL(VALT02,0) AS VALT02 /*수기완료 + 자동*/ ,NVL((VALT01 - VALT02),0) AS VALT03 /*수기미완료*/
,NVL(VALT11,0) AS VALT11 /*전체*/ ,NVL(VALT12,0) AS VALT12 /*전체중미완료*/ ,NVL((VALT11 - VALT12),0) AS VALT13 FROM ( SELECT T01.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM ,COUNT(T01.BAS_YYMM) AS VALT01 ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_V_HRSK_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = T01.BAS_YYMM) AS VALT02 FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M T01 , SRBA_V_PROC_BRNO T02 WHERE T01.BAS_YYMM = T02.BAS_YYMM AND T01.PROC_FLD_C = T02.PROC_FLD_C AND T01.PROC_FLD_C = T02.PROC_FLD_C AND T01.PROC_LGDV_C = T02.PROC_LGDV_C AND T01.PROC_MDDV_C = T02.PROC_MDDV_C AND T01.PROC_SMDV_C = T02.PROC_SMDV_C AND T01.VALT_METH_C = '2' AND T01.USYN = '1' AND T02.TGT_YN = '1' and T01.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY T01.BAS_YYMM ) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,VALT01 AS VALT11 ,VALT02 AS VALT12 FROM( SELECT T02.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM ,COUNT(T02.BAS_YYMM) AS VALT01 ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = T02.BAS_YYMM AND TONGJE_VALD_PNT IS NOT NULL) AS VALT02 FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_R T02 WHERE 1=1 AND T02.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY T02.BAS_YYMM ) ) BB ON AA.BAS_YYMM = BB.BAS_YYMM

SELECT ROWNUM , T03.* FROM ( SELECT T01.BAS_YYMM , SUBSTR( T01.BAS_YYMM , 1, 4 ) AS BAS_YY , SUBSTR( T01.BAS_YYMM , 5, 2 ) || '회차' AS BAS_CNT , T01.RBA_VALT_LGDV_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R301' AND DTL_C = T01.RBA_VALT_LGDV_C ) AS RBA_VALT_LGDV_C_NM , T01.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R302' AND DTL_C = T01.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C ) AS RBA_VALT_SMDV_C_NM , T01.EXP_TRM , T01.VALT_SDT , T01.VALT_EDT , T01.REAL_EDT , T01.TGT_TRN_SDT , T01.TGT_TRN_EDT , T01.VALT_METH_CTNT , DECODE(T01.EXEC_B_BRNO_YN,'1','Y','N') AS EXEC_B_BRNO_YN_NM , T01.EXEC_B_BRNO_YN , DECODE(T01.EXEC_S_BRNO_YN,'1','Y','N') AS EXEC_S_BRNO_YN_NM , T01.EXEC_S_BRNO_YN , T01.DR_DT , T01.DR_TIME , GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NO , T01.CHG_DT , T01.CHG_TIME , GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO , T01.FIX_YN , T02.FIX_YN AS FIX_YN_M ,NVL((SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R343' AND DTL_C = T02.ING_STEP ),'일정정보입력') AS ING_STEP_NM , T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO , NVL(T02.ING_STEP,'00') AS ING_STEP
, T01.MUST_YN FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D T01 , SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M T02 WHERE T01.BAS_YYMM = T02.BAS_YYMM ) T03 WHERE 1=1 AND T03.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY RBA_VALT_SMDV_C

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over (order by T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M SET ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM , RBA_VALT_LGDV_C , RBA_VALT_SMDV_C , EXP_TRM , '' , '' , '' , '' , '' , VALT_METH_CTNT , EXEC_B_BRNO_YN , EXEC_S_BRNO_YN , DECODE( MUST_YN, '1', '0', '2' ) AS FIX_YN , MUST_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE 1=1

AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
AND BAS_YYMM = '999912'

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO ( BAS_YYMM , PROC_FLD_C , PROC_LGDV_C , PROC_MDDV_C , PROC_SMDV_C , TONGJE_NO , VALT_BRNO , TGT_YN , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM , PROC_FLD_C , PROC_LGDV_C , PROC_MDDV_C , PROC_SMDV_C , TONGJE_NO , VALT_BRNO , TGT_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYMMMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO WHERE 1=1
AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
AND BAS_YYMM = '999912'

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_PROC_TJ_MP ( BAS_YYMM , PROC_FLD_C , PROC_LGDV_C , PROC_MDDV_C , PROC_SMDV_C , TONGJE_FLD_C , TONGJE_LGDV_C , TONGJE_MDDV_C , TONGJE_SMDV_C , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM , PROC_FLD_C , PROC_LGDV_C , PROC_MDDV_C , PROC_SMDV_C , TONGJE_FLD_C , TONGJE_LGDV_C , TONGJE_MDDV_C , TONGJE_SMDV_C , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYMMMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TJ_MP WHERE 1=1
AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
AND BAS_YYMM = '999912'

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_PROC_M ( BAS_YYMM , PROC_FLD_C , PROC_LGDV_C , PROC_MDDV_C , PROC_SMDV_C , PROC_SMDV_NM , RSK_CAUS_CTNT , USYN , VALT_METH_C , NOTE_CTNT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM , PROC_FLD_C , PROC_LGDV_C , PROC_MDDV_C , PROC_SMDV_C , PROC_SMDV_NM , RSK_CAUS_CTNT , USYN , VALT_METH_C , NOTE_CTNT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYMMMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYMMMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M WHERE 1=1
AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
AND BAS_YYMM = '999912'

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_PROC_BRNO ( BAS_YYMM , PROC_FLD_C , PROC_LGDV_C , PROC_MDDV_C , PROC_SMDV_C , VALT_BRNO , TGT_YN , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM , PROC_FLD_C , PROC_LGDV_C , PROC_MDDV_C , PROC_SMDV_C , VALT_BRNO , TGT_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYMMMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYMMMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA_V_PROC_BRNO WHERE 1=1
AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
AND BAS_YYMM = '999912'
mapper.select: SELECT ROWNUM , T03.* FROM ( SELECT AA.BAS_YYMM ,AA.BRNO ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = AA.BRNO) VALT_BRNM ,NVL(VALT01,0) AS VALT01 ,NVL(VALT02,0) AS VALT02 ,NVL((VALT01 - VALT02),0) AS VALT03 ,CASE WHEN (VALT01 - VALT02 = 0 ) THEN '완료' WHEN (VALT01 - VALT02 > 0 ) THEN '미완료' ELSE '대상아님' END VALT04 ,NVL(VALT11,0) AS VALT11 ,NVL(VALT12,0) AS VALT12 ,NVL((VALT11 - VALT12),0) AS VALT13 ,CASE WHEN (VALT11 - VALT12 = 0 ) THEN '완료' WHEN (VALT11 - VALT12 > 0 ) THEN '미완료' ELSE '대상아님' END VALT14 ,NVL(VALT21,0) AS VALT21 ,NVL(VALT22,0) AS VALT22 ,NVL((VALT21 - VALT22),0) AS VALT23 ,CASE WHEN (VALT21 - VALT22 = 0 ) THEN '완료' WHEN (VALT21 - VALT22 > 0 ) THEN '미완료' ELSE '대상아님' END VALT24 ,'전송' AS MAIL_SEND FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO AA LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T01.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM ,T02.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(T01.BAS_YYMM) AS VALT01 ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_V_HRSK_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = T01.BAS_YYMM AND VALT_BRNO = T02.VALT_BRNO) AS VALT02 FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M T01 , SRBA_V_PROC_BRNO T02 WHERE T01.BAS_YYMM = T02.BAS_YYMM AND T01.PROC_FLD_C = T02.PROC_FLD_C AND T01.PROC_FLD_C = T02.PROC_FLD_C AND T01.PROC_LGDV_C = T02.PROC_LGDV_C AND T01.PROC_MDDV_C = T02.PROC_MDDV_C AND T01.PROC_SMDV_C = T02.PROC_SMDV_C AND T01.VALT_METH_C = '2' AND T01.USYN = '1' AND T02.TGT_YN = '1' GROUP BY T01.BAS_YYMM,T02.VALT_BRNO ) BB ON AA.BRNO = BB.VALT_BRNO AND AA.BAS_YYMM = BB.BAS_YYMM LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,VALT_BRNO ,VALT01 AS VALT11 ,VALT02 AS VALT12 FROM( SELECT T02.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM ,T02.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(T02.BAS_YYMM) AS VALT01 ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = T02.BAS_YYMM AND VALT_BRNO = T02.VALT_BRNO AND TONGJE_VALD_PNT IS NOT NULL ) AS VALT02 FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_R T02 WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T02.BAS_YYMM,T02.VALT_BRNO ) ) CC ON AA.BRNO = CC.VALT_BRNO AND AA.BAS_YYMM = CC.BAS_YYMM LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM ,A.VALT_BRNO ,(SELECT COUNT(VALT_BRNO) FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R C WHERE C.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND C.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO AND C.REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R' ) AS VALT21 ,(SELECT COUNT(VALT_BRNO) FROM SRBA_IMPRV_M D WHERE D.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND D.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO AND D.GYLJ_S_C = '3' AND IMPRV_CMPT_YN = 1 ) AS VALT22 FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R A LEFT OUTER JOIN SRBA_IMPRV_M B ON A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.VALT_BRNO = B.VALT_BRNO WHERE 1=1 AND REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R' GROUP BY A.BAS_YYMM,A.VALT_BRNO ) DD ON AA.BRNO = DD.VALT_BRNO AND AA.BAS_YYMM = DD.BAS_YYMM ORDER BY AA.BRNO )T03 WHERE 1=1 AND T03.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY ROWNUM ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO) BRNO_NM , A.HGRK_BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HGRK_BRNO) HGRK_BRNO_NM , A.AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO , B.MOFC_BRN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('M043',B.MOFC_BRN_CCD) AS MOFC_BRN_NAME , CASE WHEN C.RGBR_CODE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS KYC_YN , CASE WHEN D.BRNO IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS PRE_USE_YN FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A , NIC41B B , ( SELECT DISTINCT RGBR_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN WHERE CDD_FLFL_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS( SYSDATE , -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR( SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD')) C , ( SELECT DISTINCT BRNO FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM IN ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) D WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM =#{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND A.BRNO = C.RGBR_CODE(+) AND A.BRNO = D.BRNO(+)
AND (A.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.BRNO) LIKE '%'|| #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ||'%')
AND (B.MOFC_BRN_CCD = #{MOFC, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
AND (A.AML_TJ_BRNO_YN = #{AML_TJ_BRNO_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
) WHERE 1=1
AND (KYC_YN = #{KYC_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
AND (PRE_USE_YN = #{PRE_USE_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
ORDER BY BRNO , HGRK_BRNO

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX (NIC41B PK_NIC41B)*/ A.DPRT_CD AS BRNO , A.DPRT_NM AS BRNO_NM , A.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD AS HGRK_BRNO , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = HG_RNK_DPRT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) HGRK_BRNO_NM , '0' AS AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , A.MOFC_BRN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('M043',A.MOFC_BRN_CCD) AS MOFC_BRN_NAME , CASE WHEN B.RGBR_CODE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS KYC_YN , CASE WHEN C.BRNO IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS PRE_USE_YN FROM NIC41B A , ( SELECT DISTINCT RGBR_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN WHERE CDD_FLFL_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR( SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD')) B , ( SELECT DISTINCT BRNO FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM IN ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) C WHERE USE_CCD = 'Y' AND A.DPRT_CD = B.RGBR_CODE(+) AND A.DPRT_CD = C.BRNO(+)
AND (A.MOFC_BRN_CCD = #{MOFC, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
AND (A.DPRT_CD = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR A.DPRT_NM LIKE '%'|| #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ||'%')
AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT BRNO FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BRNO = A.DPRT_CD AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) WHERE 1=1
AND (KYC_YN = #{KYC_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
AND (PRE_USE_YN = #{PRE_USE_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
ORDER BY BRNO,HGRK_BRNO

SELECT BAS_YYMM , FIX_YN , FIX_DT , FIX_JKW_NO , BRNO_FIX_YN , BRNO_FIX_DT , BRNO_FIX_JKW_NO , ING_STEP , NVL((SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R343' AND DTL_C = ING_STEP ),'일정정보입력') AS ING_STEP_NM , ATTCH_FILE_NO , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT BRNO , BRNO_NM , HGRK_BRNO , HGRK_BRNO_NM , MOFC_BRN_CCD , DECODE(AML_TJ_BRNO_YN,'0','N','Y') AS AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(A01) = '0' THEN TO_CHAR(A01) ELSE TO_CHAR(A01) || '명 (' || TO_CHAR(A02) || ')' END) AS BRNO3 , (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(B01) = '0' THEN TO_CHAR(B01) ELSE TO_CHAR(B01) || '명 (' || TO_CHAR(B02) || ')' END) AS BRNO6 , (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(C01) = '0' THEN TO_CHAR(C01) ELSE TO_CHAR(C01) || '명 (' || TO_CHAR(C02) || ')' END) AS BRNO4 , (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(D01) = '0' THEN TO_CHAR(D01) ELSE TO_CHAR(D01) || '명 (' || TO_CHAR(D02) || ')' END) AS BRNO5 FROM( SELECT T01.DPRT_CD AS BRNO , T01.DPRT_NM AS BRNO_NM , T01.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD AS HGRK_BRNO , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = T01.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD) AS HGRK_BRNO_NM , '' AS AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , T01.MOFC_BRN_CCD , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '3' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS A01 , ( SELECT /*WM_CONCAT( T12.USER_NM)*/ /*오라클12C 이후버전에서는 사용불가*/ LISTAGG(T12.USER_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY T12.USER_NM) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '3' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS A02 , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '6' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS B01 , ( SELECT /*WM_CONCAT( T12.USER_NM)*/ /*오라클12C 이후버전에서는 사용불가*/ LISTAGG(T12.USER_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY T12.USER_NM) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '6' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS B02 , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '4' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS C01 , ( SELECT /*WM_CONCAT( T12.USER_NM)*/ /*오라클12C 이후버전에서는 사용불가*/ LISTAGG(T12.USER_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY T12.USER_NM) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '4' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS C02 , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '5' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS D01 , ( SELECT /*WM_CONCAT( T12.USER_NM)*/ /*오라클12C 이후버전에서는 사용불가*/ LISTAGG(T12.USER_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY T12.USER_NM) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '5' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS D02 FROM NIC41B T01 WHERE 1=1 AND T01.USE_CCD = 'Y' AND (SELECT USE_CCD FROM NIC41B B WHERE B.DPRT_CD = T01.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD)='Y' ) WHERE 1=1
AND BRNO_NM LIKE '%'|| #{HGRK_BRNO_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ||'%'
ORDER BY MOFC_BRN_CCD,HGRK_BRNO,BRNO

SELECT T01.USER_ID , T01.LOGIN_ID , T01.USER_NM , GET_CODE_NAME('S015',T01.POSITION_CODE) as POSITION_NM , T01.POSITION_CODE , T01.DEP_ID , (SELECT SUBSTR(XMLAgg(XMLELEMENT(x,',',ROLE_ID) order by ROLE_ID).Extract('//text()'),2) AS DD FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE WHERE T01.USER_ID = USER_ID) AS ROLE_ID FROM C_USER T01 , C_DEP_INFO T02, NIC41B T03 WHERE T01.DEP_ID = T02.DEP_ID AND T02.DEP_DESC = T03.DPRT_CD AND T01.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T01.ACTIVE_YN = 'Y'
AND T02.DEP_DESC = #{DEP_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND (T01.LOGIN_ID = #{USER_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} or T01.USER_NM like '%'|| #{USER_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ||'%' )
AND (TRIM(T01.VALID_END_DT) IS NULL OR (T01.VALID_END_DT > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')))

SELECT -- HG_RNK_DPRT_CD MOFC_BRNO_NM ,BRNO ,BRNO_NM ,RSK_CATG1_C ,RSK_CATG1_C_NM ,CUR_JIPYO_V ,CUR_SCORE ,PREV_JIPYO_V ,PREV_SCORE , CASE WHEN CUR_SCORE > PREV_SCORE THEN '02' WHEN CUR_SCORE = PREV_SCORE THEN '00' WHEN CUR_SCORE < PREV_SCORE THEN '01' END AS CHANGE_GUBUN FROM ( SELECT 0 AS SORT_ORDER, -- HG_RNK_DPRT_CD, MOFC_BRNO_NM, BRNO, BRNO_NM, RSK_CATG1_C, RSK_CATG1_C_NM, SUM(CUR_JIPYO_V) AS CUR_JIPYO_V, SUM(CUR_SCORE) AS CUR_SCORE, SUM(PREV_JIPYO_V) AS PREV_JIPYO_V, SUM(PREV_SCORE) AS PREV_SCORE FROM( SELECT 0 AS SORT_ORDER ,'S0000' AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD -- 부점구분코드 ,'전체' AS MOFC_BRNO_NM -- 부점구분명 ,'S9999' AS BRNO -- 부점코드 ,'삼성증권' AS BRNO_NM -- 평가대상부점 , 'R0' AS RSK_CATG1_C -- 위험분류 , '고유위험 전체' AS RSK_CATG1_C_NM -- 위험분류 , SUM(A.JIPYO_V) AS CUR_JIPYO_V , SUM(A.JIPYO_SCORE) AS CUR_SCORE
, (SELECT SUM(C.JIPYO_V) FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C WHERE C.BRNO = A.BRNO AND C.RSK_CATG1_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS PREV_JIPYO_V , (SELECT SUM(C.JIPYO_SCORE) FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C WHERE C.BRNO = A.BRNO AND C.RSK_CATG1_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS PREV_SCORE FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A WHERE A.BRNO = '99999' AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.BRNO, A.RSK_CATG1_C
UNION ALL
SELECT 1 AS SORT_ORDER
,'S0000' AS HG_RNK_DPRT_CD -- 부점구분코드 ,'전체' AS MOFC_BRNO_NM -- 부점구분명 ,'S9999' AS BRNO -- 부점코드 ,'삼성증권' AS BRNO_NM -- 평가대상부점 ,A.RSK_CATG1_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001' ) AS RSK_CATG1_C_NM -- 위험분류 , SUM(A.JIPYO_V) AS CUR_JIPYO_V , SUM(A.JIPYO_SCORE) AS CUR_SCORE
, (SELECT SUM(C.JIPYO_V) FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C WHERE C.BRNO = A.BRNO AND C.RSK_CATG1_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS PREV_JIPYO_V , (SELECT SUM(C.JIPYO_SCORE) FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C WHERE C.BRNO = A.BRNO AND C.RSK_CATG1_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS PREV_SCORE FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A WHERE A.BRNO = '99999' AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.BRNO, A.RSK_CATG1_C ) GROUP BY SORT_ORDER, HG_RNK_DPRT_CD, MOFC_BRNO_NM, BRNO, BRNO_NM, RSK_CATG1_C, RSK_CATG1_C_NM
UNION ALL
SELECT 2 AS SORT_ORDER , DECODE(B.MOFC_BRN_CCD, 'M', '본부부서', '영업점' ) AS MOFC_BRNO_NM ,A.BRNO -- 부점코드 ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO) AS BRNO_NM -- 평가대상부점 , 'R0' AS RSK_CATG1_C -- 위험분류 , '고유위험 전체' AS RSK_CATG1_C_NM -- 위험분류 , SUM(A.JIPYO_V) AS CUR_JIPYO_V -- 현재 고유위험 , SUM(A.JIPYO_SCORE) AS CUR_SCORE -- 현재 고유위험
, (SELECT SUM(C.JIPYO_V) FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C WHERE C.BRNO = A.BRNO --AND C.RSK_CATG1_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS PREV_JIPYO_V , (SELECT SUM(C.JIPYO_SCORE) FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C WHERE C.BRNO = A.BRNO --AND C.RSK_CATG1_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS PREV_SCORE
FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A INNER JOIN NIC41B B ON A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY B.MOFC_BRN_CCD, A.BRNO
UNION ALL
SELECT 3 AS SORT_ORDER , DECODE(B.MOFC_BRN_CCD, 'M', '본부부서', '영업점' ) AS MOFC_BRNO_NM ,A.BRNO -- 부점코드 ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO) AS BRNO_NM -- 평가대상부점 ,A.RSK_CATG1_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001' ) AS RSK_CATG1_C_NM -- 위험분류 , SUM(A.JIPYO_V) AS CUR_JIPYO_V , SUM(A.JIPYO_SCORE) AS CUR_SCORE
, (SELECT SUM(C.JIPYO_V) FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C WHERE C.BRNO = A.BRNO AND C.RSK_CATG1_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS PREV_JIPYO_V , (SELECT SUM(C.JIPYO_SCORE) FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C WHERE C.BRNO = A.BRNO AND C.RSK_CATG1_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS PREV_SCORE FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A INNER JOIN NIC41B B ON A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY B.MOFC_BRN_CCD, A.BRNO, A.RSK_CATG1_C
)X WHERE 1=1
AND X.RSK_CATG1_C = #{RSK_CATG1_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND X.CUR_JIPYO_V > X.PREV_SCORE
AND X.CUR_JIPYO_V < X.PREV_SCORE
AND X.CUR_JIPYO_V = X.PREV_SCORE
AND X.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY X.MOFC_BRNO_NM DESC, X.BRNO, X.SORT_ORDER, X.RSK_CATG1_C ASC

WITH MAX_DATA AS ( SELECT RSK_CATG1_C , MAX(MAX_SCORE) AS MAX_SCORE FROM ( SELECT A.RSK_CATG1_C, A.BRNO, SUM(A.JIPYO_SCORE) AS MAX_SCORE FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BRNO != '99999' GROUP BY A.BRNO,A.RSK_CATG1_C ) GROUP BY RSK_CATG1_C ), CUR_DATA AS ( SELECT A.BRNO, A.RSK_CATG1_C ,SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) AS CUR_SCORE FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.BRNO, A.RSK_CATG1_C ), PREV_DATA AS ( SELECT A.BRNO, A.RSK_CATG1_C ,SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) AS PREV_SCORE FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.BRNO, A.RSK_CATG1_C ) SELECT NVL('[' || LISTAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'RISK_TYPE' VALUE ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = MX.RSK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001' ), 'MAX_SCORE' VALUE NVL(MX.MAX_SCORE,0), 'CUR_SCORE' VALUE NVL(CU.CUR_SCORE,0), 'PREV_SCORE' VALUE NVL(PV.PREV_SCORE,0) ), ',' )WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY MX.RSK_CATG1_C ) || ']','[]') AS JSON_RESULT FROM MAX_DATA MX LEFT JOIN CUR_DATA CU ON CU.RSK_CATG1_C = MX.RSK_CATG1_C LEFT JOIN PREV_DATA PV ON PV.RSK_CATG1_C = MX.RSK_CATG1_C

WITH CUR_CNT AS ( SELECT A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS GD, COUNT(F.BRNO) AS CUR_BRNO_CNT FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I A ON F.FINAL_VAL >= A.GD_S_SECT AND F.FINAL_VAL < A.GD_E_SECT WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ), PREV_CNT AS ( SELECT B.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS GD, COUNT(F.BRNO) AS PREV_BRNO_CNT FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F LEFT JOIN SRBA_REMDR_RSK_I B ON F.BF_FINAL_VAL >= B.GD_S_SECT AND F.BF_FINAL_VAL < B.GD_E_SECT WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY B.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ), MERGED AS( SELECT COALESCE(C.GD, P.GD) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C, NVL(C.CUR_BRNO_CNT, 0) AS CUR_BRNO_CNT, NVL(P.PREV_BRNO_CNT , 0) AS PREV_BRNO_CNT FROM CUR_CNT C FULL OUTER JOIN PREV_CNT P ON P.GD = C.GD WHERE COALESCE(C.GD, P.GD) IS NOT NULL ) SELECT REMDR_RSK_GD_C, CUR_BRNO_CNT, PREV_BRNO_CNT FROM MERGED UNION ALL SELECT '합계', SUM(CUR_BRNO_CNT) AS CUR_BRNO_CNT, SUM(PREV_BRNO_CNT) AS PREV_BRNO_CNT FROM MERGED ORDER BY REMDR_RSK_GD_C

WITH MAX_DATA AS ( SELECT A.RSK_ELMT_C ,MAX(A.JIPYO_SCORE) AS MAX_SCORE FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.RSK_ELMT_C ORDER BY MAX(A.JIPYO_SCORE) DESC
), CUR_DATA AS ( SELECT A.RSK_ELMT_C ,SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) AS CUR_SCORE FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.RSK_ELMT_C ORDER BY SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) DESC ), PREV_DATA AS ( SELECT A.RSK_ELMT_C ,SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) AS PREV_SCORE FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.RSK_ELMT_C ORDER BY SUM(JIPYO_SCORE) DESC ) SELECT NVL('[' || LISTAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'RISK_TYPE' VALUE ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = MX.RSK_ELMT_C AND GRP_C = 'S003' ), 'MAX_SCORE' VALUE NVL(MX.MAX_SCORE,0), 'CUR_SCORE' VALUE NVL(CU.CUR_SCORE,0), 'PREV_SCORE' VALUE NVL(PV.PREV_SCORE,0) ), ',' )WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY MX.RSK_ELMT_C ) || ']','[]') AS JSON_RESULT FROM MAX_DATA MX LEFT JOIN CUR_DATA CU ON CU.RSK_ELMT_C = MX.RSK_ELMT_C LEFT JOIN PREV_DATA PV ON PV.RSK_ELMT_C = MX.RSK_ELMT_C WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT HGRK_BRNO , HGRK_BRNO_NM , BRNO , BRNO_NM , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_CATG1_C_NM , RSK_VALT_ITEM , RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , RSK_ELMT_C , RSK_ELMT_C_NM ,CUR_JIPYO_V ,CUR_SCORE , PREV_JIPYO_V , PREV_SCORE , CASE WHEN CUR_SCORE > PREV_SCORE THEN '02' WHEN CUR_SCORE = PREV_SCORE THEN '00' WHEN CUR_SCORE < PREV_SCORE THEN '01' END AS CHANGE_GUBUN FROM( SELECT 0 AS SORT_ORDER, HGRK_BRNO, HGRK_BRNO_NM, BRNO, BRNO_NM, RSK_CATG1_C, RSK_CATG1_C_NM, RSK_VALT_ITEM, RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM, RSK_ELMT_C, RSK_ELMT_C_NM, SUM(CUR_JIPYO_V) AS CUR_JIPYO_V, SUM(CUR_SCORE) AS CUR_SCORE, SUM(PREV_JIPYO_V) AS PREV_JIPYO_V, SUM(PREV_SCORE) AS PREV_SCORE FROM( SELECT 0 AS SORT_ORDER , 'S0000' AS HGRK_BRNO -- 부점구분코드 , '전체' HGRK_BRNO_NM -- 부점구분명 , 'S9999' BRNO -- 부점코드 , '삼성증권' AS BRNO_NM -- 평가대상부점 , 'R0' AS RSK_CATG1_C -- 위험분류 , '고유위험 전체' AS RSK_CATG1_C_NM -- 위험분류 , 'R00000' AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , '평가항목 전체' AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM -- 평가항목 , 'R00000' AS RSK_ELMT_C , '위험요소 전체' AS RSK_ELMT_C_NM -- 위험요소 , NULL AS CUR_JIPYO_V , SUM(A.JIPYO_SCORE) AS CUR_SCORE , NULL AS PREV_JIPYO_V -- 직전 고유위험 , SUM(C.JIPYO_SCORE) AS PREV_SCORE -- 현재 고유위험 FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A LEFT JOIN SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C ON A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.RSK_ELMT_C = C.RSK_ELMT_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHERE 1=1 AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.BRNO, A.RSK_CATG1_C , A.RSK_VALT_ITEM, A.RSK_ELMT_C
UNION ALL
SELECT 1 AS SORT_ORDER , 'S0000' AS HGRK_BRNO -- 부점구분코드 , '전체' HGRK_BRNO_NM -- 부점구분명 , 'S9999' BRNO -- 부점코드 , '삼성증권' AS BRNO_NM -- 평가대상부점 , A.RSK_CATG1_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001' ) AS RSK_CATG1_C_NM -- 위험분류 , A.RSK_VALT_ITEM , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM -- 평가항목 , A.RSK_ELMT_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_ELMT_C AND GRP_C = 'S003' ) AS RSK_ELMT_C_NM -- 위험요소 , SUM(A.JIPYO_V) AS CUR_JIPYO_V , SUM(A.JIPYO_SCORE) AS CUR_SCORE , SUM(C.JIPYO_V) AS PREV_JIPYO_V -- 직전 고유위험 , SUM(C.JIPYO_SCORE) AS PREV_SCORE -- 현재 고유위험 FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A LEFT JOIN SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C ON A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.RSK_ELMT_C = C.RSK_ELMT_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHERE 1=1 AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.BRNO, A.RSK_CATG1_C , A.RSK_VALT_ITEM, A.RSK_ELMT_C ) GROUP BY SORT_ORDER, HGRK_BRNO, HGRK_BRNO_NM, BRNO, BRNO_NM, RSK_CATG1_C, RSK_CATG1_C_NM, RSK_VALT_ITEM, RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM, RSK_ELMT_C, RSK_ELMT_C_NM
UNION ALL
SELECT 2 AS SORT_ORDER , B.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , CASE WHEN B.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD IS NULL THEN '전체' ELSE DECODE(B.MOFC_BRN_CCD, 'M', '본부부서', '영업점' ) END AS MOFC_BRNO_NM , A.BRNO -- 부점코드 , ( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO ) AS BRNO_NM -- 평가대상부점 , A.RSK_CATG1_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001' ) AS RSK_CATG1_C_NM -- 위험분류 , 'R00000' AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , '평가항목 전체' AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM -- 평가항목 , 'R00000' AS RSK_ELMT_C , '위험요소 전체' AS RSK_ELMT_C_NM -- 위험요소 , SUM(A.JIPYO_V) AS CUR_JIPYO_V , SUM(A.JIPYO_SCORE) AS CUR_SCORE , SUM(C.JIPYO_V) AS PREV_JIPYO_V -- 직전 고유위험 , SUM(C.JIPYO_SCORE) AS PREV_SCORE -- 현재 고유위험 FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A INNER JOIN NIC41B B ON A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD LEFT JOIN SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C ON A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.RSK_ELMT_C = C.RSK_ELMT_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY B.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD, B.MOFC_BRN_CCD, A.BRNO, A.RSK_CATG1_C
UNION ALL
SELECT 3 AS SORT_ORDER , B.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , CASE WHEN B.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD IS NULL THEN '전체' ELSE DECODE(B.MOFC_BRN_CCD, 'M', '본부부서', '영업점' ) END AS MOFC_BRNO_NM , A.BRNO -- 부점코드 , ( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO ) AS BRNO_NM -- 평가대상부점 , A.RSK_CATG1_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001' ) AS RSK_CATG1_C_NM -- 위험분류 , A.RSK_VALT_ITEM , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM -- 평가항목 , A.RSK_ELMT_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_ELMT_C AND GRP_C = 'S003' ) AS RSK_ELMT_C_NM -- 위험요소 , SUM(A.JIPYO_V) AS JIPYO_V , SUM(A.JIPYO_SCORE) AS SCORE , SUM(C.JIPYO_V) AS PREV_JIPYO_V -- 직전 고유위험 , SUM(C.JIPYO_SCORE) AS PREV_SCORE -- 현재 고유위험 FROM SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE A INNER JOIN NIC41B B ON A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD LEFT JOIN SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE C ON A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.RSK_ELMT_C = C.RSK_ELMT_C AND C.BAS_YYMM = ( SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY B.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD, B.MOFC_BRN_CCD, A.BRNO, A.RSK_CATG1_C , A.RSK_VALT_ITEM , A.RSK_ELMT_C )X WHERE 1=1
AND X.RSK_CATG1_C = #{RSK_CATG1_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND X.CUR_JIPYO_V > X.PREV_SCORE
AND X.CUR_JIPYO_V < X.PREV_SCORE
AND X.CUR_JIPYO_V = X.PREV_SCORE
AND X.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY X.HGRK_BRNO, X.BRNO, X.RSK_CATG1_C, X.RSK_VALT_ITEM, X.RSK_ELMT_C ASC

WITH MAX_DATA AS ( SELECT A.CNTL_ELMN_C ,ROUND(MAX(A.TONGJE_VAL),2) AS MAX_SCORE FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.CNTL_ELMN_C ), CUR_DATA AS ( SELECT A.CNTL_ELMN_C ,ROUND(AVG(A.TONGJE_VAL),2) AS CUR_SCORE FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.CNTL_ELMN_C ), PREV_DATA AS ( SELECT A.CNTL_ELMN_C ,ROUND(AVG(BF_TONGJE_VAL),2) AS PREV_SCORE FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.CNTL_ELMN_C ), -- 하위 5개 BOTTOMS AS ( SELECT CNTL_ELMN_C FROM ( SELECT C.CNTL_ELMN_C, C.CUR_SCORE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY C.CUR_SCORE ASC , C.CNTL_ELMN_C ) AS RN FROM CUR_DATA C ) WHERE RN <= 5 ), MERGE_DATA AS ( SELECT E.CNTL_ELMN_C, NVL(MX.MAX_SCORE, 0) AS MAX_SCORE, NVL(CU.CUR_SCORE, 0) AS CUR_SCORE, NVL(PV.PREV_SCORE, 0) AS PREV_SCORE FROM BOTTOMS E LEFT JOIN MAX_DATA MX ON MX.CNTL_ELMN_C = E.CNTL_ELMN_C LEFT JOIN CUR_DATA CU ON CU.CNTL_ELMN_C = E.CNTL_ELMN_C LEFT JOIN PREV_DATA PV ON PV.CNTL_ELMN_C = E.CNTL_ELMN_C )
SELECT NVL('[' || LISTAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'RISK_TYPE' VALUE ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = CNTL_ELMN_C AND GRP_C = 'P003' ), 'MAX_SCORE' VALUE MAX_SCORE, 'CUR_SCORE' VALUE CUR_SCORE, 'PREV_SCORE' VALUE PREV_SCORE ), ',' )WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY CUR_SCORE ASC , CNTL_ELMN_C ) || ']','[]') AS JSON_RESULT FROM MERGE_DATA
SELECT BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , EXP_FIX_YN AS SCHD_FIX_YN /* 사례확정여부 */ FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M /* RBA 위험평가 일정 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE KRBA_ML_EXP_I /* RBA 자금세탁사례조회 */ SET SRC_TP_C = #{SRC_TP_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 출처유형코드 */ , SRC_DTL_INFO = #{SRC_DTL_INFO ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 출처상세정보 */ , ML_EXP_TITE = #{ML_EXP_TITE ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 자금세탁사례제목 */ , ML_EXP_CTNT = #{ML_EXP_CTNT ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 자금세탁사례내용 */ , RSK_CAUS_CTNT = #{RSK_CAUS_CTNT ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 위험원인내용 */ , REL_NAT_NM = #{REL_NAT_NM ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 관련국가명 */ , REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C = #{REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 관련국가위험유형코드 */ , CUST_DWL_TP_C = #{CUST_DWL_TP_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객주거유형코드 */ , CUST_ASS_SCAL_C = #{CUST_ASS_SCAL_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객자산규모코드 */ , CUST_OCP_G_C = #{CUST_OCP_G_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객직업구분코드 */ , CUST_UPSL_G_C = #{CUST_UPSL_G_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객업종구분코드 */ , CUST_INDV_PCUL_C = #{CUST_INDV_PCUL_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객개인특성코드 */ , CUST_CORP_PCUL_C = #{CUST_CORP_PCUL_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객법인특성코드 */ , CUST_RELR_TP_C = #{CUST_RELR_TP_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객관련자유형코드 */ , PROD_LN_C = #{PROD_LN_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품여신코드 */ , PROD_INSU_C = #{PROD_INSU_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품보험코드 */ , PROD_INV_C = #{PROD_INV_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품투자코드 */ , PROD_RDAMT_G_C = #{PROD_RDAMT_G_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품입출금구분코드 */ , PROD_TRN_SCAL = #{PROD_TRN_SCAL ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품거래규모 */ , PROD_TRN_PCUL_C = #{PROD_TRN_PCUL_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품거래특성코드 */ , ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C = #{ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 가입채널보험코드 */ , ENTR_CHNL_LN_C = #{ENTR_CHNL_LN_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 가입채널여신코드 */ , PAY_CHNL_C = #{PAY_CHNL_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 납입채널코드 */ , REL_F_CRIM_C = #{REL_F_CRIM_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 관련전제범죄코드 */ , REL_FNCO_C = #{REL_FNCO_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 관련금융회사코드 */ , SSPS_TRN_TP_C = #{SSPS_TRN_TP_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 의심거래유형코드 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 기준년도 */ AND SNO = #{SNO ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 순번 */

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M SET EXP_FIX_YN = #{SCHD_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --여부 1은 확정 0은 진행 ,EXP_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 ,EXP_FIX_JKW_NO = #{SCHD_FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --확정된사람 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도
mapper.select: SELECT /* RBA_50_05_09_01_selectExpsi */ ROUND(AVG(T) * 0.5) M_RSK_CNT , ROUND(AVG(T)) H_RSK_CNT FROM (SELECT AVG(T1) T FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C) T1 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE RSK_CATG = '1' AND EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1) A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T2) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_DWL_TP_C) T2 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_DWL_TP_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T3) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_ASS_SCAL_C) T3 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '02') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_ASS_SCAL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T4) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_OCP_G_C) T4 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '03') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_OCP_G_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T5) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_UPSL_G_C) T5 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '04' ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_UPSL_G_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T6) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_INDV_PCUL_C) T6 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '05') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_INDV_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T7) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_CORP_PCUL_C) T7 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '06') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_CORP_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T8) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(PROD_TRN_PCUL_C) T8 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '3' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.PROD_TRN_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T9) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C) T9 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T10) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(ENTR_CHNL_LN_C) T10 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '02') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.ENTR_CHNL_LN_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T11) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(PAY_CHNL_C) T11 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '03') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.PAY_CHNL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M ) M WHERE 1=1

SELECT BAS_YYYY , RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT , EXPS_CNT , EXPS_GD_C , J_VALT_GD_C , (CASE WHEN J_VALT_GD_C = '1' THEN '1' WHEN J_VALT_GD_C = '2' THEN CASE WHEN EXPS_GD_C = '3' THEN '3' ELSE '2' END ELSE '3' END) RSK_LVL_C FROM (SELECT A.BAS_YYYY , M.RSK_CATG , M.RSK_FAC , M.RSK_EVT , EXPS_CNT , (CASE WHEN EXPS_CNT >= H_RSK_CNT THEN '3' WHEN EXPS_CNT >= M_RSK_CNT THEN '2' ELSE '1' END) EXPS_GD_C , J_VALT_GD_C FROM (SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C) EXPS_CNT FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '1' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_DWL_TP_C) T2 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_DWL_TP_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_ASS_SCAL_C) T3 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '02') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_ASS_SCAL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_OCP_G_C) T4 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC,RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '03') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_OCP_G_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_UPSL_G_C) T5 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '04') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_UPSL_G_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_INDV_PCUL_C) T6 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '05') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_INDV_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_CORP_PCUL_C) T7 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '06') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_CORP_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.PROD_TRN_PCUL_C) T8 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '3' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.PROD_TRN_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C) T9 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT , COUNT(ENTR_CHNL_LN_C) T10 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '02') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.ENTR_CHNL_LN_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT , COUNT(PAY_CHNL_C) T11 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '03') A JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.PAY_CHNL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT ) M JOIN (SELECT M.BAS_YYYY , RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT , J_VALT_GD_C , H_RSK_CNT , M_RSK_CNT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_M M JOIN KRBA_EXPS_I A ON M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY WHERE M.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) A ON M.RSK_CATG = A.RSK_CATG AND M.RSK_FAC = A.RSK_FAC AND M.RSK_EVT = A.RSK_EVT WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY RSK_CATG, RSK_FAC,RSK_EVT ) M WHERE 1=1

SELECT T01.* , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE HGRK_DTL_C='RI01' AND USYN = '1') CA_CNT01 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE HGRK_DTL_C='RI02' AND USYN = '1') CA_CNT02 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE HGRK_DTL_C='RI03' AND USYN = '1') CA_CNT03 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE HGRK_DTL_C='RI04' AND USYN = '1') CA_CNT04 FROM (SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고위험 국가' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0101 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고위험 국가' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0101_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고위험 국가' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0101_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고위험 업종' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0201 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고위험 업종' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0201_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고위험 업종' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0201_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고위험 산업' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0202 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고위험 산업' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0202_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고위험 산업' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0202_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '외국인' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0203 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '외국인' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0203_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '외국인' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0203_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '외국법인' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0204 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '외국법인' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0204_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '외국법인' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0204_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '비영리단체' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0205 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '비영리단체' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0205_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '비영리단체' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0205_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '미성년자' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0206 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '미성년자' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0206_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '미성년자' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0206_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '비거주자' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0207 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '비거주자' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0207_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '비거주자' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0207_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고액자산가' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0208 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고액자산가' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0208_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고액자산가' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0208_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '사고이력보유고객' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0209 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '사고이력보유고객' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0209_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '사고이력보유고객' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0209_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '일회성 금융거래' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0301 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '일회성 금융거래' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0301_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '일회성 금융거래' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0301_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '대리인거래' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0302 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '대리인거래' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0302_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '대리인거래' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0302_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고액거래' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0303 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고액거래' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0303_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '고액거래' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0303_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '현금거래' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0304 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '현금거래' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0304_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '현금거래' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0304_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '수표거래' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0305 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '수표거래' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0305_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '수표거래' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0305_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '야간거래' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0306 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '야간거래' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0306_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '야간거래' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0306_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '다수거래' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0307 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '다수거래' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0307_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '다수거래' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0307_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '비대면 채널' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0401 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '비대면 채널' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0401_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '비대면 채널' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0401_B , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '제3자 채널' THEN DTL_C_NM END ) AS RI0402 , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '제3자 채널' THEN DTL_C END ) AS RI0402_A , MAX(CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM = '제3자 채널' THEN HGRK_DTL_C END ) AS RI0402_B FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C='R310' AND USYN = '1' ) T01

SELECT T01.* , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE HGRK_DTL_C='RI01' AND USYN = '1') CA_CNT01 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE HGRK_DTL_C='RI02' AND USYN = '1') CA_CNT02 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE HGRK_DTL_C='RI03' AND USYN = '1') CA_CNT03 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE HGRK_DTL_C='RI04' AND USYN = '1') CA_CNT04 FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DTL_C ,DTL_C_NM ,HGRK_DTL_C FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C='R310' AND USYN = '1' ) Pivot ( MAX(DTL_C_NM), MAX(DTL_C) A, MAX(HGRK_DTL_C) B For DTL_C IN ('RI0101' AS RI0101,'RI0201' AS RI0201,'RI0202' AS RI0202,'RI0203' AS RI0203,'RI0204' AS RI0204,'RI0205' AS RI0205,'RI0206' AS RI0206 ,'RI0207' AS RI0207,'RI0208' AS RI0208,'RI0209' AS RI0209,'RI0301' AS RI0301,'RI0302' AS RI0302,'RI0303' AS RI0303, 'RI0304' AS RI0304,'RI0305' AS RI0305,'RI0306' AS RI0306,'RI0307' AS RI0307,'RI0401' AS RI0401,'RI0402' AS RI0402) ) ) T01

SELECT VALT_BRNO, (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = VALT_BRNO) AS VALT_BRNM , RSK_VALT_PNT, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY RSK_VALT_PNT ASC) AS RANK FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R WHERE 1=1
AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM < 4 ) WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS N_YYMM ,( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM < 4 ) WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS O_YYMM ,( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM < 4 ) WHERE NUM = 1 )AS C_YYMM FROM DUAL

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over (order by T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SRBA_V_HRSK_R T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER

SELECT AAA.* ,(SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD='M034' AND CNTNT =AAA.GDS_NO) AS GDS_CD_NM ,(SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD='M044' AND CNTNT =AAA.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_CD_NM ,(SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD='M045' AND CNTNT =AAA.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_CD_NM ,(SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD='M046' AND CNTNT =AAA.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_CD_NM , TO_CHAR(DL_AMT, 'FM999,999,999,999') AS DL_AMT , TO_CHAR(DL_AMT, 'FM999,999,999,999') AS CSH_AMT , TO_CHAR(DL_AMT, 'FM999,999,999,999') AS CHCK_AMT FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM , AA.* FROM ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM , A.PROC_FLD_C , A.PROC_LGDV_C , A.PROC_MDDV_C , A.PROC_SMDV_C , A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_INDCT , A.VALT_BRNO , A.GNL_AC_NO , A.GDS_NO , B.GDS_CD , A.DL_DT , A.DL_SQ , B.AML_CUST_ID , C.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO , DL_CCD , DL_CHNNL_CD , DL_MD_CCD , DL_TYP_CD , DL_WY_CD , C.SMRY_TYP_CD , '' AS SMRY_TYP_NM , DL_AMT , CSH_AMT, CHCK_AMT , C.DR_DT , C.DR_TIME FROM SRBA_V_MM_TRN_I A, NIC17B B, SRBA_TRN_I C WHERE 1=1 AND A.GNL_AC_NO=B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.GDS_NO=B.GDS_NO AND A.VALT_YYMM = C.VALT_YYMM AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = #{PROC_LGDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = #{PROC_MDDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.RSK_CATG = #{RSK_CATG, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.RSK_FAC = #{RSK_FAC, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.RSK_INDCT = #{RSK_INDCT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY DL_DT ) AA ) AAA
WHERE AAA.NUM BETWEEN #{stRowNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND #{edRowNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

WITH TMP AS ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, VALT_CNT, H_PNT AS RSK_VALT_PNT , A.PROC_FLD_C, A.PROC_LGDV_C, A.PROC_MDDV_C, A.PROC_SMDV_C, A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_INDCT ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R304' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_LGDV_C ) AS PROC_LGDV_NM ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R305' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_MDDV_C ) AS PROC_MDDV_NM ,(SELECT PROC_SMDV_NM FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M WHERE PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS PROC_SMDV_NM ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R309' AND DTL_C= A.RSK_CATG ) AS RSK_CATG_NM ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R310' AND DTL_C= A.RSK_FAC ) AS RSK_FAC_NM ,(SELECT RSK_INDCT_NM FROM SRBA_V_RSK_JIPYO_M WHERE RSK_INDCT = A.RSK_INDCT AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS RSK_INDCT_NM FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_R A, SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R B, (SELECT SUBSTR(TGT_TRN_SDT,1,6) AS TGT_TRN_SDT, SUBSTR(TGT_TRN_EDT,1,6) AS TGT_TRN_EDT FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'E01' ) C WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.VALT_BRNO = B.VALT_BRNO AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND A.RSK_INDCT = B.RSK_INDCT AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.RSK_INDCT = #{RSK_INDCT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_YYMM BETWEEN C.TGT_TRN_SDT AND C.TGT_TRN_EDT ) SELECT * FROM TMP UNION ALL SELECT '평균' AS VALT_YYMM, ROUND(SUM(VALT_CNT)/ COUNT(VALT_CNT),2) AS VALT_CNT, ROUND(SUM(RSK_VALT_PNT)/ COUNT(VALT_CNT),2) AS RSK_VALT_PNT ,'' AS PROC_FLD_C, '' AS PROC_LGDV_C, '' AS PROC_MDDV_C, '' AS PROC_SMDV_C, '' AS RSK_CATG, '' AS RSK_FAC, '' AS RSK_INDCT ,'' AS PROC_LGDV_NM, '' AS PROC_MDDV_NM, '' AS PROC_SMDV_NM, '' AS RSK_CATG_NM, '' AS RSK_FAC_NM, '' AS RSK_INDCT_NM FROM TMP

WITH MAX_DATA AS( SELECT F.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, MAX(F.FINAL_VAL) AS MAX_FINAL_VAL, MAX(F.RISK_VAL) AS MAX_RISK_VAL, MAX(F.TONGJE_VAL) AS MAX_TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY F.BAS_YYMM ) ,CUR_DATA AS ( SELECT F.BAS_YYMM, F.FINAL_VAL AS CUR_FINAL_VAL, F.RISK_VAL AS CUR_RISK_VAL, F.TONGJE_VAL AS CUR_TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND F.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ), PREV_DATA AS ( SELECT F.BAS_YYMM, F.BF_FINAL_VAL AS BF_FINAL_VAL, F.BF_RISK_VAL AS BF_RISK_VAL, F.BF_TONGJE_VAL AS BF_TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL F WHERE F.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND F.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ), UNIONED AS (
SELECT '잔여위험' AS RISK_TYPE, MAX_FINAL_VAL AS MAX_VAL, CUR_FINAL_VAL AS CUR_VAL, BF_FINAL_VAL AS BF_VAL FROM MAX_DATA MX LEFT JOIN CUR_DATA CU ON CU.BAS_YYMM = MX.BAS_YYMM LEFT JOIN PREV_DATA PV ON PV.BAS_YYMM = MX.BAS_YYMM
UNION ALL
SELECT '고유위험' AS RISK_TYPE, MAX_RISK_VAL AS MAX_VAL, CUR_RISK_VAL AS CUR_VAL, BF_RISK_VAL AS BF_VAL FROM MAX_DATA MX LEFT JOIN CUR_DATA CU ON CU.BAS_YYMM = MX.BAS_YYMM LEFT JOIN PREV_DATA PV ON PV.BAS_YYMM = MX.BAS_YYMM
UNION ALL
SELECT '통제효과성' AS RISK_TYPE, MAX_TONGJE_VAL AS MAX_VAL, CUR_TONGJE_VAL AS CUR_VAL, BF_TONGJE_VAL AS BF_VAL FROM MAX_DATA MX LEFT JOIN CUR_DATA CU ON CU.BAS_YYMM = MX.BAS_YYMM LEFT JOIN PREV_DATA PV ON PV.BAS_YYMM = MX.BAS_YYMM
)SELECT '[' || LISTAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'RISK_TYPE' VALUE RISK_TYPE, 'MAX_VAL' VALUE NVL(MAX_VAL,0), 'CUR_VAL' VALUE NVL(CUR_VAL,0), 'BF_VAL' VALUE NVL(BF_VAL,0) ), ',' ) || ']' AS JSON_RESULT FROM UNIONED

WITH BAS_LST AS (
SELECT ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM < 4 ) WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS N_YYMM ,( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM < 4 ) WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS O_YYMM ,( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM < 4 ) WHERE NUM = 1 )AS C_YYMM FROM DUAL
) SELECT T21.VALT_BRNO , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = T21.VALT_BRNO ) VALT_BRNM , T21.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = T21.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD) HG_VALT_BRNM , T21.CATG1 AS CATG11 , T21.CATG2 AS CATG12 , T21.CATG3 AS CATG13 , T21.CATG4 AS CATG14 , T21.CATG5 AS CATG15 , T21.VALT_PNT AS VALT_PNT1 , T21.RSK_VALT_RT AS RSK_VALT_RT1 , T22.CATG1 AS CATG21 , T22.CATG2 AS CATG22 , T22.CATG3 AS CATG23 , T22.CATG4 AS CATG24 , T22.CATG5 AS CATG25 , T22.VALT_PNT AS VALT_PNT2 , T22.RSK_VALT_RT AS RSK_VALT_RT2 , T23.CATG1 AS CATG31 , T23.CATG2 AS CATG32 , T23.CATG3 AS CATG33 , T23.CATG4 AS CATG34 , T23.CATG5 AS CATG35 , T23.VALT_PNT AS VALT_PNT3 , T23.RSK_VALT_RT AS RSK_VALT_RT3 , (SELECT N_YYMM FROM BAS_LST) AS N_YYMM , (SELECT O_YYMM FROM BAS_LST) AS O_YYMM , (SELECT C_YYMM FROM BAS_LST) AS C_YYMM FROM ( SELECT T11.VALT_BRNO , (SELECT HG_RNK_DPRT_CD FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = T11.VALT_BRNO) HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , SUM(T11.CATG1) AS CATG1 , SUM(T11.CATG2) AS CATG2 , SUM(T11.CATG3) AS CATG3 , SUM(T11.CATG4) AS CATG4 , SUM(T11.CATG5) AS CATG5 , SUM(T12.VALT_PNT) AS VALT_PNT , ROUND(SUM(T12.RSK_VALT_RT) / COUNT(T12.RSK_VALT_RT)) AS RSK_VALT_RT
FROM ( SELECT T01.BAS_YYMM,T01.VALT_BRNO,T01.PROC_FLD_C, T01.PROC_LGDV_C , T01.PROC_MDDV_C,T01.PROC_SMDV_C ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-01' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG1 --국가 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-02' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG2 --고객 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-03' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG3 --상품 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-04' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG4 --채널 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-05' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG5 --채널 FROM SRBA_V_RSK_R_CATG T01 WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T01.BAS_YYMM,T01.VALT_BRNO,T01.PROC_FLD_C, T01.PROC_LGDV_C , T01.PROC_MDDV_C,T01.PROC_SMDV_C ) T11, SRBA_V_LST_RSK_R T12 WHERE 1=1 AND T11.BAS_YYMM = T12.BAS_YYMM AND T11.VALT_BRNO = T12.VALT_BRNO AND T11.PROC_FLD_C = T12.PROC_FLD_C AND T11.PROC_FLD_C = T12.PROC_FLD_C AND T11.PROC_LGDV_C = T12.PROC_LGDV_C AND T11.PROC_MDDV_C = T12.PROC_MDDV_C AND T11.PROC_SMDV_C = T12.PROC_SMDV_C --AND T11.VALT_BRNO = '010' AND T11.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT C_YYMM FROM BAS_LST) GROUP BY T11.VALT_BRNO )T21 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T11.VALT_BRNO , (SELECT HG_RNK_DPRT_CD FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = T11.VALT_BRNO) HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , SUM(T11.CATG1) AS CATG1 , SUM(T11.CATG2) AS CATG2 , SUM(T11.CATG3) AS CATG3 , SUM(T11.CATG4) AS CATG4 , SUM(T11.CATG5) AS CATG5 , SUM(T12.VALT_PNT) AS VALT_PNT , ROUND(SUM(T12.RSK_VALT_RT) / COUNT(T12.RSK_VALT_RT)) AS RSK_VALT_RT
FROM ( SELECT T01.BAS_YYMM,T01.VALT_BRNO,T01.PROC_FLD_C, T01.PROC_LGDV_C , T01.PROC_MDDV_C,T01.PROC_SMDV_C ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-01' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG1 --국가 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-02' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG2 --고객 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-03' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG3 --상품 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-04' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG4 --채널 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-05' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG5 --채널 FROM SRBA_V_RSK_R_CATG T01 WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T01.BAS_YYMM,T01.VALT_BRNO,T01.PROC_FLD_C, T01.PROC_LGDV_C , T01.PROC_MDDV_C,T01.PROC_SMDV_C ) T11, SRBA_V_LST_RSK_R T12 WHERE 1=1 AND T11.BAS_YYMM = T12.BAS_YYMM AND T11.VALT_BRNO = T12.VALT_BRNO AND T11.PROC_FLD_C = T12.PROC_FLD_C AND T11.PROC_FLD_C = T12.PROC_FLD_C AND T11.PROC_LGDV_C = T12.PROC_LGDV_C AND T11.PROC_MDDV_C = T12.PROC_MDDV_C AND T11.PROC_SMDV_C = T12.PROC_SMDV_C --AND T11.VALT_BRNO = '010' AND T11.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT O_YYMM FROM BAS_LST) GROUP BY T11.VALT_BRNO ) T22 ON T21.VALT_BRNO = T22.VALT_BRNO
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T11.VALT_BRNO , (SELECT HG_RNK_DPRT_CD FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = T11.VALT_BRNO) HG_RNK_DPRT_CD , SUM(T11.CATG1) AS CATG1 , SUM(T11.CATG2) AS CATG2 , SUM(T11.CATG3) AS CATG3 , SUM(T11.CATG4) AS CATG4 , SUM(T11.CATG5) AS CATG5 , SUM(T12.VALT_PNT) AS VALT_PNT , ROUND(SUM(T12.RSK_VALT_RT) / COUNT(T12.RSK_VALT_RT)) AS RSK_VALT_RT
FROM ( SELECT T01.BAS_YYMM,T01.VALT_BRNO,T01.PROC_FLD_C, T01.PROC_LGDV_C , T01.PROC_MDDV_C,T01.PROC_SMDV_C ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-01' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG1 --국가 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-02' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG2 --고객 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-03' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG3 --상품 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-04' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG4 --채널 ,SUM(CASE WHEN T01.RSK_CATG = 'RC-05' THEN TO_CHAR(T01.VALT_PNT) ELSE '0' END) AS CATG5 --거래 FROM SRBA_V_RSK_R_CATG T01 WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T01.BAS_YYMM,T01.VALT_BRNO,T01.PROC_FLD_C, T01.PROC_LGDV_C , T01.PROC_MDDV_C,T01.PROC_SMDV_C ) T11, SRBA_V_LST_RSK_R T12 WHERE 1=1 AND T11.BAS_YYMM = T12.BAS_YYMM AND T11.VALT_BRNO = T12.VALT_BRNO AND T11.PROC_FLD_C = T12.PROC_FLD_C AND T11.PROC_LGDV_C = T12.PROC_LGDV_C AND T11.PROC_MDDV_C = T12.PROC_MDDV_C AND T11.PROC_SMDV_C = T12.PROC_SMDV_C --AND T11.VALT_BRNO = '010' AND T11.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT N_YYMM FROM BAS_LST) GROUP BY T11.VALT_BRNO ) T23 ON T21.VALT_BRNO = T23.VALT_BRNO WHERE 1=1
AND T21.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT MAX(FINAL_VAL) AS VAL_H , MIN(FINAL_VAL) AS VAL_L , ROUND(MIN(FINAL_VAL) + ( MAX(FINAL_VAL) - MIN(FINAL_VAL) )/5) AS STEP1 , ROUND(MIN(FINAL_VAL) + 2*( MAX(FINAL_VAL) - MIN(FINAL_VAL) )/5) AS STEP2 , ROUND(MIN(FINAL_VAL) + 3*( MAX(FINAL_VAL) - MIN(FINAL_VAL) )/5) AS STEP3 , ROUND(MIN(FINAL_VAL) + 4*( MAX(FINAL_VAL) - MIN(FINAL_VAL) )/5) AS STEP4 , ROUND(MIN(FINAL_VAL) + 5*( MAX(FINAL_VAL) - MIN(FINAL_VAL) )/5) AS STEP5 FROM SRBA_FINAL_EVAL WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

INSERT INTO SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I( BAS_YYMM, LV1, LV2, LV3, IMPRV_STRG_DT, IMPRV_STRG_CTNT, IMPRV_S_C, BRNO, DR_DT, DR_TIME,
CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO )VALUES( #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{LV1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0',
#{LV3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
'ALL',
#{IMPRV_STRG_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_STRG_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
(SELECT DEP_DESC FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_TITLE = #{BRNO_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'),
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM, -- 평가회차 B.RSK_CATG1_C AS LV1, ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = B.RSK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001' ) AS LV1_NM, -- 위험분류(Lv.1) '' AS LV2, '' AS LV2_NM, B.RSK_ELMT_C AS LV3, ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = B.RSK_ELMT_C AND GRP_C = 'S003' ) AS LV3_NM, -- 위험요소 DECODE(C.MOFC_BRN_CCD, 'M', '본부부서', '영업점' ) AS MOFC_BRNO_NM, -- 부점 구분 A.BRNO, -- 소관부점 (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.BRNO) AS BRNO_NM, A.IMPRV_STRG_DT, -- 개선 요청 일자 A.IMPRV_STRG_CTNT, -- 개선 요청 사항 A.IMPRV_RSLT_DT, A.IMPRV_RSLT_CTNT, A.IMPRV_S_C, -- 개선 이행 상태 A.GYLJ_S_C -- 결재상태 FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I A INNER JOIN SRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M_SCORE B ON A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND ( A.LV3 = B.RSK_ELMT_C OR A.LV3 IS NULL) AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO
INNER JOIN NIC41B C ON B.BRNO = C.DPRT_CD AND A.BRNO = C.DPRT_CD
WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL
SELECT A.BAS_YYMM, -- 평가회차 A.LV1, ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.LV1 AND GRP_C = 'P001' ) AS LV1_NM, -- 통제분류(Lv.1) A.LV2, ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.LV2 AND GRP_C = 'P002' ) AS LV2_NM, A.LV3, ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.LV3 AND GRP_C = 'P003' ) AS LV3_NM, -- 위험분류 DECODE(C.MOFC_BRN_CCD, 'M', '본부부서', '영업점' ) AS MOFC_BRNO_NM, -- 부점 구분 A.BRNO, -- 소관부점 (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.BRNO) AS BRNO_NM, A.IMPRV_STRG_DT, -- 개선 요청 일자 A.IMPRV_STRG_CTNT, -- 개선 요청 사항 A.IMPRV_RSLT_DT, A.IMPRV_RSLT_CTNT, A.IMPRV_S_C, -- 개선 이행 상태 A.GYLJ_S_C -- 결재상태 FROM SRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I A INNER JOIN SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_SCORE B ON A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.LV1 = B.CNTL_CATG1_C AND A.LV2 = B.CNTL_CATG2_C AND A.LV3 = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO INNER JOIN NIC41B C ON B.BRNO = C.DPRT_CD AND A.BRNO = C.DPRT_CD )T WHERE 1=1 AND T.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.BRNO =(SELECT DEP_DESC FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_TITLE = #{BRNO_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND T.LV1 = (SELECT DTL_C FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C IN ('S001','P001') AND DTL_C_NM = #{LV1_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND T.LV3 = (SELECT DTL_C FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C IN('P003','S003')AND DTL_C_NM LIKE '%' || #{LV3_NM} || '%')
SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS MAX_BAY_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912'
SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS MAX_BAY_YYMM FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912'

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS MOFY_POSSIBLE_YN FROM ( SELECT AA.*, (SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C=AA.GYLJ_G_C AND SNO='1') AS FIRST_ROLE_ID FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM,A.VALT_BRNO,A.GYLJ_S_C,GYLJ_ID,GYLJ_JKW_NO,GYLJ_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT MAX(GYLJ_G_C) FROM SRBA_GYLJ_H WHERE GYLJ_ID=A.GYLJ_ID) AS GYLJ_G_C FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM,VALT_BRNO,GYLJ_S_C,GYLJ_ID,GYLJ_JKW_NO,GYLJ_ROLE_ID ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY VALT_BRNO ORDER BY GYLJ_ID DESC) RNUM FROM SRBA_V_PROC_GYLJ WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) A WHERE RNUM =1 )AA )AAA WHERE AAA.GYLJ_ROLE_ID != FIRST_ROLE_ID
mapper.update: INSERT INTO SRBA_V_PROC_M( BAS_YYMM, PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, PROC_SMDV_NM, RSK_CAUS_CTNT, USYN, VALT_METH_C, NOTE_CTNT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO )VALUES( #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_FLD_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_LGDV_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_MDDV_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_SMDV_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_SMDV_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{RSK_CAUS_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{USYN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_METH_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{NOTE_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT GYLJ_ROLE_ID AS CODE,ROLE_NM AS NAME FROM C_GYLJ_M A, C_GYLJ_D B ,C_ROLE C WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C=B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C IN ('W01','W02') AND B.GYLJ_ROLE_ID=C.ROLE_ID ORDER BY GYLJ_ROLE_ID
