mapper.update: MERGE INTO SRBA_V_PROC_BRNO USING DUAL ON (BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PROC_FLD_C = #{PROC_FLD_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PROC_LGDV_C = #{PROC_LGDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PROC_MDDV_C = #{PROC_MDDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT_YN = #{TGT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYMM, PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, VALT_BRNO, TGT_YN, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_FLD_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_LGDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_MDDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TGT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO SRBA_V_PROC_GYLJ A USING DUAL ON (BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET GYLJ_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GYLJ_JKW_NO = #{GYLJ_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GYLJ_ROLE_ID = CASE WHEN #{GYLJ_FLAG, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = '0' THEN (SELECT NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = 1) WHEN #{GYLJ_FLAG, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = '1' THEN (SELECT RTN_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = A.GYLJ_ROLE_ID AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) ELSE (SELECT NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = A.GYLJ_ROLE_ID AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) END , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, GYLJ_ID, GYLJ_DT, GYLJ_S_C, GYLJ_JKW_NO, GYLJ_ROLE_ID, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), #{GYLJ_S_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{GYLJ_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CASE WHEN #{GYLJ_FLAG, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = '0' THEN (SELECT NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = 1) WHEN #{GYLJ_FLAG, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = '1' THEN (SELECT RTN_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = A.GYLJ_ROLE_ID AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) ELSE (SELECT NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = A.GYLJ_ROLE_ID AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) END , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT C.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID /* 다음 ROLE_ID */ , C.RTN_ROLE_ID /* 반려ROLE_ID */ FROM C_GYLJ_M B , C_GYLJ_D C WHERE 1=1 AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.GYLJ_ROLE_ID= #{ROLE_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , A.GYLJ_SER AS GYLJ_SER /* 결재일련번호 */ , (SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = A.ROLE_ID) AS ROLE_NM /* 결재단계 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R325' AND DTL_C = A.GYLJ_S_C) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 결재상태 */ , A.GYLJ_DT AS GYLJ_DT /* 결재일자 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_JKW_NM /* 처리자 */ , (SELECT E.DPRT_NM FROM C_USER D , C_DEP_INFO F , NIC41B E WHERE D.DEP_ID = F.DEP_ID AND F.DEP_DESC = E.DPRT_CD AND D.LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_DEP_NM /* 처리지점 */ , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT /* 사유 */ , A.DR_DT||A.DR_TIME AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 처리일시 */ FROM SRBA_GYLJ_H A /* RBA 결재이력 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY A.GYLJ_SER

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over (order by T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SRBA_ML_EXP_I T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.SNO = #{SNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA_ML_EXP_I SET ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SNO = #{SNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(SNO),0)+1 AS SNO FROM SRBA_ML_EXP_I
SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA_ML_EXP_I WHERE IN_DT = #{IN_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = #{SNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO, FILE_SER, DATA_G, FILE_POS, LOSC_FILE_NM, PHSC_FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, DOWNLOAD_CNT, DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C /* 결재선구분코드 */ ,A.GYLJ_LINE_NM /* 결재선명 */ ,B.SNO /* 순번 */ ,B.GYLJ_ROLE_ID /* 결재ROLE_ID */ ,C.ROLE_NM AS GYLJ_ROLE_NM ,B.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID /* 다음결재ROLE_ID */ ,D.ROLE_NM AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_NM ,B.RTN_ROLE_ID /* 반려ROLE_ID */ ,E.ROLE_NM AS RTN_ROLE_NM FROM C_GYLJ_M A LEFT JOIN C_GYLJ_D B ON A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C LEFT JOIN C_ROLE C ON B.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = C.ROLE_ID LEFT JOIN C_ROLE D ON B.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID = D.ROLE_ID LEFT JOIN C_ROLE E ON B.RTN_ROLE_ID = E.ROLE_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND B.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{GYLJ_ROLE_ID} AND A.USYN = 1
SELECT LPAD(C_GYLJ_H_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 9, '0') AS MAX_GYLJ_ID FROM DUAL

SELECT M.BAS_YYMM , M.RSK_CATG1_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = M.RSK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001' ) AS RSK_CATG1_C_NM , M.RSK_CATG2_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = M.RSK_CATG2_C AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS RSK_CATG2_C_NM , M.RSK_ELMT_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = M.RSK_ELMT_C AND GRP_C = 'S003' ) AS RSK_ELMT_C_NM , M.RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT , M.RSK_CTNT , M.RSK_VALT_ITEM , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = M.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , M.RSK_VALT_CAL_STD --DECODE( RSK_VALT_CAL_STD , '1', '고객수', '거래금액' ) AS , DECODE( M.RSK_VALT_CAL_STD , '1', '고객수', '거래금액' ) AS RSK_VALT_CAL_STD_NM , M.EDD_YN , M.INDV_YN , M.CORP_YN , M.I_MODEL_YN , M.B_MODEL_YN , M.USE_YN , M.RA_CHG_DT , M.COMMENT_CTNT , CASE WHEN E.RA_ST_INTV_VAL IS NULL THEN '' ELSE E.RA_ST_INTV_VAL || ' ~ ' || E.RA_ET_INTV_VAL END AS RA_INTV_VAL , E.RA_ITEM_CODE , CASE WHEN E.RA_ST_INTV_VAL IS NULL THEN M.RSK_PNT ELSE E.RA_ITEM_SCR END AS RSK_PNT FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M M , SRBA_ETC_I E WHERE M.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND M.RSK_ELMT_C = #{RSK_ELMT_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND M.BAS_YYMM = E.BAS_YYMM(+) AND M.RSK_ELMT_C = E.RSK_ELMT_C(+)
AND E.RA_ITEM_CODE = #{RA_ITEM_CODE, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT B.USER_ID , B.DEP_ID , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_ID = B.DEP_ID) AS BRN_NM , B.POSITION_CODE , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = B.POSITION_CODE) AS POSITION_NAME , B.USER_NM , B.LOGIN_ID , B.USER_PWD , B.USER_IP , B.SOC_NO , B.EMAIL , B.CELL_PHONE , B.ACTIVE_YN , B.OFF_DUTY_YN , B.LAST_USE_DATE , B.LAST_USE_IP , B.PWD_FAIL_COUNT , B.CRE_ID , B.CRE_DT , B.UPD_ID , B.UPD_DT , B.DEL_YN , B.DEL_ID , B.DEL_DT , B.VALID_START_DT , B.VALID_END_DT , B.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP , B.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP , B.MOBL_PHON_JNPR_NO_CRYP , B.EXNO1_PHON_ECNO_CRYP , B.EXNO1_CRYP , B.EXNO2_PHON_ECNO_CRYP , B.EXNO2_CRYP , B.PHON_AR_NO_CRYP , B.PHON_ECNO_CRYP , B.PHON_NO_CRYP , B.AML_ROLE_YN FROM C_USER B WHERE B.LOGIN_ID = #{LOGIN_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT SRBA_GYLJ_H_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS MAX_GYLJ_ID FROM DUAL

SELECT A.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , A.GYLJ_SER AS GYLJ_SER /* 결재일련번호 */ , (SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = A.ROLE_ID) AS ROLE_NM /* 결재단계 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R325' AND DTL_C = A.GYLJ_S_C) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 결재상태 */ , A.GYLJ_DT AS GYLJ_DT /* 결재일자 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_JKW_NM /* 처리자 */ , (SELECT E.DPRT_NM FROM C_USER D , C_DEP_INFO F , NIC41B E WHERE D.DEP_ID = F.DEP_ID AND F.DEP_DESC = E.DPRT_CD AND D.LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_DEP_NM /* 처리지점 */ , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT /* 사유 */ , A.DR_DT||A.DR_TIME AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 처리일시 */ FROM SRBA_GYLJ_H A /* RBA 결재이력 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY A.GYLJ_SER

SELECT A.BAS_YYMM, A.RSK_CATG, (SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R309' AND DTL_C= A.RSK_CATG ) AS RSK_CATG_NM , A.RSK_FAC, (SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R310' AND DTL_C= A.RSK_FAC ) AS RSK_FAC_NM , A.RSK_INDCT, A.RSK_INDCT_NM, A.DEDU_RSN, A.RSK_INDCT_CTNT, A.FRQ_C, A.JIPYO_OFFR, A.NOTE_CTNT, A.GYLJ_ID, A.GYLJ_DT, A.GYLJ_S_C, (SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R325' AND DTL_C= DECODE(A.GYLJ_S_C,NULL,0,A.GYLJ_S_C) ) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM , A.GYLJ_JKW_NO, A.GYLJ_ROLE_ID, A.DR_DT, A.DR_TIME, A.DR_OP_JKW_NO, A.CHG_DT, A.CHG_TIME, A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_V_RSK_JIPYO_M A WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS MAX_BAY_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912') AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{GYLJ_ROLE_ID}

SELECT A.BAS_YYMM, A.RSK_CATG, (SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R309' AND DTL_C= A.RSK_CATG ) AS RSK_CATG_NM , A.RSK_FAC, (SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R310' AND DTL_C= A.RSK_FAC ) AS RSK_FAC_NM , A.RSK_INDCT, A.RSK_INDCT_NM, A.DEDU_RSN, A.RSK_INDCT_CTNT, A.FRQ_C, A.JIPYO_OFFR, A.NOTE_CTNT, A.GYLJ_ID, A.GYLJ_DT, A.GYLJ_S_C, (SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R325' AND DTL_C= DECODE(A.GYLJ_S_C,NULL,0,A.GYLJ_S_C) ) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM , A.GYLJ_JKW_NO, A.GYLJ_ROLE_ID, A.DR_DT, A.DR_TIME, A.DR_OP_JKW_NO, A.CHG_DT, A.CHG_TIME, A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_V_RSK_JIPYO_M A WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS MAX_BAY_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912') AND (GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{GYLJ_ROLE_ID} OR GYLJ_S_C='0' OR GYLJ_S_C='11' OR GYLJ_S_C IS null)
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA_V_RSK_JIPYO_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RSK_CATG = #{RSK_CATG,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RSK_FAC = #{RSK_FAC,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT AA.BAS_YYMM ,DECODE( AA.RSK_CATG1_C , 'R5', 'B모델' , 'I모델' ) AS MODEL_NM ,AA.RSK_CATG1_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = AA.RSK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001' ) AS RSK_CATG1_C_NM ,AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM ,AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV ,AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP , CASE WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV ELSE AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP END AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX , BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT , CASE WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT,2) ELSE ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT,2) END AS RBA_WEIGHT , CASE WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ELSE AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT END AS RBA_WEIGHT_CHK ,CASE WHEN LENGTH(AA.CHG_DT) = 8 THEN ROUND(AA.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT,2) WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ,2) ELSE ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ,2) END AS RBA_FIN_WEIGHT ,AA.RBA_FIN_TVL -- batch에서 작성 ,AA.RBA_FIN_RE_VL -- batch에서 작성 ,CC.FIX_YN ,CC.FIX_YN_M ,CC.ING_STEP ,CC.ING_STEP_NM FROM SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M AA , ( SELECT --MAX항목 합산금액 BAS_YYMM ,SUM(CASE WHEN RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV ELSE RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP END ) AS RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT FROM SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ) BB , ( SELECT T01.BAS_YYMM , T01.FIX_YN , T02.FIX_YN AS FIX_YN_M , T02.ING_STEP , NVL((SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R343' AND DTL_C = T02.ING_STEP ),'일정정보입력') AS ING_STEP_NM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D T01 , SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M T02 WHERE T01.BAS_YYMM = T02.BAS_YYMM AND T01.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = '2.3' AND T01.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) CC WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.BAS_YYMM = BB.BAS_YYMM AND AA.BAS_YYMM = CC.BAS_YYMM(+) ORDER BY AA.RSK_CATG1_C, AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM

SELECT AA.BAS_YYMM ,DECODE( AA.RSK_CATG1_C , 'R5', 'B모델' , 'I모델' ) AS MODEL_NM ,AA.RSK_CATG1_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = AA.RSK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001' ) AS RSK_CATG1_C_NM ,AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM ,AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV ,AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP , CASE WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV ELSE AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP END AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX , BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT , CASE WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT,4) ELSE ROUND(AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT,4) END AS RBA_WEIGHT , CASE WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ELSE AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT END AS RBA_WEIGHT_CHK ,CASE WHEN TRIM(AA.DR_DT) <> '' THEN AA.RBA_FIN_WEIGHT WHEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ELSE AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP*100/BB.RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT END AS RBA_FIN_WEIGHT ,AA.RBA_FIN_TVL -- batch에서 작성 ,AA.RBA_FIN_RE_VL -- batch에서 작성 FROM SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M AA , ( SELECT --MAX항목 합산금액 BAS_YYMM ,SUM(CASE WHEN RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV > RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP THEN RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV ELSE RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP END ) AS RA_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT FROM SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = '202405' GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ) BB WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.BAS_YYMM = BB.BAS_YYMM ORDER BY AA.RSK_CATG1_C, AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM

WITH INDIV AS ( SELECT NUM , MODEL_NM , RA_RISK_CATG2 , CASE WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'I001' THEN 'R34201' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'I020' THEN 'R34217' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B001' THEN 'R34219' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B002' THEN 'R34220' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B003' THEN 'R34221' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B004' THEN 'R34222' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B005' THEN 'R34223' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B006' THEN 'R34224' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B007' THEN 'R34225' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B008' THEN 'R34226' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B009' THEN 'R34227' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B010' THEN 'R34228' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B011' THEN 'R34229' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B012' THEN 'R34230' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B013' THEN 'R34231' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B014' THEN 'R34232' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B015' THEN 'R34233' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B016' THEN 'R34234' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B017' THEN 'R34235' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B018' THEN 'R34236' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B019' THEN 'R34237' ELSE 'R34299' END AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_WGHT , POSITION_NAME FROM ( SELECT DECODE( SUBSTR(A.RA_ITEM_CD,1,1) , 'I', '01', '02' ) AS NUM , DECODE( SUBSTR(A.RA_ITEM_CD,1,1) , 'I', 'I모델', 'B모델' ) AS MODEL_NM , CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, A.RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY A.RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_RISK_CATG ELSE NULL END AS RA_RISK_CATG , CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, A.RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY A.RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_ITEM_A_WGHT ELSE NULL END AS RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = '02') AS POSITION_NAME FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = '01' AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'B' ORDER BY A.RA_SQ ) ) , CORP AS ( SELECT NUM , MODEL_NM , RA_RISK_CATG2 , CASE WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'I001' THEN 'R34201' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'I020' THEN 'R34217' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B001' THEN 'R34219' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B002' THEN 'R34220' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B003' THEN 'R34221' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B004' THEN 'R34222' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B005' THEN 'R34223' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B006' THEN 'R34224' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B007' THEN 'R34225' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B008' THEN 'R34226' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B009' THEN 'R34227' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B010' THEN 'R34228' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B011' THEN 'R34229' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B012' THEN 'R34230' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B013' THEN 'R34231' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B014' THEN 'R34232' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B015' THEN 'R34233' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B016' THEN 'R34234' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B017' THEN 'R34235' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B018' THEN 'R34236' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B019' THEN 'R34237' ELSE 'R34299' END AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_WGHT , POSITION_NAME FROM ( SELECT DECODE( SUBSTR(A.RA_ITEM_CD,1,1) , 'I', '01', '02' ) AS NUM , DECODE( SUBSTR(A.RA_ITEM_CD,1,1) , 'I', 'I모델', 'B모델' ) AS MODEL_NM , CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, A.RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY A.RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_RISK_CATG ELSE NULL END AS RA_RISK_CATG , CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, A.RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY A.RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_ITEM_A_WGHT ELSE NULL END AS RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = '02') AS POSITION_NAME FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = '02' AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'B' ORDER BY A.RA_SQ ) ) SELECT A.NUM , A.MODEL_NM , A.RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.RSK_VALT_ITEM , A.RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV , B.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP , CASE WHEN NVL(A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) > NVL(B.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) THEN NVL(A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) ELSE NVL(B.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) END AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX , CASE WHEN NVL(A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) > NVL(B.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) THEN ROUND(NVL(A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0)*100/TOT.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT,2) ELSE ROUND(NVL(B.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0)*100/TOT.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT, 2) END AS RBA_WEIGHT , CASE WHEN NVL(A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) > NVL(B.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) THEN NVL(A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0)*100/TOT.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ELSE NVL(B.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0)*100/TOT.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT END AS RBA_WEIGHT_CHK FROM INDIV A , CORP B , ( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(X.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) > NVL(Y.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) THEN NVL(X.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) ELSE NVL(Y.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) END ) AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT FROM (SELECT RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT FROM INDIV ) X , (SELECT RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT FROM CORP ) Y , ( SELECT RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM INDIV UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM CORP ) GROUP BY RSK_VALT_ITEM ) Z WHERE Z.RSK_VALT_ITEM = X.RSK_VALT_ITEM(+) AND Z.RSK_VALT_ITEM = Y.RSK_VALT_ITEM(+) ) TOT WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD(+) ORDER BY A.NUM, A.RA_ITEM_CD

SELECT MODEL_NM , RA_RISK_CATG2 , RSK_VALT_ITEM , RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV , RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP , RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX , ROUND(RBA_WEIGHT_CHK,2) AS RBA_WEIGHT FROM (
WITH TMP_INDV AS ( SELECT A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I001' THEN 'R34201' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I002' THEN 'R34202' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I003' THEN 'R34202' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I004' THEN 'R34203' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I005' THEN 'R34204' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I006' THEN 'R34205' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I007' THEN 'R34206' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I008' THEN 'R34207' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I009' THEN 'R34208' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I010' THEN 'R34209' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I014' THEN 'R34212' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I012' THEN 'R34210' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I016' THEN 'R34213' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I017' THEN 'R34214' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I018' THEN 'R34215' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I020' THEN 'R34217' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I021' THEN 'R34218' ELSE 'R34299' END AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = '01' AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'A' AND A.RA_ITEM_CD LIKE 'I%'
UNION ALL
SELECT A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B001' THEN 'R34219' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B002' THEN 'R34220' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B003' THEN 'R34221' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B004' THEN 'R34222' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B005' THEN 'R34223' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B006' THEN 'R34224' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B007' THEN 'R34225' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B008' THEN 'R34226' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B009' THEN 'R34227' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B010' THEN 'R34228' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B011' THEN 'R34229' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B012' THEN 'R34230' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B013' THEN 'R34231' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B014' THEN 'R34232' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B015' THEN 'R34233' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B016' THEN 'R34234' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B017' THEN 'R34235' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B018' THEN 'R34236' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B019' THEN 'R34237' ELSE 'R34299' END AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = '01' AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'B' AND A.RA_ITEM_CD LIKE 'B%' ), TMP_CORP AS ( SELECT A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I001' THEN 'R34201' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I002' THEN 'R34202' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I003' THEN 'R34202' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I004' THEN 'R34203' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I005' THEN 'R34204' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I006' THEN 'R34205' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I007' THEN 'R34206' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I008' THEN 'R34207' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I009' THEN 'R34208' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I010' THEN 'R34209' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I014' THEN 'R34212' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I012' THEN 'R34210' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I016' THEN 'R34213' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I017' THEN 'R34214' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I018' THEN 'R34215' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I020' THEN 'R34217' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I021' THEN 'R34218' ELSE 'R34299' END AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = '02' AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'A' AND A.RA_ITEM_CD LIKE 'I%'
UNION ALL
SELECT A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B001' THEN 'R34219' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B002' THEN 'R34220' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B003' THEN 'R34221' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B004' THEN 'R34222' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B005' THEN 'R34223' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B006' THEN 'R34224' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B007' THEN 'R34225' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B008' THEN 'R34226' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B009' THEN 'R34227' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B010' THEN 'R34228' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B011' THEN 'R34229' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B012' THEN 'R34230' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B013' THEN 'R34231' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B014' THEN 'R34232' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B015' THEN 'R34233' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B016' THEN 'R34234' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B017' THEN 'R34235' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B018' THEN 'R34236' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B019' THEN 'R34237' ELSE 'R34299' END AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = '02' AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'B' AND A.RA_ITEM_CD LIKE 'B%' )
SELECT DECODE( AA.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , 'A', 'I모델', 'B모델' ) AS MODEL_NM , AA.RA_RISK_CATG2 , AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , NVL(BB.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV , NVL(CC.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP , CASE WHEN NVL(BB.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) > NVL(CC.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) THEN NVL(BB.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) ELSE NVL(CC.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) END AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX , CASE WHEN NVL(BB.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) > NVL(CC.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) THEN NVL(BB.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0)*100/TOT.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT ELSE NVL(CC.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0)*100/TOT.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT END AS RBA_WEIGHT_CHK FROM ( SELECT RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM ( SELECT RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM TMP_INDV UNION ALL SELECT RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM TMP_CORP ) GROUP BY RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM ) AA , TMP_INDV BB , TMP_CORP CC , ( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(X.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) > NVL(Y.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) THEN NVL(X.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) ELSE NVL(Y.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) END ) AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_MAX_TOT FROM (SELECT RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT FROM TMP_INDV ) X , (SELECT RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT FROM TMP_CORP ) Y , ( SELECT RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM TMP_INDV UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM TMP_CORP ) GROUP BY RSK_VALT_ITEM ) Z WHERE Z.RSK_VALT_ITEM = X.RSK_VALT_ITEM(+) AND Z.RSK_VALT_ITEM = Y.RSK_VALT_ITEM(+) ) TOT WHERE AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM = BB.RSK_VALT_ITEM(+) AND AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM = CC.RSK_VALT_ITEM(+) ) ORDER BY RSK_VALT_ITEM

'B018' THEN 'R34236' WHEN RA_ITEM_CD = 'B019' THEN 'R34237' ELSE 'R34299' END AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_ITEM_CD --, ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_WGHT , POSITION_NAME FROM ( SELECT DECODE( SUBSTR(A.RA_ITEM_CD,1,1) , 'I', '01', '02' ) AS NUM , DECODE( SUBSTR(A.RA_ITEM_CD,1,1) , 'I', 'I모델', 'B모델' ) AS MODEL_NM , CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, A.RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY A.RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_RISK_CATG ELSE NULL END AS RA_RISK_CATG , CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, A.RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY A.RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_ITEM_A_WGHT ELSE NULL END AS RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = '02') AS POSITION_NAME FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = '02' AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'B' ORDER BY A.RA_SQ ) ) SELECT A.NUM , A.MODEL_NM , A.RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.RSK_VALT_ITEM , A.RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV , B.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP FROM INDIV A , CORP B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD(+) ) ) KK ON ( AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM = KK.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND AA.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV = KK.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV , AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP = KK.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP

MERGE INTO SRBA_RISK_WEIGHT_M AA USING ( SELECT RSK_VALT_ITEM , RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV , RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP FROM ( WITH TMP_INDV AS ( SELECT A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I001' THEN 'R34201' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I002' THEN 'R34202' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I003' THEN 'R34202' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I004' THEN 'R34203' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I005' THEN 'R34204' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I006' THEN 'R34205' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I007' THEN 'R34206' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I008' THEN 'R34207' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I009' THEN 'R34208' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I010' THEN 'R34209' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I014' THEN 'R34212' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I012' THEN 'R34210' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I016' THEN 'R34213' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I017' THEN 'R34214' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I018' THEN 'R34215' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I020' THEN 'R34217' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I021' THEN 'R34218' ELSE 'R34299' END AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = '01' AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'A' AND A.RA_ITEM_CD LIKE 'I%'
UNION ALL
SELECT A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B001' THEN 'R34219' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B002' THEN 'R34220' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B003' THEN 'R34221' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B004' THEN 'R34222' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B005' THEN 'R34223' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B006' THEN 'R34224' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B007' THEN 'R34225' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B008' THEN 'R34226' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B009' THEN 'R34227' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B010' THEN 'R34228' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B011' THEN 'R34229' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B012' THEN 'R34230' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B013' THEN 'R34231' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B014' THEN 'R34232' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B015' THEN 'R34233' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B016' THEN 'R34234' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B017' THEN 'R34235' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B018' THEN 'R34236' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B019' THEN 'R34237' ELSE 'R34299' END AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = '01' AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'B' AND A.RA_ITEM_CD LIKE 'B%' ), TMP_CORP AS ( SELECT A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I001' THEN 'R34201' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I002' THEN 'R34202' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I003' THEN 'R34202' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I004' THEN 'R34203' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I005' THEN 'R34204' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I006' THEN 'R34205' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I007' THEN 'R34206' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I008' THEN 'R34207' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I009' THEN 'R34208' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I010' THEN 'R34209' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I014' THEN 'R34212' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I012' THEN 'R34210' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I016' THEN 'R34213' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I017' THEN 'R34214' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I018' THEN 'R34215' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I020' THEN 'R34217' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I021' THEN 'R34218' ELSE 'R34299' END AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = '02' AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'A' AND A.RA_ITEM_CD LIKE 'I%'
UNION ALL
SELECT A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B001' THEN 'R34219' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B002' THEN 'R34220' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B003' THEN 'R34221' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B004' THEN 'R34222' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B005' THEN 'R34223' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B006' THEN 'R34224' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B007' THEN 'R34225' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B008' THEN 'R34226' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B009' THEN 'R34227' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B010' THEN 'R34228' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B011' THEN 'R34229' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B012' THEN 'R34230' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B013' THEN 'R34231' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B014' THEN 'R34232' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B015' THEN 'R34233' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B016' THEN 'R34234' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B017' THEN 'R34235' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B018' THEN 'R34236' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B019' THEN 'R34237' ELSE 'R34299' END AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = '02' AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'B' AND A.RA_ITEM_CD LIKE 'B%' )
SELECT AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM , NVL(BB.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV , NVL(CC.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT, 0) AS RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP FROM ( SELECT RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM ( SELECT RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM TMP_INDV UNION ALL SELECT RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM TMP_CORP ) GROUP BY RA_RISK_CATG2, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RSK_VALT_ITEM ) AA , TMP_INDV BB , TMP_CORP CC WHERE AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM = BB.RSK_VALT_ITEM(+) AND AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM = CC.RSK_VALT_ITEM(+) ) ) KK ON ( AA.RSK_VALT_ITEM = KK.RSK_VALT_ITEM AND AA.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV = KK.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_INDV , AA.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP = KK.RA_FIN_WEIGHT_CORP
mapper.select: SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.CNTL_CATG1_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'P001' ) AS CNTL_CATG1_C_NM , A.CNTL_CATG2_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_CATG2_C AND GRP_C = 'P002' ) AS CNTL_CATG2_C_NM , A.CNTL_ELMN_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_ELMN_C AND GRP_C = 'P003' ) AS CNTL_ELMN_C_NM , A.CNTL_ELMN_CTNT , A.CNTL_RSK_CTNT , A.EVAL_TYPE_CD , A.EVAL_MTHD_CTNT , A.PROOF_DOC_LIST , A.USE_YN , A.CHG_RSN_CTNT , A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO , C.MERGED_BRNO_NM AS BRNO_NM FROM SRBA_CNTL_ELMN_M A , ( SELECT CNTL_ELMN_C , LISTAGG( BRNO_NM, ', ' ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY BRNO ) AS MERGED_BRNO_NM FROM ( SELECT BB.CNTL_ELMN_C , BB.BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = BB.BRNO) BRNO_NM FROM SRBA_CNTL_ELMN_M AA , SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_I BB WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.BAS_YYMM = BB.BAS_YYMM AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = BB.CNTL_ELMN_C AND BB.TGT_YN = '1' ) GROUP BY CNTL_ELMN_C ) C WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = C.CNTL_ELMN_C(+) ORDER BY CNTL_ELMN_C

SELECT BAS_YYMM ,CNTL_CATG1_C ,CNTL_CATG2_C ,CNTL_ELMN_C ,CNTL_ITEM_C ,CNTL_ITEM_DE_C ,CNTL_ITEM_DE_CTNT ,AUTO_EXT_YN ,AUTO_SAMPLE_CTNT FROM SRBA_CNTL_ITEM_D WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY to_number(CNTL_ITEM_DE_C)

SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO) BRNO_NM , A.HGRK_BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HGRK_BRNO) HGRK_BRNO_NM , A.AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO , B.MOFC_BRN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('M043',B.MOFC_BRN_CCD) AS MOFC_BRN_NAME FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A , NIC41B B , SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_I C WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND A.BAS_YYMM = C.BAS_YYMM AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND C.TGT_YN = '1' AND C.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BRNO , HGRK_BRNO

SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO) BRNO_NM , A.HGRK_BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HGRK_BRNO) HGRK_BRNO_NM , A.AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO , B.MOFC_BRN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('M043',B.MOFC_BRN_CCD) AS MOFC_BRN_NAME FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A , NIC41B B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND A.BRNO NOT IN ( SELECT A.BRNO FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A , NIC41B B , SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_I C WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND A.BAS_YYMM = C.BAS_YYMM AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND C.TGT_YN = '1' AND C.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ORDER BY BRNO , HGRK_BRNO
mapper.update: INSERT INTO SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_I ( BAS_YYMM, CNTL_ELMN_C, BRNO, TGT_YN, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TGT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO SRBA_TJ_ALLT_I USING DUAL ON (BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_FLD_C = #{TONGJE_FLD_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_LGDV_C = #{TONGJE_LGDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = #{TONGJE_MDDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TONGJE_ALLT = #{TONGJE_ALLT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_ALLT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_FLD_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_LGDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_MDDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_ALLT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT C.SNO, C.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID /* 다음 ROLE_ID */ , C.RTN_ROLE_ID /* 반려ROLE_ID */ FROM C_GYLJ_M B , C_GYLJ_D C WHERE 1=1 AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.GYLJ_ROLE_ID= #{GYLJ_ROLE_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID AS FIRST_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_M B , C_GYLJ_D C WHERE 1=1 AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C= #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.SNO='1'
mapper.update: MERGE INTO SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_I USING DUAL ON (BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT_YN = #{TGT_YN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,DR_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,DR_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,DR_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYMM, CNTL_ELMN_C, BRNO, TGT_YN, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TGT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT AAA.PROC_SMDV_C,AAA.TONGJE_MDDV_C,AAA.TONGJE_MDDV_C||AAA.PROC_SMDV_C AS RESULT_KEY FROM ( SELECT PROC_SMDV_C,TONGJE_MDDV_C FROM ( SELECT PROC_FLD_C,PROC_LGDV_C,PROC_MDDV_C,PROC_SMDV_C FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M WHERE BAS_YYMM=#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR})AA , ( SELECT DISTINCT BAS_YYMM,TONGJE_FLD_C,TONGJE_LGDV_C,TONGJE_MDDV_C FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M WHERE BAS_YYMM=#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) BB ) AAA ,(SELECT PROC_SMDV_C,TONGJE_MDDV_C FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TJ_MP WHERE BAS_YYMM=#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) BBB WHERE AAA.PROC_SMDV_C=BBB.PROC_SMDV_C(+) AND AAA.TONGJE_MDDV_C=BBB.TONGJE_MDDV_C(+) AND BBB.PROC_SMDV_C IS NULL
SELECT PROC_SMDV_C,TONGJE_MDDV_C , TONGJE_MDDV_C||PROC_SMDV_C AS RESULT_KEY FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TJ_MP WHERE BAS_YYMM=#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TJ_MP WHERE BAS_YYMM=#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_SMDV_C = #{TONGJE_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

INSERT INTO SRBA_V_PROC_TJ_MP ( BAS_YYMM, PROC_FLD_C, PROC_LGDV_C, PROC_MDDV_C, PROC_SMDV_C, TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_LGDV_C, TONGJE_MDDV_C, TONGJE_SMDV_C, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_FLD_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_LGDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_MDDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{PROC_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_FLD_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_LGDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_MDDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY AA.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C ) AS CNTL_ITEM_DE_C , AA.BAS_YYMM , AA.CNTL_CATG1_C , AA.CNTL_CATG2_C , AA.CNTL_ELMN_C , AA.BRNO , AA.CNTL_ITEM_C , DECODE(MM.EVAL_TYPE_CD, '2', AA.SNO, AA.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C ) AS CNTL_ITEM_DE_C_OLD , AA.SNO , BB.CNTL_ITEM_DE_CTNT , AA.CHECK_YN , AA.CNTL_VALUE , AA.DR_DT , AA.DR_TIME , AA.DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM AA , SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M MM , SRBA_CNTL_ITEM_D BB WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.BAS_YYMM = MM.BAS_YYMM AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = MM.CNTL_ELMN_C AND AA.BRNO = MM.BRNO AND AA.BAS_YYMM = BB.BAS_YYMM AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = BB.CNTL_ELMN_C AND AA.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = BB.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C

SELECT RNMCNO , CS_NO AS AML_CUST_ID , RNM_CNFR_CCD , CS_ST_CD , CS_RGST_DT , CS_MDFY_DT , CS_DLT_DT , CS_NM , CORP_RGST_NO , ENG_CS_NM , NTN_CD , RSDNC_F , RSDNC_PLC_NTN_CD , INDV_CORP_CCD , INDST_RSK_DVD_CD , AML_JOB_GUBN , LG_AMT_ASTS_F , EMAIL_ID , EMAIL_HOST_NAME , TL_ASTS_AMT , NPRFT_GROUP_F , CS_EXCTN_BRN_CD , CS_MANAG_BRN_CD , CS_TYP_CD , INTERVIEW_CCD , NTV_FGNR_CCD , DL_CHNNL_CD , HNDL_DY_TM , L_HNDL_P_ENO , AML_CRT_DT , AML_HNDL_P_ENO , PEP_YN , BRTDY , STR_JOB_GUBN , CDD_NTN_CD , OFSF_YN , HR_JOB_YN FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO , T01.FILE_SER , T01.FILE_POS , T01.LOSC_FILE_NM , T01.PHSC_FILE_NM , T01.FILE_SIZE , T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over (order by T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER

SELECT AA.BAS_YYMM , AA.CNTL_CATG1_C , AA.CNTL_CATG2_C , AA.CNTL_ELMN_C , AA.BRNO , AA.CNTL_ITEM_C , AA.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C , ( SELECT INDV_CORP_CCD FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = AA.CNTL_ITEM_C ) AS INDV_CORP_CCD , AA.SNO , SN.NO , BB.CNTL_ITEM_DE_CTNT , AA.CHECK_YN , AA.CNTL_VALUE , AA.DR_DT , AA.DR_TIME , AA.DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM AA , SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M MM , SRBA_CNTL_ITEM_D BB , ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CNTL_ITEM_C ) AS NO , CNTL_ITEM_C FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CNTL_ITEM_C FROM SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM AA WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) SN WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.BAS_YYMM = MM.BAS_YYMM AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = MM.CNTL_ELMN_C AND AA.BRNO = MM.BRNO AND AA.BAS_YYMM = BB.BAS_YYMM AND AA.CNTL_ELMN_C = BB.CNTL_ELMN_C AND AA.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C = BB.CNTL_ITEM_DE_C AND AA.CNTL_ITEM_C = SN.CNTL_ITEM_C ORDER BY AA.CNTL_ITEM_C, CNTL_ELMN_C , to_number(CNTL_ITEM_DE_C)

WITH MAX_DATA AS ( SELECT CNTL_CATG1_C, MAX(AVG_TONGJE_VAL) AS MAX_SCORE FROM ( SELECT A.CNTL_CATG1_C ,ROUND(AVG(A.TONGJE_VAL),2) AS AVG_TONGJE_VAL FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.CNTL_CATG1_C ) GROUP BY CNTL_CATG1_C, AVG_TONGJE_VAL ), CUR_DATA AS ( SELECT A.CNTL_CATG1_C ,ROUND(AVG(A.TONGJE_VAL),2) AS CUR_SCORE FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.CNTL_CATG1_C ), PREV_DATA AS ( SELECT A.CNTL_CATG1_C ,ROUND(AVG(BF_TONGJE_VAL),2) AS PREV_SCORE FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_SCORE A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.CNTL_CATG1_C ) SELECT NVL('[' || LISTAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'RISK_TYPE' VALUE ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = MX.CNTL_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'P001' ), 'MAX_SCORE' VALUE NVL(MX.MAX_SCORE,0), 'CUR_SCORE' VALUE NVL(CU.CUR_SCORE,0), 'PREV_SCORE' VALUE NVL(PV.PREV_SCORE,0) ), ',' )WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY MX.CNTL_CATG1_C ) || ']','[]') AS JSON_RESULT FROM MAX_DATA MX LEFT JOIN CUR_DATA CU ON CU.CNTL_CATG1_C = MX.CNTL_CATG1_C LEFT JOIN PREV_DATA PV ON PV.CNTL_CATG1_C = MX.CNTL_CATG1_C
SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM , BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_KRI_JR_EXTR_MP WHERE BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC

WITH TMP AS ( SELECT XX.KRI_NO, (SELECT KRI_NM FROM SRBA_KRI_JIPYO_M WHERE KRI_NO=XX.KRI_NO) AS KRI_NM, (SELECT KRI_CTNT FROM SRBA_KRI_JIPYO_M WHERE KRI_NO=XX.KRI_NO) AS KRI_CTNT, NVL(AA.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_1, NVL(AA.CNT,0) AS CNT_1, NVL(BB.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-1),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_2, NVL(BB.CNT,0) AS CNT_2, NVL(CC.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-2),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_3, NVL(CC.CNT,0) AS CNT_3, NVL(DD.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-3),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_4, NVL(DD.CNT,0) AS CNT_4, NVL(EE.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-4),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_5, NVL(EE.CNT,0) AS CNT_5, NVL(FF.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-5),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_6, NVL(FF.CNT,0) AS CNT_6, NVL(GG.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-6),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_7, NVL(GG.CNT,0) AS CNT_7, NVL(HH.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-7),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_8, NVL(HH.CNT,0) AS CNT_8, NVL(II.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-8),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_9, NVL(II.CNT,0) AS CNT_9, NVL(JJ.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-9),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_10, NVL(JJ.CNT,0) AS CNT_10, NVL(KK.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-10),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_11, NVL(KK.CNT,0) AS CNT_11, NVL(LL.VALT_YYMM,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-11),'YYYYMM')) AS VALT_YYMM_12, NVL(LL.CNT,0) AS CNT_12 FROM ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )AA, ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-1),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )BB, ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-2),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )CC, ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-3),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )DD, ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-4),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )EE, ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-5),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )FF, ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-6),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )GG, ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-7),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )HH, ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-8),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )II, ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-9),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )JJ, ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-10),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )KK, ( SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_INDCT, SUM(DECODE(A.VALT_CNT ,'-1','',A.VALT_CNT)) AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A WHERE VALT_YYMM =TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDD'),-11),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.RSK_INDCT, A.VALT_YYMM )LL, SRBA_KRI_JIPYO_M XX WHERE AA.RSK_INDCT=BB.RSK_INDCT(+) AND AA.RSK_INDCT=CC.RSK_INDCT(+) AND AA.RSK_INDCT=DD.RSK_INDCT(+) AND AA.RSK_INDCT=EE.RSK_INDCT(+) AND AA.RSK_INDCT=FF.RSK_INDCT(+) AND AA.RSK_INDCT=GG.RSK_INDCT(+) AND AA.RSK_INDCT=HH.RSK_INDCT(+) AND AA.RSK_INDCT=II.RSK_INDCT(+) AND AA.RSK_INDCT=JJ.RSK_INDCT(+) AND AA.RSK_INDCT=KK.RSK_INDCT(+) AND AA.RSK_INDCT=LL.RSK_INDCT(+) AND AA.RSK_INDCT=XX.REF_RSK_INDCT ORDER BY XX.REF_RSK_INDCT ) SELECT KRI_NO, KRI_NM, KRI_CTNT, VALT_YYMM_1, VALT_YYMM_2, VALT_YYMM_3, VALT_YYMM_4, VALT_YYMM_5, VALT_YYMM_6, VALT_YYMM_7, VALT_YYMM_8, VALT_YYMM_9, VALT_YYMM_10, VALT_YYMM_11, VALT_YYMM_12, CNT_1, CNT_2, CNT_3, CNT_4, CNT_5, CNT_6, CNT_7, CNT_8, CNT_9, CNT_10, CNT_11, CNT_12, (CNT_1+CNT_2+CNT_3+CNT_4+CNT_5+CNT_6+CNT_7+CNT_8+CNT_9+CNT_10+CNT_11+CNT_12) AS TOTAL, ROUND((CNT_1+CNT_2+CNT_3+CNT_4+CNT_5+CNT_6+CNT_7+CNT_8+CNT_9+CNT_10+CNT_11+CNT_12)/12,2) AS AVG FROM TMP
SELECT KRI_NO,'' AS KRI_VALT_GD_C FROM SRBA_KRI_JIPYO_M

SELECT A.BAS_YYMM, A.RULE_NO, (SELECT RULE_NM FROM SRBA_KRI_RULE_M WHERE RULE_NO=A.RULE_NO) AS RULE_NM, A.RULE_V, A.RULE_V_PNT, A.RULE_FREQ,DECODE(A.RULE_VALT_GD_C,'R','Red','G','Green','Y','Yellow') AS RULE_VALT_GD_C FROM SRBA_KRI_R_EXTR_M A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM=#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT RULE_NO,RULE_NM FROM SRBA_KRI_RULE_M

SELECT A.BAS_YYMM, A.KRI_NO, A.RULE_NO, A.KRI_VALT_GD_C, A.KRI_NO||A.RULE_NO AS RESULT_KEY ,DECODE(B.RULE_VALT_GD_C,'R','Red','G','Green','Y','Yellow') AS RULE_VALT_GD_C FROM SRBA_KRI_JR_EXTR_MP A , SRBA_KRI_R_EXTR_M B WHERE A.RULE_NO=B.RULE_NO AND A.BAS_YYMM=B.BAS_YYMM AND A.BAS_YYMM=#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT POOL_SNO ,IMPRV_CNFRME ,MAIN_EXEC_CTNT ,ADD_INP_CTNT ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_IMPRV_POOL A WHERE 1=1
AND A.IMPRV_CNFRME LIKE '%'|| #{IMPRV_CNFRME, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ||'%'
ORDER BY POOL_SNO
SELECT POOL_SNO ,IMPRV_CNFRME ,MAIN_EXEC_CTNT ,ADD_INP_CTNT ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_IMPRV_POOL A WHERE 1=1 AND POOL_SNO = #{POOL_SNO}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO SRBA_IMPRV_POOL ( POOL_SNO ,IMPRV_CNFRME ,MAIN_EXEC_CTNT ,ADD_INP_CTNT ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( (SELECT (NVL(MAX(POOL_SNO), 0) + 1) FROM SRBA_IMPRV_POOL) ,#{IMPRV_CNFRME,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{MAIN_EXEC_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{ADD_INP_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
DELETE FROM SRBA_IMPRV_POOL WHERE POOL_SNO = #{POOL_SNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.PROC_FLD_C , B.DTL_C_NM AS PROC_FLD_C_NM , A.PROC_LGDV_C , C.DTL_C_NM AS PROC_LGDV_C_NM , A.PROC_MDDV_C , D.DTL_C_NM AS PROC_MDDV_C_NM , A.PROC_SMDV_C , A.VALT_BRNO , E.DPRT_NM AS DPRT_NM ,( SELECT E.PROC_SMDV_NM FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M E WHERE E.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND E.PROC_FLD_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND E.PROC_LGDV_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND E.PROC_MDDV_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND E.PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C ) AS PROC_SMDV_NM , A.RSK_VALT_PNT , A.TONGJE_VALT_PNT , A.REMDR_RSK_PNT , A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C H WHERE H.GRP_C = 'R316' AND H.DTL_C = A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM , G.IMPRV_CMPT_YN ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C J WHERE J.GRP_C = 'R326' AND J.DTL_C = TO_CHAR(G.IMPRV_CMPT_YN)) AS IMPRV_CMPT_YN_NM , DECODE(G.GYLJ_S_C,'','0',G.GYLJ_S_C) AS GYLJ_S_C , DECODE(G.GYLJ_S_C, '','미수행', (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C H WHERE H.GRP_C = 'R325' AND H.DTL_C = G.GYLJ_S_C ) ) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM , G.GYLJ_DT , G.GYLJ_JKW_NO , GET_LOGINID_NAME(G.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS USER_NM , G.GYLJ_ID , G.GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R A JOIN NIC41B E ON E.DPRT_CD = A.VALT_BRNO JOIN SRBA_DTL_C B ON B.DTL_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND B.GRP_C = 'R303' JOIN SRBA_DTL_C C ON C.DTL_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND C.GRP_C = 'R304' JOIN SRBA_DTL_C D ON D.DTL_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND D.GRP_C = 'R305' LEFT OUTER JOIN SRBA_IMPRV_M G ON G.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND G.PROC_FLD_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND G.PROC_LGDV_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND G.PROC_MDDV_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND G.PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C AND G.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM} AND A.PROC_FLD_C = #{PROC_FLD_C} AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = #{PROC_LGDV_C} AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = #{PROC_MDDV_C} AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C} AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO}

SELECT AA.RSK_VALT_PNT ,AA.TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,AA.REMDR_RSK_PNT ,AA.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ,AA.REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM1 FROM ( SELECT A.RSK_VALT_PNT ,A.TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,A.REMDR_RSK_PNT ,A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C H WHERE H.GRP_C = 'R316' AND H.DTL_C = A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM1 FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{O_YYMM} AND A.PROC_FLD_C = #{PROC_FLD_C} AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = #{PROC_LGDV_C} AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = #{PROC_MDDV_C} AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C} AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO} ) AA

SELECT BB.RSK_VALT_PNT AS RSK_VALT_PNT2 ,BB.TONGJE_VALT_PNT AS TONGJE_VALT_PNT2 ,BB.REMDR_RSK_PNT AS REMDR_RSK_PNT2 ,BB.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS REMDR_RSK_GD_CA2 ,BB.REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM2 FROM ( SELECT A.RSK_VALT_PNT ,A.TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,A.REMDR_RSK_PNT ,A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C H WHERE H.GRP_C = 'R316' AND H.DTL_C = A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM2 FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM} AND A.PROC_FLD_C = #{PROC_FLD_C} AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = #{PROC_LGDV_C} AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = #{PROC_MDDV_C} AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C} AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO} ) BB

SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_INDCT_NM ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_FAC_NM ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_CATG_NM ,VALT_BRNO ,RSK_VALT_PNT FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM ,A.PROC_FLD_C ,A.PROC_LGDV_C ,A.PROC_MDDV_C ,A.PROC_SMDV_C ,A.RSK_INDCT ,E.RSK_INDCT_NM ,A.RSK_FAC ,C.DTL_C_NM AS RSK_FAC_NM ,A.RSK_CATG ,B.DTL_C_NM AS RSK_CATG_NM ,A.VALT_BRNO ,A.RSK_VALT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_RSK_R A JOIN SRBA_DTL_C B ON B.DTL_C = A.RSK_CATG AND B.GRP_C = 'R309' JOIN SRBA_DTL_C C ON C.DTL_C = A.RSK_FAC AND C.GRP_C = 'R310' JOIN SRBA_V_RSK_JIPYO_M E ON E.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND E.RSK_CATG = A.RSK_CATG AND E.RSK_FAC = A.RSK_FAC AND E.RSK_INDCT = A.RSK_INDCT WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM} AND A.PROC_FLD_C = #{PROC_FLD_C} AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = #{PROC_LGDV_C} AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = #{PROC_MDDV_C} AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C} AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO} ORDER BY A.RSK_VALT_PNT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,PROC_FLD_C ,PROC_LGDV_C ,PROC_MDDV_C ,PROC_SMDV_C ,VALT_BRNO ,JIPYO_V ,LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT AS TONGJE_VALT_PNT , (SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R314' AND DTL_C= PROC_SMDV_C) AS PROC_SMDV_NM FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_R A WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PROC_MDDV_C IN ( (SELECT TONGJE_MDDV_C FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TJ_MP WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_FLD_C= #{PROC_FLD_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) ORDER BY A.TONGJE_VALT_PNT DESC, A.JIPYO_V DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

WITH TMP AS ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, ROWNUM AS NUM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M where bas_yymm != 999912 ORDER BY 1 DESC ) SELECT TONGJE_NO, TONGJE_ACT_TITE, DECODE(MAX(LVL2),'','',MAX(NVL(LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT2,0))) AS LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT2, MAX(LVL2) AS LVL2, MAX(LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT1) AS LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT1 , MAX(LVL1) AS LVL1, MAX(LVL3) AS LVL3, MAX(LVL2) AS LVL2,MAX(LVL1) AS LVL1 FROM ( SELECT TONGJE_NO, TONGJE_ACT_TITE, DECODE(BAS_YYMM,#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT,'') AS LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT1, DECODE(BAS_YYMM,#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lvl,'') AS LVL1, DECODE(BAS_YYMM,(SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP WHERE NUM = 2), LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT,'') AS LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT2, DECODE(BAS_YYMM,(SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP WHERE NUM = 2), lvl,'') AS LVL2, DECODE(BAS_YYMM,(SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP WHERE NUM = 3), LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT,'') AS LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT3, DECODE(BAS_YYMM,(SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP WHERE NUM = 3), lvl,'') AS LVL3 FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_NO, (SELECT TONGJE_ACT_TITE FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = '201902' AND TONGJE_NO = A.TONGJE_NO) AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE, LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT, CASE WHEN (LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT >= 70 AND LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT < 100) THEN 'Red' WHEN (LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT >= 40 AND LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT < 70 ) THEN 'Yellow' ELSE 'Green' END AS lvl FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_R A WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} UNION SELECT BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_NO, (SELECT TONGJE_ACT_TITE FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = '201902' AND TONGJE_NO = A.TONGJE_NO) AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE, LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT, CASE WHEN (LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT >= 70 AND LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT < 100) THEN 'Red' WHEN (LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT >= 40 AND LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT < 70 ) THEN 'Yellow' ELSE 'Green' END AS lvl FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_R A WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP WHERE NUM = 2) AND PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} UNION SELECT BAS_YYMM, TONGJE_NO, (SELECT TONGJE_ACT_TITE FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = '201902' AND TONGJE_NO = A.TONGJE_NO) AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE, LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT, CASE WHEN (LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT >= 70 AND LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT < 100) THEN 'Red' WHEN (LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT >= 40 AND LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT < 70 ) THEN 'Yellow' ELSE 'Green' END AS lvl FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_R A WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP WHERE NUM = 3) AND PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) GROUP BY TONGJE_NO,TONGJE_ACT_TITE

SELECT ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM < 4 ) WHERE NUM = 3 ) AS N_YYMM ,( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM < 4 ) WHERE NUM = 2 ) AS O_YYMM ,( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM < 4 ) WHERE NUM = 1 )AS C_YYMM FROM DUAL

SELECT C.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID /* 다음 ROLE_ID */ , C.RTN_ROLE_ID /* 반려ROLE_ID */ FROM C_GYLJ_M B , C_GYLJ_D C WHERE 1=1 AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.GYLJ_ROLE_ID= #{ROLE_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT SRBA_GYLJ_H_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS MAX_GYLJ_ID FROM DUAL

SELECT A.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , A.GYLJ_SER AS GYLJ_SER /* 결재일련번호 */ , (SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = A.ROLE_ID) AS ROLE_NM /* 결재단계 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R325' AND DTL_C = A.GYLJ_S_C) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 결재상태 */ , A.GYLJ_DT AS GYLJ_DT /* 결재일자 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_JKW_NM /* 처리자 */ , (SELECT E.DPRT_NM FROM C_USER D , C_DEP_INFO F , NIC41B E WHERE D.DEP_ID = F.DEP_ID AND F.DEP_DESC = E.DPRT_CD AND D.LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_DEP_NM /* 처리지점 */ , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT /* 사유 */ , A.DR_DT||A.DR_TIME AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 처리일시 */ FROM SRBA_GYLJ_H A /* RBA 결재이력 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY A.GYLJ_SER

SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ , D.KRI_NO AS KRI_NO , D.KRI_NM AS KRI_NM , D.KRI_CTNT AS KRI_CTNT , D.FRQ_C AS FRQ_C , D.FRQ_NM AS FRQ_NM , D.UNIT_C AS UNIT_C , D.UNIT_NM AS UNIT_NM , D.REF_RSK_INDCT AS REF_RSK_INDCT , D.KRI_G_C AS KRI_G_C , D.HTRH_SET AS HTRH_SET , D.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT , D.DR_DT AS DR_DT , D.DR_TIME AS DR_TIME , D.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO , D.DR_OP_JKW_NM AS DR_OP_JKW_NM , D.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT , D.CHG_TIME AS CHG_TIME , D.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO , D.CHG_OP_JKW_NM AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM , (SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R309' AND DTL_C= SUBSTR(D.REF_RSK_INDCT,1,4) ) AS REF_RSK_INDCT_NM FROM ( SELECT A.KRI_NO AS KRI_NO , A.KRI_NM AS KRI_NM /* 지표명 */ , A.KRI_CTNT AS KRI_CTNT /* 지표내용 */ , A.FRQ_C AS FRQ_C /* 주기코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.FRQ_C AND GRP_C = 'R311') AS FRQ_NM , A.UNIT_C AS UNIT_C /* 단위코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.UNIT_C AND GRP_C = 'R318') AS UNIT_NM , A.REF_RSK_INDCT AS REF_RSK_INDCT /* 참고위험 INDICATOR */ , A.KRI_G_C AS KRI_G_C /* KRI 구분코드 */ , A.HTRH_SET AS HTRH_SET /* 임계치설정 */ , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT /* 비고내용 */ , A.DR_DT AS DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , A.DR_TIME AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM , A.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO /* 변경조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM FROM SRBA_KRI_JIPYO_M A WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(A.KRI_NO) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{KRI_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.KRI_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{KRI_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%'
AND SUBSTR(A.REF_RSK_INDCT,1,4) = #{RSK_CATG, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY A.KRI_NO ) D

SELECT A.KRI_NO AS KRI_NO , A.KRI_NM AS KRI_NM /* 지표명 */ , A.KRI_CTNT AS KRI_CTNT /* 지표내용 */ , A.FRQ_C AS FRQ_C /* 주기코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.FRQ_C AND GRP_C = 'R311') AS FRQ_NM , A.UNIT_C AS UNIT_C /* 단위코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.UNIT_C AND GRP_C = 'R318') AS UNIT_NM , A.REF_RSK_INDCT AS REF_RSK_INDCT /* 참고위험 INDICATOR */ , A.KRI_G_C AS KRI_G_C /* KRI 구분코드 */ , A.HTRH_SET AS HTRH_SET /* 임계치설정 */ , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT /* 비고내용 */ , A.DR_DT AS DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , A.DR_TIME AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM , A.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO /* 변경조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM FROM SRBA_KRI_JIPYO_M A WHERE A.KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA_KRI_JIPYO_M A WHERE A.KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ , D.RULE_NO AS RULE_NO , D.RULE_NM AS RULE_NM , D.RULE_CTNT AS RULE_CTNT , D.FRQ_C AS FRQ_C , D.FRQ_NM AS FRQ_NM , D.UNIT_C AS UNIT_C , D.UNIT_NM AS UNIT_NM , D.JIPYO_OFFR AS JIPYO_OFFR , D.KRI_RULE_REF AS KRI_RULE_REF , D.KRI_RULE_CTNT AS KRI_RULE_CTNT , D.KRI_G_C AS KRI_G_C , D.HTRH_SET AS HTRH_SET , D.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT , D.DR_DT AS DR_DT , D.DR_TIME AS DR_TIME , D.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO , D.DR_OP_JKW_NM AS DR_OP_JKW_NM , D.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT , D.CHG_TIME AS CHG_TIME , D.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO , D.CHG_OP_JKW_NM AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM FROM ( SELECT A.RULE_NO AS RULE_NO , A.RULE_NM AS RULE_NM /* 지표명 */ , A.RULE_CTNT AS RULE_CTNT /* 지표내용 */ , A.FRQ_C AS FRQ_C /* 주기코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.FRQ_C AND GRP_C = 'R311') AS FRQ_NM , A.UNIT_C AS UNIT_C /* 단위코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.UNIT_C AND GRP_C = 'R318') AS UNIT_NM , A.JIPYO_OFFR AS JIPYO_OFFR , A.KRI_RULE_REF AS KRI_RULE_REF /* KRI RULE 참고위험 */ , A.KRI_RULE_CTNT AS KRI_RULE_CTNT /* KRI RULE 참고상세 */ , A.KRI_G_C AS KRI_G_C /* KRI 구분코드 */ , A.HTRH_SET AS HTRH_SET /* 임계치설정 */ , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT /* 비고내용 */ , A.DR_DT AS DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , A.DR_TIME AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM , A.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO /* 변경조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM FROM SRBA_KRI_RULE_M A WHERE 1=1
AND A.RULE_NO = #{RULE_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.RULE_NM LIKE '%' || #{RULE_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
ORDER BY A.RULE_NO ) D

SELECT A.RULE_NO AS RULE_NO , A.RULE_NM AS RULE_NM /* 지표명 */ , A.RULE_CTNT AS RULE_CTNT /* 지표내용 */ , A.FRQ_C AS FRQ_C /* 주기코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.FRQ_C AND GRP_C = 'R311') AS FRQ_NM , A.UNIT_C AS UNIT_C /* 단위코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.UNIT_C AND GRP_C = 'R318') AS UNIT_NM , A.JIPYO_OFFR AS JIPYO_OFFR , A.KRI_RULE_REF AS KRI_RULE_REF /* KRI RULE 참고위험 */ , A.KRI_RULE_CTNT AS KRI_RULE_CTNT /* KRI RULE 참고상세 */ , A.KRI_G_C AS KRI_G_C /* KRI 구분코드 */ , A.HTRH_SET AS HTRH_SET /* 임계치설정 */ , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT /* 비고내용 */ , A.DR_DT AS DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , A.DR_TIME AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM , A.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO /* 변경조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM FROM SRBA_KRI_RULE_M A WHERE A.RULE_NO = #{RULE_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA_KRI_RULE_M A WHERE A.RULE_NO = #{RULE_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT A.RULE_NO AS RULE_NO , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_KRI_JIPYO_M ) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM SRBA_KRI_RULE_M A ORDER BY A.RULE_NO
SELECT KRI_NO AS KRI_NO , RULE_NO AS RULE_NO , KRI_NO || RULE_NO AS RESULT_KEY FROM SRBA_KRI_JR_MP
mapper.update: INSERT INTO SRBA_RPT_MK_H (SRBA_RPT_MK_DT,BAS_YYMM,RBA_RPT_SDT,RBA_RPT_MK_S_C,DR_DT,DR_TIME) VALUES ( #{SRBA_RPT_MK_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , #{RBA_RPT_MK_S_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS'))
mapper.select: SELECT RNUM,RBA_RPT_MK_S_C,(SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C='R400' AND DTL_C =RBA_RPT_MK_S_C) AS RBA_RPT_MK_S_C_NM,BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BAS_YYMM ORDER BY SRBA_RPT_MK_DT DESC) RNUM ,RBA_RPT_MK_S_C,BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_RPT_MK_H WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHERE RNUM=1
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,R1_AIM ,R1_VALT_RSLT ,R1_IMPRV_PLAN ,R2_AIM FROM SRBA_RPT_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT SNO --순번 ,R2_RULE --규정 및 지침명 ,R2_MAIN_CTNT --주요 내용 요약 ,R2_SRC --출처 ,R2_REVIS_DT --최근 개정일 FROM SRBA_RPT_RULE_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT SNO --순번 ,R2_BIZ_STEP --업무 절차 ,R2_EXEC_CTNT --상세 수행 내용 ,R2_AML_BRNM --담당부서 ,R2_EXEC_DT --수행일자 FROM SRBA_RPT_SCHD_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ROWNUM AS SNO , B.DTL_C_NM AS R2_BIZ_STEP , A.VALT_METH_CTNT AS R2_EXEC_CTNT , CASE WHEN EXEC_B_BRNO_YN = '1' AND EXEC_S_BRNO_YN='1' THEN 'AML주관부서,현업부서' WHEN EXEC_B_BRNO_YN = '1' AND EXEC_S_BRNO_YN !='1' THEN 'AML주관부서' WHEN EXEC_B_BRNO_YN != '1' AND EXEC_S_BRNO_YN= '1' THEN '현업부서' ELSE '-' END AS R2_AML_BRNM ,REAL_EDT AS R2_EXEC_DT FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D A, SRBA_DTL_C B WHERE A.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = B.DTL_C AND A.BAS_YYMM=#{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.GRP_C='R302' ORDER BY A.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C

SELECT A.BAS_YYMM ,A.PROC_LGDV_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R304' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_LGDV_C ) AS PROC_LGDV_NM ,A.PROC_MDDV_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R305' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_MDDV_C ) AS PROC_MDDV_NM ,A.PROC_SMDV_C ,A.PROC_SMDV_NM ,A.RSK_CAUS_CTNT FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M A WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USYN='1' ORDER BY PROC_LGDV_C,PROC_MDDV_C,PROC_SMDV_C

SELECT BAS_YYMM ,A.RSK_CATG ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R309' AND DTL_C= A.RSK_CATG ) AS RSK_CATG_NM ,A.RSK_FAC ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R310' AND DTL_C= A.RSK_FAC ) AS RSK_FAC_NM ,A.RSK_INDCT ,A.RSK_INDCT_NM ,A.DEDU_RSN FROM SRBA_V_RSK_JIPYO_M A WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY RSK_CATG,RSK_FAC,RSK_INDCT

WITH TMP_BAS_YYMM AS ( SELECT BAS_YYMM,NUM FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM,RANK() OVER(ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC) AS NUM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM < #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) SELECT BAS_YYMM,TONGJE_FLD_C,TONGJE_FLD_C_NM,TONGJE_LGDV_C,TONGJE_LGDV_C_NM,TONGJE_MDDV_C,TONGJE_MDDV_C_NM,CNT||' 개' AS CNT,(CNT-N_CNT)||' 개' AS N_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM ,A.TONGJE_FLD_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R312' AND DTL_C= A.TONGJE_FLD_C ) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM ,A.TONGJE_LGDV_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R313' AND DTL_C= A.TONGJE_LGDV_C ) AS TONGJE_LGDV_C_NM ,A.TONGJE_MDDV_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R314' AND DTL_C= A.TONGJE_MDDV_C ) AS TONGJE_MDDV_C_NM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = NVL((SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM='1'),'999912') AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C GROUP BY TONGJE_MDDV_C) CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_MDDV_C = A.TONGJE_MDDV_C GROUP BY TONGJE_MDDV_C) N_CNT FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M A WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY BAS_YYMM,TONGJE_FLD_C,TONGJE_LGDV_C,TONGJE_MDDV_C ORDER BY TONGJE_FLD_C,TONGJE_LGDV_C,TONGJE_MDDV_C )

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY VALT_YYMM) AS SEQ ,A.VALT_YYMM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS BRNO_CNT ,A.R5_RSK_R ,A.R5_RSK_Y ,A.R5_RSK_G ,A.R5_TONGJE_R ,A.R5_TONGJE_Y ,A.R5_TONGJE_G ,(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT VALT_BRNO) FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R') AS TRG_BRNO --대상부서 ,(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT VALT_BRNO) FROM SRBA_IMPRV_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND GYLJ_S_C = '3') AS CMP_CNT --조치완료부점 수 FROM SRBA_RPT_VALT_I A WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY VALT_YYMM

SELECT RANK, PROC_LGDV_NM, PROC_MDDV_C_NM, PROC_SMDV_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY AVG(A.REMDR_RSK_PNT) DESC, A.PROC_SMDV_C ASC) AS RANK ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R304' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_LGDV_C ) AS PROC_LGDV_NM ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R305' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_MDDV_C ) AS PROC_MDDV_C_NM ,(SELECT PROC_SMDV_NM FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M WHERE PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS PROC_SMDV_NM ,ROUND(AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT),2) AS RSK_VALT_PNT ,ROUND(AVG(A.TONGJE_VALT_RT),2) AS TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,ROUND(AVG(A.REMDR_RSK_PNT),2) AS REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.BAS_YYMM,A.PROC_LGDV_C, A.PROC_MDDV_C, A.PROC_SMDV_C ) WHERE RANK < 6 -- 상위 5건만 조회

SELECT A.RANK ,A.BRNO_NM ,A.RSK_VALT_PNT ,A.TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,A.REMDR_RSK_PNT ,A.VALT_BRNO ,CASE WHEN B.RANK-A.RANK > 0 THEN '▲'||TO_NUMBER(B.RANK-A.RANK) WHEN B.RANK-A.RANK < 0 THEN '▼'||TO_NUMBER( ABS(B.RANK-A.RANK) ) ELSE '-' END AS CHG_VAL FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.REMDR_RSK_PNT DESC) AS RANK, A.VALT_BRNO, (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.VALT_BRNO) AS BRNO_NM, A.RSK_VALT_RT AS RSK_VALT_PNT, A.TONGJE_VALT_RT AS TONGJE_VALT_PNT, A.REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.VALT_BRNO, A.RSK_VALT_RT,A.TONGJE_VALT_RT,A.REMDR_RSK_PNT) A, (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY REMDR_RSK_PNT DESC) AS RANK ,VALT_BRNO FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY VALT_BRNO, REMDR_RSK_PNT ) B WHERE A.VALT_BRNO = B.VALT_BRNO (+) AND A.RANK < 6 -- 상위 5건만 조회 ORDER BY A.RANK

WITH REC_BAS_YYMM AS( SELECT NUM,BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE ROWNUM < 4 ) ),RANK_PROC AS ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM,BAS_YYMM,PROC_FLD_C,PROC_LGDV_C,PROC_MDDV_C,PROC_SMDV_C,0 AS VALT_PNT FROM( SELECT BAS_YYMM,PROC_FLD_C,PROC_LGDV_C,PROC_MDDV_C,PROC_SMDV_C,VALT_PNT FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.PROC_FLD_C AS PROC_FLD_C, A.PROC_LGDV_C AS PROC_LGDV_C, A.PROC_MDDV_C AS PROC_MDDV_C, A.PROC_SMDV_C AS PROC_SMDV_C, AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT) AS VALT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_LST_RSK_R A,SRBA_V_PROC_M B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) GROUP BY A.BAS_YYMM,A.PROC_FLD_C,A.PROC_LGDV_C,A.PROC_MDDV_C,A.PROC_SMDV_C )ORDER BY VALT_PNT DESC )WHERE ROWNUM < 11 ) SELECT A.NUM, A.PROC_LGDV_C, (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R304' AND DTL_C=A.PROC_LGDV_C) AS PROC_LGDV_NM, A.PROC_MDDV_C, (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R305' AND DTL_C=A.PROC_MDDV_C) AS PROC_MDDV_NM, A.PROC_SMDV_C, (SELECT PROC_SMDV_NM FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M WHERE USYN = 1 AND PROC_SMDV_C=A.PROC_SMDV_C AND BAS_YYMM=A.BAS_YYMM) AS PROC_SMDV_NM, C.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM3, ROUND(C.VALT_PNT,2) AS PNT3, GET_LEVE_CODE(C.BAS_YYMM,C.VALT_PNT) AS GD3, B.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM2, ROUND(B.VALT_PNT,2) AS PNT2, GET_LEVE_CODE(B.BAS_YYMM,B.VALT_PNT) AS GD2, A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM1, ROUND(A.VALT_PNT,2) AS PNT1, GET_LEVE_CODE(A.BAS_YYMM,A.VALT_PNT) AS GD1 FROM ( SELECT C.NUM AS NUM, A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.PROC_FLD_C AS PROC_FLD_C, A.PROC_LGDV_C AS PROC_LGDV_C, A.PROC_MDDV_C AS PROC_MDDV_C, A.PROC_SMDV_C AS PROC_SMDV_C, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT) ELSE AVG(C.VALT_PNT) END) AS VALT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_LST_RSK_R A,SRBA_V_PROC_M B, RANK_PROC C WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND B.PROC_FLD_C = C.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND B.PROC_LGDV_C = C.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND B.PROC_MDDV_C = C.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.PROC_SMDV_C = C.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) ELSE C.BAS_YYMM END GROUP BY C.NUM,A.BAS_YYMM,A.PROC_FLD_C,A.PROC_LGDV_C,A.PROC_MDDV_C,A.PROC_SMDV_C ) A, ( SELECT C.NUM AS NUM, A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.PROC_FLD_C AS PROC_FLD_C, A.PROC_LGDV_C AS PROC_LGDV_C, A.PROC_MDDV_C AS PROC_MDDV_C, A.PROC_SMDV_C AS PROC_SMDV_C, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT) ELSE AVG(C.VALT_PNT) END) AS VALT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_LST_RSK_R A,SRBA_V_PROC_M B, RANK_PROC C WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND B.PROC_FLD_C = C.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND B.PROC_LGDV_C = C.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND B.PROC_MDDV_C = C.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.PROC_SMDV_C = C.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) ELSE C.BAS_YYMM END GROUP BY C.NUM,A.BAS_YYMM,A.PROC_FLD_C,A.PROC_LGDV_C,A.PROC_MDDV_C,A.PROC_SMDV_C ) B, ( SELECT C.NUM AS NUM, A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.PROC_FLD_C AS PROC_FLD_C, A.PROC_LGDV_C AS PROC_LGDV_C, A.PROC_MDDV_C AS PROC_MDDV_C, A.PROC_SMDV_C AS PROC_SMDV_C, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT) ELSE AVG(C.VALT_PNT) END) AS VALT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_LST_RSK_R A,SRBA_V_PROC_M B, RANK_PROC C WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND B.PROC_FLD_C = C.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND B.PROC_LGDV_C = C.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND B.PROC_MDDV_C = C.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.PROC_SMDV_C = C.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) ELSE C.BAS_YYMM END GROUP BY C.NUM,A.BAS_YYMM,A.PROC_FLD_C,A.PROC_LGDV_C,A.PROC_MDDV_C,A.PROC_SMDV_C ) C WHERE A.NUM = B.NUM AND B.NUM = C.NUM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND B.PROC_FLD_C = C.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND B.PROC_LGDV_C = C.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND B.PROC_MDDV_C = C.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.PROC_SMDV_C = C.PROC_SMDV_C ORDER BY A.NUM

WITH REC_BAS_YYMM AS( SELECT NUM,BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE ROWNUM < 4 ) ),RANK_PROC AS ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM,BAS_YYMM,PROC_FLD_C,PROC_LGDV_C,PROC_MDDV_C,PROC_SMDV_C,0 AS VALT_PNT FROM( SELECT BAS_YYMM,PROC_FLD_C,PROC_LGDV_C,PROC_MDDV_C,PROC_SMDV_C,VALT_PNT FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.PROC_FLD_C AS PROC_FLD_C, A.PROC_LGDV_C AS PROC_LGDV_C, A.PROC_MDDV_C AS PROC_MDDV_C, A.PROC_SMDV_C AS PROC_SMDV_C, AVG(A.TONGJE_VALT_RT) AS VALT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TONGJE_R A,SRBA_V_PROC_M B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) GROUP BY A.BAS_YYMM,A.PROC_FLD_C,A.PROC_LGDV_C,A.PROC_MDDV_C,A.PROC_SMDV_C )ORDER BY VALT_PNT DESC )WHERE ROWNUM < 11 ) SELECT A.NUM, A.PROC_LGDV_C, (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R304' AND DTL_C=A.PROC_LGDV_C) AS PROC_LGDV_NM, A.PROC_MDDV_C, (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R305' AND DTL_C=A.PROC_MDDV_C) AS PROC_MDDV_NM, A.PROC_SMDV_C, (SELECT PROC_SMDV_NM FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M WHERE USYN = 1 AND PROC_SMDV_C=A.PROC_SMDV_C AND BAS_YYMM=A.BAS_YYMM) AS PROC_SMDV_NM, C.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM3, ROUND(C.VALT_PNT,2) AS PNT3, GET_LEVE_CODE(C.BAS_YYMM,C.VALT_PNT) AS GD3, B.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM2, ROUND(B.VALT_PNT,2) AS PNT2, GET_LEVE_CODE(B.BAS_YYMM,B.VALT_PNT) AS GD2, A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM1, ROUND(A.VALT_PNT,2) AS PNT1, GET_LEVE_CODE(A.BAS_YYMM,A.VALT_PNT) AS GD1 FROM ( SELECT C.NUM AS NUM, A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.PROC_FLD_C AS PROC_FLD_C, A.PROC_LGDV_C AS PROC_LGDV_C, A.PROC_MDDV_C AS PROC_MDDV_C, A.PROC_SMDV_C AS PROC_SMDV_C, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(A.TONGJE_VALT_RT) ELSE AVG(C.VALT_PNT) END) AS VALT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TONGJE_R A,SRBA_V_PROC_M B, RANK_PROC C WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND B.PROC_FLD_C = C.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND B.PROC_LGDV_C = C.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND B.PROC_MDDV_C = C.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.PROC_SMDV_C = C.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE
