NUM=1) IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) ELSE C.BAS_YYMM END GROUP BY C.NUM,A.BAS_YYMM,A.PROC_FLD_C,A.PROC_LGDV_C,A.PROC_MDDV_C,A.PROC_SMDV_C ) A, ( SELECT C.NUM AS NUM, A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.PROC_FLD_C AS PROC_FLD_C, A.PROC_LGDV_C AS PROC_LGDV_C, A.PROC_MDDV_C AS PROC_MDDV_C, A.PROC_SMDV_C AS PROC_SMDV_C, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(A.TONGJE_VALT_RT) ELSE AVG(C.VALT_PNT) END) AS VALT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TONGJE_R A,SRBA_V_PROC_M B, RANK_PROC C WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND B.PROC_FLD_C = C.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND B.PROC_LGDV_C = C.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND B.PROC_MDDV_C = C.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.PROC_SMDV_C = C.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) ELSE C.BAS_YYMM END GROUP BY C.NUM,A.BAS_YYMM,A.PROC_FLD_C,A.PROC_LGDV_C,A.PROC_MDDV_C,A.PROC_SMDV_C ) B, ( SELECT C.NUM AS NUM, A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.PROC_FLD_C AS PROC_FLD_C, A.PROC_LGDV_C AS PROC_LGDV_C, A.PROC_MDDV_C AS PROC_MDDV_C, A.PROC_SMDV_C AS PROC_SMDV_C, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(A.TONGJE_VALT_RT) ELSE AVG(C.VALT_PNT) END) AS VALT_PNT FROM SRBA_V_PROC_TONGJE_R A,SRBA_V_PROC_M B, RANK_PROC C WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND B.PROC_FLD_C = C.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND B.PROC_LGDV_C = C.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND B.PROC_MDDV_C = C.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.PROC_SMDV_C = C.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) ELSE C.BAS_YYMM END GROUP BY C.NUM,A.BAS_YYMM,A.PROC_FLD_C,A.PROC_LGDV_C,A.PROC_MDDV_C,A.PROC_SMDV_C ) C WHERE A.NUM = B.NUM AND B.NUM = C.NUM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND B.PROC_FLD_C = C.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND B.PROC_LGDV_C = C.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND B.PROC_MDDV_C = C.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.PROC_SMDV_C = C.PROC_SMDV_C ORDER BY A.NUM

WITH REC_BAS_YYMM AS( SELECT NUM,BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM( SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE ROWNUM < 4 ) ),RANK_BRNO AS ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, 0 AS RSK_PNT, 0 AS TONGJE_PNT, 0 AS REMDR_PNT FROM( SELECT BAS_YYMM,VALT_BRNO,RSK_PNT,TONGJE_PNT,REMDR_PNT FROM ( SELECT B.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO, AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT) AS RSK_PNT, AVG(A.TONGJE_VALT_RT) AS TONGJE_PNT, AVG(A.REMDR_RSK_PNT) AS REMDR_PNT FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R A,SRBA_V_PROC_M B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND B.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) GROUP BY B.BAS_YYMM,A.VALT_BRNO )ORDER BY REMDR_PNT DESC )WHERE ROWNUM < 11 ) SELECT A.NUM AS NUM, A.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO, (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.VALT_BRNO) AS VALT_BRNO_NM, C.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM3, ROUND(C.RSK_PNT,2) AS RSK_PNT3, ROUND(C.TONGJE_PNT,2) AS TONGJE_PNT3, ROUND(C.REMDR_PNT,2) AS REMDR_PNT3, GET_LEVE_CODE(C.BAS_YYMM,C.REMDR_PNT) AS REMDR_GD3, B.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM2, ROUND(B.RSK_PNT,2) AS RSK_PNT2, ROUND(B.TONGJE_PNT,2) AS TONGJE_PNT2, ROUND(B.REMDR_PNT,2) AS REMDR_PNT2, GET_LEVE_CODE(B.BAS_YYMM,B.REMDR_PNT) AS REMDR_GD2, A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM1, ROUND(A.RSK_PNT,2) AS RSK_PNT1, ROUND(A.TONGJE_PNT,2) AS TONGJE_PNT1, ROUND(A.REMDR_PNT,2) AS REMDR_PNT1, GET_LEVE_CODE(A.BAS_YYMM,A.REMDR_PNT) AS REMDR_GD1, ROUND(A.REMDR_PNT - B.REMDR_PNT,2) AS CHG_PNT FROM( SELECT BB.NUM AS NUM, AA.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, BB.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(AA.RSK_PNT) ELSE AVG(BB.RSK_PNT) END) AS RSK_PNT, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(AA.TONGJE_PNT) ELSE AVG(BB.TONGJE_PNT) END) AS TONGJE_PNT, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(AA.REMDR_PNT) ELSE AVG(BB.REMDR_PNT) END) AS REMDR_PNT FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO, AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT) AS RSK_PNT, AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT) AS TONGJE_PNT, AVG(A.REMDR_RSK_PNT) AS REMDR_PNT FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R A, SRBA_V_PROC_M B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) ELSE (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) END GROUP BY A.BAS_YYMM,A.VALT_BRNO )AA,RANK_BRNO BB WHERE AA.VALT_BRNO = BB.VALT_BRNO GROUP BY BB.NUM,AA.BAS_YYMM,BB.VALT_BRNO ORDER BY NUM )A, ( SELECT BB.NUM AS NUM, AA.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, BB.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(AA.RSK_PNT) ELSE AVG(BB.RSK_PNT) END) AS RSK_PNT, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(AA.TONGJE_PNT) ELSE AVG(BB.TONGJE_PNT) END) AS TONGJE_PNT, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(AA.REMDR_PNT) ELSE AVG(BB.REMDR_PNT) END) AS REMDR_PNT FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO, AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT) AS RSK_PNT, AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT) AS TONGJE_PNT, AVG(A.REMDR_RSK_PNT) AS REMDR_PNT FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R A, SRBA_V_PROC_M B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) ELSE (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) END GROUP BY A.BAS_YYMM,A.VALT_BRNO )AA,RANK_BRNO BB WHERE AA.VALT_BRNO = BB.VALT_BRNO GROUP BY BB.NUM,AA.BAS_YYMM,BB.VALT_BRNO ORDER BY NUM )B, ( SELECT BB.NUM AS NUM, AA.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, BB.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(AA.RSK_PNT) ELSE AVG(BB.RSK_PNT) END) AS RSK_PNT, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(AA.TONGJE_PNT) ELSE AVG(BB.TONGJE_PNT) END) AS TONGJE_PNT, (CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) IS NOT NULL THEN AVG(AA.REMDR_PNT) ELSE AVG(BB.REMDR_PNT) END) AS REMDR_PNT FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM, A.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO, AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT) AS RSK_PNT, AVG(A.RSK_VALT_RT) AS TONGJE_PNT, AVG(A.REMDR_RSK_PNT) AS REMDR_PNT FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R A, SRBA_V_PROC_M B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C AND A.PROC_MDDV_C = B.PROC_MDDV_C AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND B.USYN=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = CASE WHEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) ELSE (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) END GROUP BY A.BAS_YYMM,A.VALT_BRNO )AA,RANK_BRNO BB WHERE AA.VALT_BRNO = BB.VALT_BRNO GROUP BY BB.NUM,AA.BAS_YYMM,BB.VALT_BRNO ORDER BY NUM )C WHERE A.NUM = B.NUM AND B.NUM = C.NUM AND A.VALT_BRNO = B.VALT_BRNO AND B.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO ORDER BY A.NUM

WITH REC_BAS_YYMM AS( SELECT NUM,BAS_YYMM FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM FROM( SELECT DISTINCT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_KRI_J_EXTR_M WHERE BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC )WHERE ROWNUM < 13 ) ) SELECT SEQ ,RSK_CATG , RSK_CATG_NM , RSK_FAC , RSK_FAC_NM , RSK_INDCT , RSK_INDCT_NM , KRI_NO , NVL(TAB1, '0') AS TAB1 , NVL(TAB2, '0') AS TAB2 , NVL(TAB3, '0') AS TAB3 , NVL(TAB4, '0') AS TAB4 , NVL(TAB5, '0') AS TAB5 , NVL(TAB6, '0') AS TAB6 , NVL(TAB7, '0') AS TAB7 , NVL(TAB8, '0') AS TAB8 , NVL(TAB9, '0') AS TAB9 , NVL(TAB10, '0') AS TAB10 , NVL(TAB11, '0') AS TAB11 , NVL(TAB12, '0') AS TAB12 FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY MAX(NUM1) DESC) AS SEQ ,RSK_CATG , RSK_CATG_NM , RSK_FAC , RSK_FAC_NM , RSK_INDCT , RSK_INDCT_NM , KRI_NO , MAX(NUM1) AS TAB1 , MAX(NUM2) AS TAB2 , MAX(NUM3) AS TAB3 , MAX(NUM4) AS TAB4 , MAX(NUM5) AS TAB5 , MAX(NUM6) AS TAB6 , MAX(NUM7) AS TAB7 , MAX(NUM8) AS TAB8 , MAX(NUM9) AS TAB9 , MAX(NUM10) AS TAB10 , MAX(NUM11) AS TAB11 , MAX(NUM12) AS TAB12 FROM (
SELECT C.RSK_CATG AS RSK_CATG , C.RSK_CATG_NM AS RSK_CATG_NM , C.RSK_FAC AS RSK_FAC , C.RSK_FAC_NM AS RSK_FAC_NM , C.RSK_INDCT AS RSK_INDCT , C.RSK_INDCT_NM AS RSK_INDCT_NM , C.KRI_NO AS KRI_NO , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=1) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM1 , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=2) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM2 , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=3) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM3 , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=4) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM4 , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=5) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM5 , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=6) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM6 , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=7) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM7 , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=8) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM8 , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=9) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM9 , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=10) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM10 , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=11) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM11 , CASE WHEN D.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM REC_BAS_YYMM WHERE NUM=12) THEN NVL(D.KRI_CNT,0) END AS NUM12 FROM ( SELECT A.RSK_CATG AS RSK_CATG , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R309' AND DTL_C= A.RSK_CATG ) AS RSK_CATG_NM , A.RSK_FAC AS RSK_FAC , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R310' AND DTL_C= A.RSK_FAC ) AS RSK_FAC_NM , A.RSK_INDCT AS RSK_INDCT , A.RSK_INDCT_NM AS RSK_INDCT_NM , B.KRI_NO AS KRI_NO FROM SRBA_V_RSK_JIPYO_M A , SRBA_KRI_JIPYO_M B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) FROM SRBA_V_RSK_JIPYO_M E WHERE BAS_YYMM NOT IN ('999912') ) AND A.RSK_INDCT = B.REF_RSK_INDCT ) C LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.KRI_NO AS KRI_NO , A.KRI_V AS KRI_CNT , A.BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_KRI_J_EXTR_M A ,REC_BAS_YYMM B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM ) D ON C.KRI_NO = D.KRI_NO WHERE 1=1 AND D.BAS_YYMM IS NOT NULL ) GROUP BY RSK_CATG, RSK_CATG_NM, RSK_FAC, RSK_FAC_NM, RSK_INDCT, RSK_INDCT_NM, KRI_NO ) WHERE SEQ < 6

SELECT A.PROC_FLD_C , A.PROC_LGDV_C , A.PROC_MDDV_C , A.PROC_SMDV_C , A.VALT_BRNO , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY PROC_LGDV_C) AS SEQ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R304' AND DTL_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C) AS PROC_LGDV_NM , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R305' AND DTL_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C ) AS PROC_MDDV_NM , (SELECT PROC_SMDV_NM FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M WHERE PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C AND BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM) AS PROC_SMDV_NM , A.IMPRV_BRNO ,NVL((SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.IMPRV_BRNO),A.IMPRV_BRNO) AS BRNO_NM , A.IMPRV_RSLT_CTNT , A.DR_DT FROM SRBA_IMPRV_M A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,R3_SUMMY ,R7_TASK ,R7_PLAN ,R7_DIREC FROM SRBA_RPT_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,R8_ETC_LIST FROM SRBA_RPT_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO SRBA_RPT_M USING DUAL ON (BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET R2_AIM = #{R2_AIM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYMM, R2_AIM ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{R2_AIM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO SRBA_RPT_M USING DUAL ON (BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET R8_ETC_LIST = #{R8_ETC_LIST, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYMM, R8_ETC_LIST ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{R8_ETC_LIST, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT '0' AS SELECTED , RPRM_DT /* 징계일자 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , RPRM_G_C /* 징계구분코드 */ , RPRM_ACTN_G_C /* 징계조치구분코드 */ , RPRM_RSN /* 징계사유 */ , RPRM_TGT /* 징계대상 */ , LEV /* 직급 */ , DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , DR_OP_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ , CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , CHG_OP_JKW_NO /* 변경조작자번호 */ , LOGIN_ID /* 사번 */ , DEP_ID /* 부서코드 */ , DEP_TITLE /* 부서명 */ FROM SRBA_OUT_RPRM_M WHERE RPRM_DT = #{rprmDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = #{sNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ , D.PRIZE_DT AS PRIZE_DT , D.SNO AS SNO , D.EMPL_VALT_G_C AS EMPL_VALT_G_C , D.DTL_NM AS DTL_NM , D.EMP_NM AS EMP_NM , D.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT , D.DR_DT AS DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , D.DR_TIME AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , D.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ , D.DR_OP_JKW_NM AS DR_OP_JKW_NM , D.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT , D.CHG_TIME AS CHG_TIME , D.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO , D.CHG_OP_JKW_NM AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM , D.LOGIN_ID , D.DEP_ID , D.DEP_TITLE , D.EMPL_JBTT_CODE , D.EMPL_JBTT_CODE_NM FROM ( SELECT A.PRIZE_DT AS PRIZE_DT , A.SNO AS SNO , A.EMPL_VALT_G_C AS EMPL_VALT_G_C , B.DTL_NM AS DTL_NM , A.EMP_NM AS EMP_NM , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT , A.DR_DT AS DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , A.DR_TIME AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM , A.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT , A.CHG_TIME AS CHG_TIME , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM , A.LOGIN_ID , A.DEP_ID , A.DEP_TITLE , A.EMPL_JBTT_CODE , A.EMPL_JBTT_CODE_NM FROM SRBA_PRZ_RPRM_M A , RBA030TB B , ( SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) AS RPT_GJDT FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD = 'C0046' ) C WHERE B.GRP_CD = 'C0046' AND B.RPT_GJDT = C.RPT_GJDT AND A.EMPL_VALT_G_C = B.DTL_CD AND A.PRIZE_DT BETWEEN #{stDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND #{edDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.PRIZE_DT DESC , A.SNO DESC ) D

SELECT A.PRIZE_DT AS PRIZE_DT , A.SNO AS SNO , A.EMPL_VALT_G_C AS EMPL_VALT_G_C , B.DTL_NM AS DTL_NM , A.EMP_NM AS EMP_NM , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT , A.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO , A.LOGIN_ID , A.DEP_ID , A.DEP_TITLE , A.EMPL_JBTT_CODE , A.EMPL_JBTT_CODE_NM FROM SRBA_PRZ_RPRM_M A , RBA030TB B , ( SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) AS RPT_GJDT FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD = 'C0046' AND USYN = 1 ) C WHERE A.PRIZE_DT = #{prizeDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SNO = #{sNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND A.EMPL_VALT_G_C = B.DTL_CD AND B.GRP_CD = 'C0046' AND B.USYN = 1 AND B.RPT_GJDT = C.RPT_GJDT
SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) AS RPT_GJDT FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD = #{GRP_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USYN = 1

SELECT A.DCS_DT AS DCS_DT , A.SNO AS SNO , A.DOC_TITE AS DOC_TITE , A.DCS_RQST_BRNO AS DCS_RQST_BRNO , A.RSLT_ATTCH_FILE_NO AS RSLT_ATTCH_FILE_NO , A.RPT_G_C AS RPT_G_C , ( SELECT B.DTL_NM FROM RBA030TB B , ( SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) AS RPT_GJDT FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD = 'C0003' AND USYN = 1 ) C WHERE B.USYN = 1 AND B.RPT_GJDT = C.RPT_GJDT AND B.GRP_CD = 'C0003' AND B.DTL_CD = A.RPT_G_C ) AS RPT_G_NM , A.RSLT_G_C AS RSLT_G_C , ( SELECT B.DTL_NM FROM RBA030TB B , ( SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) AS RPT_GJDT FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD = 'C0045' AND USYN = 1 ) C WHERE B.USYN = 1 AND B.RPT_GJDT = C.RPT_GJDT AND B.GRP_CD = 'C0045' AND B.DTL_CD = A.RSLT_G_C ) AS RSLT_G_NM , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT , A.ACTN_PLAN_YN AS ACTN_PLAN_YN , A.ACT_PRGR_S_C AS ACT_PRGR_S_C , A.ACTN_PLAN_TITE AS ACTN_PLAN_TITE , A.DP_SEND_DT AS DP_SEND_DT , A.ACTN_PLAN_CTNT AS ACTN_PLAN_CTNT , A.ACTN_ATTCH_FILE_NO AS ACTN_ATTCH_FILE_NO , A.ACTN_DT AS ACTN_DT , A.ACTN_PLAN_G_C AS ACTN_PLAN_G_C , A.BRNO AS BRNO -- 유안타증권 - 추가 , ( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO ) AS BRNM -- 유안타증권 - 추가 , A.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_AML_ACTRPT_M A WHERE A.DCS_DT = #{DCS_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SNO = #{SNO, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO , FILE_SER , DATA_G , FILE_POS , LOSC_FILE_NM , PHSC_FILE_NM , FILE_SIZE , DOWNLOAD_CNT , DR_OP_JKW_NO , GET_LOGINID_NAME(DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM , DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL

SELECT A.EDU_DT AS EDU_DT , A.SNO AS SNO , A.EDU_SUBJ_NM AS EDU_SUBJ_NM , A.EDU_TGT_G_C AS EDU_TGT_G_C , ( SELECT B.DTL_NM FROM RBA030TB B , ( SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) AS RPT_GJDT FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD = 'C0004' AND USYN = 1 ) C WHERE B.USYN = 1 AND B.RPT_GJDT = C.RPT_GJDT AND B.GRP_CD = 'C0004' AND B.DTL_CD = A.EDU_TGT_G_C ) AS EDU_TGT_G_NM , A.EDU_CHNL_G_C AS EDU_CHNL_G_C , ( SELECT B.DTL_NM FROM RBA030TB B , ( SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) AS RPT_GJDT FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD = 'C0006' AND USYN = 1 ) C WHERE B.USYN = 1 AND B.RPT_GJDT = C.RPT_GJDT AND B.GRP_CD = 'C0006' AND B.DTL_CD = A.EDU_CHNL_G_C ) AS EDU_CHNL_G_NM , A.EDU_SDT AS EDU_SDT , A.EDU_EDT AS EDU_EDT , A.ATTCH_FILE_NO AS ATTCH_FILE_NO , A.EDU_PGM_C AS EDU_PGM_C , A.EDU_MAIN_BRNO AS EDU_MAIN_BRNO , ( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.EDU_MAIN_BRNO ) AS EDU_MAIN_BRNM , A.EDU_HOUR AS EDU_HOUR , A.EDU_JKW_NM AS EDU_JKW_NM , A.EDU_TGT_PCNT AS EDU_TGT_PCNT , A.FNSH_PCNT AS FNSH_PCNT , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM , A.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_EDU_SCHD_M A WHERE A.EDU_DT = #{EDU_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SNO = #{SNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO , FILE_SER , DATA_G , FILE_POS , LOSC_FILE_NM , PHSC_FILE_NM , FILE_SIZE , DOWNLOAD_CNT , DR_OP_JKW_NO , GET_LOGINID_NAME(DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM , DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL

SELECT A.ISPT_DT AS ISPT_DT , A.SNO AS SNO /* 순번 */ , A.BRNO_G_C AS BRNO_G_C /* 영업점구분코드 */ , ( SELECT B.DTL_NM FROM RBA030TB B , ( SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) AS RPT_GJDT FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD = 'C0013' AND USYN = 1 ) C WHERE B.GRP_CD = 'C0013' AND B.RPT_GJDT =C.RPT_GJDT AND B.DTL_CD = A.BRNO_G_C ) AS BRNO_G_NM , A.BRNO AS BRNO , ( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO ) AS BRNM , ( SELECT B.DTL_NM FROM RBA030TB B , ( SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) AS RPT_GJDT FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD = 'C0048' AND USYN = 1 ) C WHERE B.GRP_CD = 'C0048' AND B.RPT_GJDT =C.RPT_GJDT AND B.DTL_CD = A.IMPRV_G_C) AS IMPRV_G_NM , A.IMPRV_G_C AS IMPRV_G_C /* 개선구분코드 */ , A.INDI_CNT AS INDI_CNT /* 지적건수 */ , ( SELECT B.DTL_NM FROM RBA030TB B , ( SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) AS RPT_GJDT FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD = 'C0014' AND USYN = 1 ) C WHERE B.GRP_CD = 'C0014' AND B.RPT_GJDT =C.RPT_GJDT AND B.DTL_CD = A.IMPRV_RSK_GD_C) AS IMPRV_RSK_GD_NM , A.IMPRV_RSK_GD_C AS IMPRV_RSK_GD_C /* 위험등급코드 */ , A.ACTN_DT AS ACTN_DT /* 조치일자 */ , A.MAIN_ISPT_CTNT AS MAIN_ISPT_CTNT /* 주요점검내용 */ , A.MAIN_INDI_ITM AS MAIN_INDI_ITM /* 주요지적사항 */ , A.ACTN_DTL AS ACTN_DTL /* 조치내역 */ , A.DR_DT AS DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , A.DR_TIME AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호 */ , A.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO /* 변경조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM FROM SRBA_BRNO_ISPT_M A WHERE A.ISPT_DT = #{isptDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SNO = #{sNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.ISPT_DT AS ISPT_DT , A.SNO AS SNO /* 순번 */ , A.BRNO AS BRNO , ( SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO ) AS BRNM , ( SELECT B.DTL_NM FROM RBA030TB B , ( SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) AS RPT_GJDT FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD = 'C0048' AND USYN = 1 ) C WHERE B.GRP_CD = 'C0048' AND B.RPT_GJDT =C.RPT_GJDT AND B.DTL_CD = A.IMPRV_G_C) AS IMPRV_G_NM , A.IMPRV_G_C AS IMPRV_G_C /* 개선구분코드 */ , A.INDI_CNT AS INDI_CNT /* 지적건수 */ , A.ACTN_DT AS ACTN_DT /* 조치일자 */ , A.MAIN_ISPT_CTNT AS MAIN_ISPT_CTNT /* 주요점검내용 */ , A.MAIN_INDI_ITM AS MAIN_INDI_ITM /* 주요지적사항 */ , A.ACTN_DTL AS ACTN_DTL /* 조치내역 */ , A.DR_DT AS DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , A.DR_TIME AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호 */ , A.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO /* 변경조작자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM FROM SRBA_IN_AUDT_M A WHERE A.ISPT_DT = #{isptDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SNO = #{sNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL

SELECT BAS_YYMM , ACT_BASIC , ACT_SCHD , EVL_TERM , EVL_BRNO , EVL_SYSTEM , SUBSTR(ALL_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(ALL_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS ALL_BAS_YYYY , ALL_RISK_VAL || '점' AS ALL_RISK_VAL , ALL_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS ALL_TONGJE_VAL , ALL_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS ALL_REMDR_VAL , CASE WHEN ALL_RISK_WAY = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' WHEN ALL_RISK_WAY = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' ELSE '유지' END AS ALL_RISK_WAY , CASE WHEN ALL_TONGJE_WAY = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' WHEN ALL_TONGJE_WAY = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' ELSE '유지' END AS ALL_TONGJE_WAY , CASE WHEN ALL_REMDR_WAY = '▲' THEN '상승(▲)' WHEN ALL_REMDR_WAY = '▼' THEN '하락(▼)' ELSE '유지' END AS ALL_REMDR_WAY , ALL_NOTE , SUBSTR(ALL_PRE_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(ALL_PRE_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS ALL_PRE_BAS_YYYY , ALL_PRE_RISK_VAL || '점' AS ALL_PRE_RISK_VAL , ALL_PRE_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS ALL_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , ALL_PRE_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS ALL_PRE_REMDR_VAL , SUBSTR(REMDR_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(REMDR_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS REMDR_BAS_YYYY , CASE WHEN REMDR_R1_VAL - REMDR_R1_PRE_VAL > 0 THEN REMDR_R1_VAL || '개 부점(' || (REMDR_R1_VAL - REMDR_R1_PRE_VAL) || '개 증가)' WHEN REMDR_R1_VAL - REMDR_R1_PRE_VAL = 0 THEN REMDR_R1_VAL || '개 부점(유지)' ELSE REMDR_R1_VAL || '개 부점(' || (REMDR_R1_PRE_VAL - REMDR_R1_VAL) || '개 감소)' END AS REMDR_R1_VAL , CASE WHEN REMDR_R2_VAL - REMDR_R2_PRE_VAL > 0 THEN REMDR_R2_VAL || '개 부점(' || (REMDR_R2_VAL - REMDR_R2_PRE_VAL) || '개 증가)' WHEN REMDR_R2_VAL - REMDR_R2_PRE_VAL = 0 THEN REMDR_R2_VAL || '개 부점(유지)' ELSE REMDR_R2_VAL || '개 부점(' || (REMDR_R2_PRE_VAL - REMDR_R2_VAL) || '개 감소)' END AS REMDR_R2_VAL , CASE WHEN REMDR_R3_VAL - REMDR_R3_PRE_VAL > 0 THEN REMDR_R3_VAL || '개 부점(' || (REMDR_R3_VAL - REMDR_R3_PRE_VAL) || '개 증가)' WHEN REMDR_R3_VAL - REMDR_R3_PRE_VAL = 0 THEN REMDR_R3_VAL || '개 부점(유지)' ELSE REMDR_R3_VAL || '개 부점(' || (REMDR_R3_PRE_VAL - REMDR_R3_VAL) || '개 감소)' END AS REMDR_R3_VAL , CASE WHEN REMDR_R4_VAL - REMDR_R4_PRE_VAL > 0 THEN REMDR_R4_VAL || '개 부점(' || (REMDR_R4_VAL - REMDR_R4_PRE_VAL) || '개 증가)' WHEN REMDR_R4_VAL - REMDR_R4_PRE_VAL = 0 THEN REMDR_R4_VAL || '개 부점(유지)' ELSE REMDR_R4_VAL || '개 부점(' || (REMDR_R4_PRE_VAL - REMDR_R4_VAL) || '개 감소)' END AS REMDR_R4_VAL , CASE WHEN REMDR_R5_VAL - REMDR_R5_PRE_VAL > 0 THEN REMDR_R5_VAL || '개 부점(' || (REMDR_R5_VAL - REMDR_R5_PRE_VAL) || '개 증가)' WHEN REMDR_R5_VAL - REMDR_R5_PRE_VAL = 0 THEN REMDR_R5_VAL || '개 부점(유지)' ELSE REMDR_R5_VAL || '개 부점(' || (REMDR_R5_PRE_VAL - REMDR_R5_VAL) || '개 감소)' END AS REMDR_R5_VAL , REMDR_R1_PRE_VAL || '개 부점' AS REMDR_R1_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R2_PRE_VAL || '개 부점' AS REMDR_R2_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R3_PRE_VAL || '개 부점' AS REMDR_R3_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R4_PRE_VAL || '개 부점' AS REMDR_R4_PRE_VAL , REMDR_R5_PRE_VAL || '개 부점' AS REMDR_R5_PRE_VAL , REMDR_NOTE , (SELECT B.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B B WHERE B.DPRT_CD = TOP1_BRNO) AS TOP1_BRNO , SUBSTR(TOP1_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(TOP1_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS TOP1_BAS_YYYY , TOP1_RISK_VAL || '점' AS TOP1_RISK_VAL , TOP1_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS TOP1_TONGJE_VAL , TOP1_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS TOP1_REMDR_VAL , TOP1_RISK_WAY , TOP1_TONGJE_WAY , TOP1_REMDR_WAY , SUBSTR(TOP1_PRE_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(TOP1_PRE_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS TOP1_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP1_PRE_RISK_VAL || '점' AS TOP1_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP1_PRE_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS TOP1_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP1_PRE_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS TOP1_PRE_REMDR_VAL , (SELECT B.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B B WHERE B.DPRT_CD = TOP2_BRNO) AS TOP2_BRNO , SUBSTR(TOP2_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(TOP2_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS TOP2_BAS_YYYY , TOP2_RISK_VAL || '점' AS TOP2_RISK_VAL , TOP2_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS TOP2_TONGJE_VAL , TOP2_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS TOP2_REMDR_VAL , TOP2_RISK_WAY , TOP2_TONGJE_WAY , TOP2_REMDR_WAY , SUBSTR(TOP2_PRE_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(TOP2_PRE_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS TOP2_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP2_PRE_RISK_VAL || '점' AS TOP2_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP2_PRE_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS TOP2_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP2_PRE_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS TOP2_PRE_REMDR_VAL , (SELECT B.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B B WHERE B.DPRT_CD = TOP3_BRNO) AS TOP3_BRNO , SUBSTR(TOP3_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(TOP3_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS TOP3_BAS_YYYY , TOP3_RISK_VAL || '점' AS TOP3_RISK_VAL , TOP3_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS TOP3_TONGJE_VAL , TOP3_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS TOP3_REMDR_VAL , TOP3_RISK_WAY , TOP3_TONGJE_WAY , TOP3_REMDR_WAY , SUBSTR(TOP3_PRE_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(TOP3_PRE_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS TOP3_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP3_PRE_RISK_VAL || '점' AS TOP3_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP3_PRE_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS TOP3_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP3_PRE_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS TOP3_PRE_REMDR_VAL , (SELECT B.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B B WHERE B.DPRT_CD = TOP4_BRNO) AS TOP4_BRNO , SUBSTR(TOP4_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(TOP4_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS TOP4_BAS_YYYY , TOP4_RISK_VAL || '점' AS TOP4_RISK_VAL , TOP4_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS TOP4_TONGJE_VAL , TOP4_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS TOP4_REMDR_VAL , TOP4_RISK_WAY , TOP4_TONGJE_WAY , TOP4_REMDR_WAY , SUBSTR(TOP4_PRE_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(TOP4_PRE_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS TOP4_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP4_PRE_RISK_VAL || '점' AS TOP4_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP4_PRE_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS TOP4_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP4_PRE_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS TOP4_PRE_REMDR_VAL , (SELECT B.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B B WHERE B.DPRT_CD = TOP5_BRNO) AS TOP5_BRNO , SUBSTR(TOP5_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(TOP5_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS TOP5_BAS_YYYY , TOP5_RISK_VAL || '점' AS TOP5_RISK_VAL , TOP5_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS TOP5_TONGJE_VAL , TOP5_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS TOP5_REMDR_VAL , TOP5_RISK_WAY , TOP5_TONGJE_WAY , TOP5_REMDR_WAY , SUBSTR(TOP5_PRE_BAS_YYYY,1,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(TOP5_PRE_BAS_YYYY,5,6) || '회차' AS TOP5_PRE_BAS_YYYY , TOP5_PRE_RISK_VAL || '점' AS TOP5_PRE_RISK_VAL , TOP5_PRE_TONGJE_VAL || '%' AS TOP5_PRE_TONGJE_VAL , TOP5_PRE_REMDR_VAL || '점' AS TOP5_PRE_REMDR_VAL , TOP_NOTE , WEAK_PT1_NM , WEAK_PT2_NM , WEAK_PT3_NM , WEAK_PT4_NM , WEAK_PT5_NM , WEAK_PT1_NOTE , WEAK_PT2_NOTE , WEAK_PT3_NOTE , WEAK_PT4_NOTE , WEAK_PT5_NOTE , UPGRADE_REQ_CNT || '건' AS UPGRADE_REQ_CNT , UPGRADE_ACT_CNT || '건' AS UPGRADE_ACT_CNT , UPGRADE_ACT_RATE || '%' AS UPGRADE_ACT_RATE , UPGRADE_NOTE , BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT || '건' AS BRNO_UPGRADE_REQ_CNT , BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT || '건' AS BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_CNT , BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_RATE || '%' AS BRNO_UPGRADE_ACT_RATE , BRNO_UPGRADE_NOTE , UPGRADE_WEAK1_NM , UPGRADE_WEAK2_NM , UPGRADE_WEAK3_NM , UPGRADE_WEAK4_NM , UPGRADE_WEAK1_NOTE , UPGRADE_WEAK2_NOTE , UPGRADE_WEAK3_NOTE , UPGRADE_WEAK4_NOTE , UPGRADE_WEAK1_BRNO , UPGRADE_WEAK2_BRNO , UPGRADE_WEAK3_BRNO , UPGRADE_WEAK4_BRNO , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_R A WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.LINE_C , A.DATA_TITE01 , A.DATA_TITE02 , A.DATA_TITE03 , A.DATA_TITE04 , A.DATA_TITE05 , TO_CHAR(NVL(A.DATA01,0), '9,999,999,999,999,999') AS DATA01 , TO_CHAR(NVL(A.DATA02,0), '9,999,999,999,999,999') AS DATA02 , NVL(A.DATA03,'') AS DATA03 , TO_CHAR(NVL(A.DATA04,0), '9,999,999,999,999,999') AS DATA04 , TO_CHAR(NVL(A.DATA05,0), '9,999,999,999,999,999') AS DATA05 , NVL(A.DATA06,'') AS DATA06 , NVL(A.DATA07,'') AS DATA07 , NVL(A.DATA08,'') AS DATA08 , NVL(A.DATA09,'') AS DATA09 , NVL(A.DATA10,'') AS DATA10 , NVL(A.DATA11,'') AS DATA11 , NVL(A.DATA12,'') AS DATA12 , NVL(A.DATA13,'') AS DATA13 , NVL(A.DATA14,'') AS DATA14 , NVL(A.DATA15,'') AS DATA15 , NVL(A.DATA16,'') AS DATA16 , NVL(A.DATA17,'') AS DATA17 , NVL(A.DATA18,'') AS DATA18 , NVL(A.DATA19,'') AS DATA19 , NVL(A.DATA20,'') AS DATA20 , NVL(A.DATA21,'') AS DATA21 , NVL(A.DATA22,'') AS DATA22 , NVL(A.DATA23,'') AS DATA23 , NVL(A.DATA24,'') AS DATA24 , NVL(A.DATA25,'') AS DATA25 , NVL(A.DATA26,'') AS DATA26 , NVL(A.DATA27,'') AS DATA27 , NVL(A.DATA28,'') AS DATA28 , NVL(A.DATA29,'') AS DATA29 , NVL(A.DATA30,'') AS DATA30 FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_D_M A WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{RPT_GJDT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BIZ_RPT_ID = #{BIZ_RPT_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SNO
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_D_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND BIZ_RPT_ID = #{BIZ_RPT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_M_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND BIZ_RPT_ID = #{BIZ_RPT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

INSERT INTO SRBA_BIZRPT_M_M ( BIZ_RPT_ID ,BAS_YYMM ,LST_ATTCH_FILE_NO ,FRQ_C ,DR_YN ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT BIZ_RPT_ID ,#{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{LST_ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,FRQ_C ,#{DR_YN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_M WHERE BIZ_RPT_ID = #{BIZ_RPT_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT ROWNUM AS NO ,A.BIZ_RPT_ID AS BIZ_RPT_ID ,A.BIZ_RPT_NM AS BIZ_RPT_NM ,A.FRQ_C AS FRQ_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R311' AND DTL_C = A.FRQ_C) AS FRQ_NM FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_M A ORDER BY A.BIZ_RPT_ID
mapper.update: MERGE INTO SRBA_FNN_ACD_M USING DUAL ON ( BAS_YYYYMM = #{BAS_YYYYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACD_OCC_G_C = #{ACD_OCC_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ACD_OCC_AMT = #{ACD_OCC_AMT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYYYMM , ACD_OCC_G_C , ACD_OCC_AMT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYYYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{ACD_OCC_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{ACD_OCC_AMT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') , #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT BAS_YYMM AS CODE, BAS_YYMM || '월' AS NAME FROM SRBA_KRI_J_EXTR_M ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <=12
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT BAS_YYMM AS CODE, BAS_YYMM || '월' AS NAME FROM SRBA_KRI_JR_EXTR_MP ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <=12

SELECT SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4) || '년 ' || SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,5,6) || '월' AS BAS_YYMM, GA023,GA054,GA058,GA067,GA070,GA071,GA072,GA140,GA142,GA145,GA160,GA179,GA180,GA186,GA187,GA237 FROM( WITH TEMP AS( SELECT B.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM , A.BIZ_RPT_ID AS BIZ_RPT_ID , DECODE((SELECT DR_YN FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_M_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.BIZ_RPT_ID = BIZ_RPT_ID),NULL,'N','Y') AS DR_YN FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_M A,(SELECT DISTINCT BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_M_M) B WHERE BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY B.BAS_YYMM DESC ) SELECT * FROM TEMP PIVOT( MAX(DR_YN) FOR BIZ_RPT_ID IN ( 'GA023' AS GA023, 'GA054' AS GA054, 'GA058' AS GA058, 'GA067' AS GA067, 'GA070' AS GA070, 'GA071' AS GA071, 'GA072' AS GA072, 'GA140' AS GA140, 'GA142' AS GA142, 'GA145' AS GA145, 'GA160' AS GA160, 'GA179' AS GA179, 'GA180' AS GA180, 'GA186' AS GA186, 'GA187' AS GA187, 'GA237' AS GA237 ) ) WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM<13 )

SELECT A.USER_ID , A.LOGIN_ID , A.USER_NM , C.DPRT_CD, C.DPRT_NM,A.EMAIL /*,LISTAGG(ROLE_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ROLE_NM ) AS ROLE_NM_LIST*/ , SUBSTR(XMLAgg(XMLELEMENT(x,',',ROLE_NM) order by ROLE_NM).Extract('//text()'),2) AS ROLE_NM_LIST FROM C_USER A, C_USER_GROUP_ROLE B , NIC41B C , C_ROLE D WHERE A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.DEP_ID = C.DPRT_ID AND B.ROLE_ID = D.ROLE_ID AND C.DPRT_CD = #{DPRT_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.ROLE_ID IN ('3','6') GROUP BY A.USER_ID , A.LOGIN_ID , A.USER_NM , C.DPRT_CD, C.DPRT_NM,A.EMAIL

SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, RPT_GJDT, HM_CD, TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT1,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A1, TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT2,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A2, TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT3,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A3 FROM RBA110TB WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD='02I6010101' AND ROWNUM=1

SELECT RPT_GJDT, HM_CD, (SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, (CASE WHEN A.HM_CD='02I6020104' THEN IMPT_CTNT1 ELSE TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT1,0), '99,999,999,999,999') END) AS A1 , (CASE WHEN A.HM_CD='02I6020104' THEN TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT1,0), '99,999,999,999,999') ELSE TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT2,0), '99,999,999,999,999') END) AS A2, (CASE WHEN A.HM_CD IN ('02I6020105','02I6020107') THEN STR_CTNT1 WHEN A.HM_CD = '02I6020104' THEN TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT2,0), '99,999,999,999,999') ELSE TO_CHAR(NVL(A.NUM_CTNT3,0), '99,999,999,999,999') END) AS A3, (CASE WHEN A.HM_CD='02I6020104' THEN TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT3,0), '99,999,999,999,999') ELSE TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT4,0), '99,999,999,999,999') END) AS A4, (CASE WHEN A.HM_CD='02I6020104' THEN TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT4,0), '99,999,999,999,999') ELSE TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT5,0), '99,999,999,999,999') END) AS A5, (CASE WHEN A.HM_CD='02I6020104' THEN TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT5,0), '99,999,999,999,999') ELSE TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT6,0), '99,999,999,999,999') END) AS A6, (CASE WHEN A.HM_CD='02I6020104' THEN TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT6,0), '99,999,999,999,999') ELSE TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT7,0), '99,999,999,999,999') END) AS A7 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD IN ('02I6020101','02I6020102','02I6020103','02I6020104','02I6020105','02I6020106','02I6020107') ORDER BY HM_CD

SELECT RPT_GJDT, HM_CD, (SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, IMPT_CTNT1 AS A1 , TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT1,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A2, TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT2,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A3, TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT3,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A4, TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT4,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A5, TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT5,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A6, TO_CHAR(NVL(NUM_CTNT6,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A7 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD = '02I6030101' ORDER BY HM_CD

SELECT RPT_GJDT,HM_CD,HM_NM, TO_CHAR(NVL(A1,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A1, TO_CHAR(NVL(A2,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A2, TO_CHAR(NVL(A3,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A3, TO_CHAR(NVL(A4,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A4, TO_CHAR(NVL(A5,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A5, TO_CHAR(NVL(A6,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A6, TO_CHAR(NVL(A7,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A7, TO_CHAR(NVL(A8,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A8, TO_CHAR(NVL(A9,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A9, TO_CHAR(NVL(A10,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A10, TO_CHAR(NVL(A11,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A11, TO_CHAR(NVL(A12,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A12, TO_CHAR(NVL(A13,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A13, TO_CHAR(NVL(A14,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A14, TO_CHAR(NVL(A15,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A15, TO_CHAR(NVL(A16,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A16 FROM( SELECT RPT_GJDT, HM_CD, (SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, NUM_CTNT1 AS A1, NUM_CTNT2 AS A2, NUM_CTNT3 AS A3, NUM_CTNT4 AS A4, NUM_CTNT5 AS A5, NUM_CTNT6 AS A6, NUM_CTNT7 AS A7, NUM_CTNT8 AS A8, NUM_CTNT9 AS A9, 0 AS A10, 0 AS A11, 0 AS A12, 0 AS A13, 0 AS A14, 0 AS A15, 0 AS A16 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD IN ('02I6040101','02I6040102','02I6040201','02I6040501','02I6040601','02I6041001')
UNION ALL
SELECT A.RPT_GJDT AS RPT_GJDT, A.HM_CD AS HM_CD, A.HM_NM AS HM_NM, A.A1 AS A1, B.A1 AS A2 , A.A2 AS A3 , B.A2 AS A4 , A.A3 AS A5 , B.A3 AS A6 , A.A4 AS A7 , B.A4 AS A8, A.A5 AS A9, B.A5 AS A10, A.A6 AS A11, B.A6 AS A12, A.A7 AS A13, B.A7 AS A14, A.A8 AS A15, B.A8 AS A16 FROM( SELECT RPT_GJDT,HM_CD,(SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, NUM_CTNT1 AS A1,NUM_CTNT2 AS A2,NUM_CTNT3 AS A3,NUM_CTNT4 AS A4, NUM_CTNT5 AS A5,NUM_CTNT6 AS A6,NUM_CTNT7 AS A7,(SELECT NUM_CTNT1 FROM RBA110TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD='02I6040302' AND IMPT_CTNT1=2) AS A8 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD = '02I6040301' AND IMPT_CTNT1 =2 )A,( SELECT RPT_GJDT,HM_CD,(SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, NUM_CTNT1 AS A1,NUM_CTNT2 AS A2,NUM_CTNT3 AS A3,NUM_CTNT4 AS A4, NUM_CTNT5 AS A5,NUM_CTNT6 AS A6,NUM_CTNT7 AS A7,(SELECT NUM_CTNT1 FROM RBA110TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD='02I6040302' AND IMPT_CTNT1=1) AS A8 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD = '02I6040301' AND IMPT_CTNT1 =1 )B
UNION ALL
SELECT A.RPT_GJDT AS RPT_GJDT, A.HM_CD AS HM_CD, A.HM_NM AS HM_NM, A.A1 AS A1, B.A1 AS A2 , A.A2 AS A3 , B.A2 AS A4 , A.A3 AS A5 , B.A3 AS A6 , A.A4 AS A7 , B.A4 AS A8, A.A5 AS A9, B.A5 AS A10, A.A6 AS A11, B.A6 AS A12, A.A7 AS A13, B.A7 AS A14, A.A8 AS A15, B.A8 AS A16 FROM( SELECT RPT_GJDT,HM_CD,(SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, NUM_CTNT2 AS A1,NUM_CTNT3 AS A2,NUM_CTNT4 AS A3,NUM_CTNT5 AS A4, NUM_CTNT6 AS A5,NUM_CTNT7 AS A6,NUM_CTNT8 AS A7,NUM_CTNT9 AS A8 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD = '02I6040302' AND IMPT_CTNT1 =2 )A,( SELECT RPT_GJDT,HM_CD,(SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, NUM_CTNT2 AS A1,NUM_CTNT3 AS A2,NUM_CTNT4 AS A3,NUM_CTNT5 AS A4, NUM_CTNT6 AS A5,NUM_CTNT7 AS A6,NUM_CTNT8 AS A7,NUM_CTNT9 AS A8 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD = '02I6040302' AND IMPT_CTNT1 =1 )B
UNION ALL
SELECT A.RPT_GJDT AS RPT_GJDT, A.HM_CD AS HM_CD, A.HM_NM AS HM_NM, A.A1 AS A1, B.A1 AS A2 , A.A2 AS A3 , B.A2 AS A4 , A.A3 AS A5 , B.A3 AS A6 , A.A4 AS A7 , B.A4 AS A8, A.A5 AS A9, B.A5 AS A10, 0 AS A11,0 AS A12,0 AS A13,0 AS A14,0 AS A15,0 AS A16 FROM( SELECT RPT_GJDT,HM_CD,(SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, NUM_CTNT1 AS A1,NUM_CTNT2 AS A2,NUM_CTNT3 AS A3,NUM_CTNT4 AS A4,NUM_CTNT5 AS A5 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD = '02I6040801' )A,( SELECT RPT_GJDT,HM_CD,(SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, NUM_CTNT1 AS A1,NUM_CTNT2 AS A2,NUM_CTNT3 AS A3,NUM_CTNT4 AS A4,NUM_CTNT5 AS A5 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD = '02I6040802' )B )

SELECT RPT_GJDT,HM_CD,HM_NM, TO_CHAR(NVL(A1,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A1, TO_CHAR(NVL(A2,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A2, TO_CHAR(NVL(A3,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A3, TO_CHAR(NVL(A4,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A4, TO_CHAR(NVL(A5,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A5, TO_CHAR(NVL(A6,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A6, TO_CHAR(NVL(A7,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A7, TO_CHAR(NVL(A8,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A8, TO_CHAR(NVL(A9,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A9, TO_CHAR(NVL(A10,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A10, TO_CHAR(NVL(A11,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A11, TO_CHAR(NVL(A12,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A12, TO_CHAR(NVL(A13,0), '99,999,999,999,999') AS A13 FROM( SELECT RPT_GJDT, HM_CD, (SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, NUM_CTNT1 AS A1, NUM_CTNT2 AS A2, NUM_CTNT3 AS A3, NUM_CTNT4 AS A4, NUM_CTNT5 AS A5, NUM_CTNT6 AS A6, NUM_CTNT7 AS A7, NUM_CTNT8 AS A8, NUM_CTNT9 AS A9, 0 AS A10, 0 AS A11, 0 AS A12, 0 AS A13 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD IN ('02I6050201','02I6050301','02I6050401')
UNION ALL
SELECT A.RPT_GJDT AS RPT_GJDT, A.HM_CD AS HM_CD, A.HM_NM AS HM_NM, A.A1 AS A1,A.A2 AS A2,A.A3 AS A3,A.A4 AS A4,A.A5 AS A5,A.A6 AS A6,A.A7 AS A7, B.A1 AS A8,B.A2 AS A9,B.A3 AS A10,B.A4 AS A11,B.A5 AS A12,B.A6 AS A13 FROM( SELECT RPT_GJDT, HM_CD, (SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, NUM_CTNT1 AS A1, NUM_CTNT2 AS A2, NUM_CTNT3 AS A3, NUM_CTNT4 AS A4, NUM_CTNT5 AS A5, NUM_CTNT6 AS A6, NUM_CTNT7 AS A7 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD ='02I6050101' )A,( SELECT RPT_GJDT, HM_CD, (SELECT HM_NM FROM RBA100TB WHERE RPT_GJDT=A.RPT_GJDT AND HM_CD = A.HM_CD) AS HM_NM, NUM_CTNT1 AS A1, NUM_CTNT2 AS A2, NUM_CTNT3 AS A3, NUM_CTNT4 AS A4, NUM_CTNT5 AS A5, NUM_CTNT6 AS A6 FROM RBA110TB A WHERE 1=1 AND RPT_GJDT = #{RPT_GJDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HM_CD ='02I6050102' )B )

SELECT BAS_YYMM, RBA_VALT_LGDV_C, RBA_VALT_SMDV_C, EXP_TRM, /*예상소요기간*/ VALT_SDT, /*평가시작일자*/ VALT_EDT, /*평가종료일자*/ REAL_EDT, /*실제종료일자*/ TGT_TRN_SDT, /*대상거래시작일자*/ TGT_TRN_EDT, /*대상거래종료일자*/ VALT_METH_CTNT, /*평가방법내용*/ EXEC_B_BRNO_YN, /*수행_현업부서여부*/ EXEC_S_BRNO_YN /*수행_주관부서여부*/ FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_LGDV_C = #{RBA_VALT_LGDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = #{RBA_VALT_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM ,DTL_CD AS NTN_CD FROM RBA030TB WHERE GRP_CD IN ('A0011','A0012') -- A0011:조세회피처, A0012:FATF관리국 AND RPT_GJDT = (SELECT MAX(RPT_GJDT) FROM RBA010TB)

SELECT A.BAS_YYMM ,A.PROC_FLD_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R303' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_FLD_C ) AS PROC_FLD_NM ,A.PROC_LGDV_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R304' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_LGDV_C ) AS PROC_LGDV_NM ,A.PROC_MDDV_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R305' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_MDDV_C ) AS PROC_MDDV_NM ,A.PROC_SMDV_C ,A.PROC_SMDV_NM ,VALT_BRNO , '' AS TONGJE_NO ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD=B.VALT_BRNO) VALT_BRNO_NM FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M A, SRBA_V_PROC_BRNO B, SRBA_VALT_BRNO C WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PROC_SMDV_C=#{PROC_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.TGT_YN='1' AND B.BAS_YYMM = C.BAS_YYMM AND B.VALT_BRNO = C.BRNO

SELECT A.BAS_YYMM ,A.PROC_FLD_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R303' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_FLD_C ) AS PROC_FLD_NM ,A.PROC_LGDV_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R312' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_LGDV_C ) AS PROC_LGDV_NM ,A.PROC_MDDV_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R313' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_MDDV_C ) AS PROC_MDDV_NM ,A.PROC_SMDV_C ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R314' AND DTL_C= A.PROC_SMDV_C ) AS PROC_SMDV_NM ,VALT_BRNO , A.TONGJE_NO ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD=B.VALT_BRNO) VALT_BRNO_NM FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_M A, SRBA_V_TJ_BRNO B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PROC_SMDV_C= #{PROC_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.BAS_YYMM, A.PROC_FLD_C, A.PROC_LGDV_C, A.PROC_MDDV_C, A.PROC_SMDV_C, B.VALT_BRNO, A.PROC_SMDV_C, A.TONGJE_NO
SELECT ING_STEP FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND FIX_YN = '1'

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over (order by T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SRBA_V_TONGJE_M T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.TONGJE_NO = #{TONGJE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER

WITH TMP_DATE AS ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, ROWNUM AS NUM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY 1 DESC ) SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, X.* FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM ,(SELECT TGT_TRN_SDT || '~' || TGT_TRN_EDT FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 1) AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C ='E01' ) AS DUE ,(SELECT COUNT(BRNO) AS BRNO /*, COUNT(AML_BRNO) AS AML_BRNO, COUNT(AML_TJ_BRNO) AS AML_TJ_BRNO , COUNT(JIJUM_BRNO) AS JIJUM_BRNO, COUNT(BONJUM_BRNO) AS BONJUM_BRNO */ FROM (SELECT BRNO, DECODE(AML_TJ_BRNO_YN,0,'1','') AS AML_BRNO, DECODE(AML_TJ_BRNO_YN,1,'1','') AS AML_TJ_BRNO ,DECODE(B.MOFC_BRN_CCD,'B','1','') AS JIJUM_BRNO , DECODE(B.MOFC_BRN_CCD,'M','1','') AS BONJUM_BRNO FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A , NIC41B B WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 1) AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD ) ) AS BRNO ,RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C H WHERE H.GRP_C = 'R316' AND H.DTL_C = REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM ,NVL(BEFORE_REMDR_RSK_PNT,0) AS BEFORE_REMDR_RSK_PNT , NVL(REMDR_RSK_PNT - BEFORE_REMDR_RSK_PNT,0) AS DIFFER FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, ROUND(AVG(RSK_VALT_PNT),2) AS RSK_VALT_PNT ,ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT),2) AS TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,ROUND((AVG(RSK_VALT_PNT)*AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT)/100),2) AS REMDR_RSK_PNT ,NVL(GET_LEVE_CODE((SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 1),ROUND((AVG(RSK_VALT_PNT)*AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT)/100),2) ),'G') AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C ,(SELECT ROUND((AVG(RSK_VALT_PNT)*AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT)/100),2) AS REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 2) GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ) AS BEFORE_REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 1) GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ) UNION ALL SELECT BAS_YYMM ,(SELECT TGT_TRN_SDT || '~' || TGT_TRN_EDT FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 2) AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C ='E01' ) AS DUE ,(SELECT COUNT(BRNO) AS BRNO /*, COUNT(AML_BRNO) AS AML_BRNO, COUNT(AML_TJ_BRNO) AS AML_TJ_BRNO , COUNT(JIJUM_BRNO) AS JIJUM_BRNO, COUNT(BONJUM_BRNO) AS BONJUM_BRNO */ FROM (SELECT BRNO, DECODE(AML_TJ_BRNO_YN,0,'1','') AS AML_BRNO, DECODE(AML_TJ_BRNO_YN,1,'1','') AS AML_TJ_BRNO ,DECODE(B.MOFC_BRN_CCD,'B','1','') AS JIJUM_BRNO , DECODE(B.MOFC_BRN_CCD,'M','1','') AS BONJUM_BRNO FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A , NIC41B B WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 1) AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD ) ) AS BRNO ,RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C H WHERE H.GRP_C = 'R316' AND H.DTL_C = REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM ,NVL(BEFORE_REMDR_RSK_PNT,0) AS BEFORE_REMDR_RSK_PNT , NVL(REMDR_RSK_PNT - BEFORE_REMDR_RSK_PNT,0) AS DIFFER FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, ROUND(AVG(RSK_VALT_PNT),2) AS RSK_VALT_PNT ,ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT),2) AS TONGJE_VALT_PNT ,ROUND((AVG(RSK_VALT_PNT)*AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT)/100),2) AS REMDR_RSK_PNT ,NVL(GET_LEVE_CODE((SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 2),ROUND((AVG(RSK_VALT_PNT)*AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT)/100),2) ),'G') AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C ,(SELECT ROUND((AVG(RSK_VALT_PNT)*AVG(TONGJE_VALT_PNT)/100),2) AS REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 3) GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ) AS BEFORE_REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 2) GROUP BY BAS_YYMM ) ) X

WITH TMP_DATE AS ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, ROWNUM AS NUM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY 1 DESC ) SELECT X.NUM, X.BAS_YYMM, X.VALT_BRNO, X.DPRT_NM, X.RSK_VALT_PNT, X.TONGJE_VALT_PNT , X.REMDR_RSK_PNT, X.REMDR_RSK_GD_C, X.REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM1 , Y.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM2, Y.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO2, Y.DPRT_NM AS DPRT_NM2 , Y.RSK_VALT_PNT AS RSK_VALT_PNT2, Y.TONGJE_VALT_PNT AS TONGJE_VALT_PNT2 , Y.REMDR_RSK_PNT AS REMDR_RSK_PNT2, Y.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C2, Y.REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM2 FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT , REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C, REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM1 FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, B.DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C , RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(REMDR_RSK_PNT) DESC) AS RANK , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C H WHERE H.GRP_C = 'R316' AND H.DTL_C = REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM1 FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R A, NIC41B B WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 1) GROUP BY BAS_YYMM,VALT_BRNO, B.DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) WHERE ROWNUM < 6 ) X, ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT , REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C, REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM2 FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, B.DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C , RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(REMDR_RSK_PNT) DESC) AS RANK , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C H WHERE H.GRP_C = 'R316' AND H.DTL_C = REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM2 FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R A, NIC41B B WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 2) GROUP BY BAS_YYMM,VALT_BRNO, B.DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) WHERE ROWNUM < 6 ) Y WHERE X.NUM = Y.NUM(+)

WITH TMP_DATE AS ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, ROWNUM AS NUM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY 1 DESC ) SELECT X.BAS_YYMM, X.VALT_BRNO, X.DPRT_NM, X.RSK_VALT_PNT, X.TONGJE_VALT_PNT , X.REMDR_RSK_PNT, X.REMDR_RSK_GD_C, X.REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM1 FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT , REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C, REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM1 FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, B.DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C , RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(REMDR_RSK_PNT) DESC) AS RANK , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C H WHERE H.GRP_C = 'R316' AND H.DTL_C = REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM1 FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R A, NIC41B B WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 1) GROUP BY BAS_YYMM,VALT_BRNO, B.DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) WHERE ROWNUM < 6 ) X

WITH TMP_DATE AS ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, ROWNUM AS NUM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY 1 DESC ) SELECT Y.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM2, Y.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO2, Y.DPRT_NM AS DPRT_NM2 , Y.RSK_VALT_PNT AS RSK_VALT_PNT2, Y.TONGJE_VALT_PNT AS TONGJE_VALT_PNT2 , Y.REMDR_RSK_PNT AS REMDR_RSK_PNT2, Y.REMDR_RSK_GD_C AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C2, Y.REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM2 FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM, BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT , REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C, REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM2 FROM ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, VALT_BRNO, B.DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C , RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(REMDR_RSK_PNT) DESC) AS RANK , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C H WHERE H.GRP_C = 'R316' AND H.DTL_C = REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_C_NM2 FROM SRBA_V_LST_REMDR_R A, NIC41B B WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM = 2) GROUP BY BAS_YYMM,VALT_BRNO, B.DPRT_NM, RSK_VALT_PNT, TONGJE_VALT_PNT, REMDR_RSK_PNT, REMDR_RSK_GD_C ) WHERE ROWNUM < 6 ) Y

WITH TMP_DATE AS ( SELECT BAS_YYMM, ROWNUM AS NUM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912' AND BAS_YYMM <= #{BAS_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY 1 DESC ) SELECT C.RSK_INDCT, C.RSK_INDCT_NM, NVL(CNT,0) AS CNT, NVL(CNT2,0) AS CNT2, (NVL(CNT,0)-NVL(CNT2,0)) AS DIFFER FROM ( SELECT RSK_INDCT, (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = RSK_INDCT) AS RSK_INDCT_NM, SUM(VALT_CNT)/DUE AS CNT FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A, ( SELECT SUBSTR(TGT_TRN_SDT,1,6) AS TGT_TRN_SDT, SUBSTR(TGT_TRN_EDT,1,6) AS TGT_TRN_EDT , TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(TGT_TRN_EDT,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(TGT_TRN_SDT,'YYYYMMDD'))) AS DUE FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE RBA_VALT_SMDV_C ='E01' AND BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM =1) ) B WHERE VALT_YYMM >= B.TGT_TRN_SDT AND VALT_YYMM <= B.TGT_TRN_EDT AND VALT_CNT > -1 GROUP BY RSK_INDCT, DUE ORDER BY 1 ) A , ( SELECT RSK_INDCT, (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = RSK_INDCT) AS RSK_INDCT_NM, SUM(VALT_CNT)/DUE AS CNT2 FROM SRBA_V_MM_RSK_CNT_R A, ( SELECT SUBSTR(TGT_TRN_SDT,1,6) AS TGT_TRN_SDT, SUBSTR(TGT_TRN_EDT,1,6) AS TGT_TRN_EDT , TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(TGT_TRN_EDT,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(TGT_TRN_SDT,'YYYYMMDD'))) AS DUE FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE RBA_VALT_SMDV_C ='E01' AND BAS_YYMM = (SELECT BAS_YYMM FROM TMP_DATE WHERE NUM =2) ) B WHERE VALT_YYMM >= B.TGT_TRN_SDT AND VALT_YYMM <= B.TGT_TRN_EDT AND VALT_CNT > -1 GROUP BY RSK_INDCT, DUE ORDER BY 1 ) B , ( SELECT DTL_C AS RSK_INDCT, DTL_C_NM AS RSK_INDCT_NM, '' FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' ORDER BY 1 ) C WHERE C.RSK_INDCT = A.RSK_INDCT (+) AND C.RSK_INDCT = B.RSK_INDCT (+)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over (order by T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SRBA_V_TONGJE_R T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.PROC_SMDV_C = #{PROC_SMDV_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.TONGJE_NO = #{TONGJE_NO ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER

SELECT A.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , A.GYLJ_SER AS GYLJ_SER /* 결재일련번호 */ , (SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = A.ROLE_ID) AS ROLE_NM /* 결재단계 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R325' AND DTL_C = A.GYLJ_S_C) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 결재상태 */ , A.GYLJ_DT AS GYLJ_DT /* 결재일자 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_JKW_NM /* 처리자 */ , (SELECT E.DPRT_NM FROM C_USER D , C_DEP_INFO F , NIC41B E WHERE D.DEP_ID = F.DEP_ID AND F.DEP_DESC = E.DPRT_CD AND D.LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_DEP_NM /* 처리지점 */ , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT /* 사유 */ , A.DR_DT||A.DR_TIME AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 처리일시 */ FROM SRBA_GYLJ_H A /* RBA 결재이력 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY A.GYLJ_SER

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO) BRNO_NM , A.HGRK_BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HGRK_BRNO) HGRK_BRNO_NM , A.AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO , B.MOFC_BRN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('M043',B.MOFC_BRN_CCD) AS MOFC_BRN_NAME , (SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT from SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND BRNO = A.BRNO AND TGT_YN = '1') AS COUNT , (SELECT ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPY_NO = TO_CHAR(JI.USER_ID) ) R_ENTY_ID, JI.USER_NM RNM, JI.EMAIL AS RXEMAIL, JI.EMAIL AS REMAIL, (SELECT ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPY_NO = TO_CHAR(BON.USER_ID) ) B_ENTY_ID, BON.USER_NM BNM, BON.EMAIL AS BXEMAIL, BON.EMAIL AS BEMAIL FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A , NIC41B B , ( SELECT D.DEP_ID, U.USER_ID, DEP_DESC, DEP_TP_CD, DEP_TITLE, LISTAGG(U.USER_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY U.USER_NM) USER_NM, ROLE_ID, MAX(U.EMAIL) EMAIL FROM C_DEP_INFO D, C_USER U, C_USER_GROUP_ROLE R WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.DEP_ID = U.DEP_ID AND U.USER_ID = R.USER_ID AND R.ROLE_ID = '105' GROUP BY D.DEP_ID, DEP_DESC, DEP_TP_CD, DEP_TITLE, ROLE_ID, U.USER_ID ) JI, (SELECT D.DEP_ID, U.USER_ID, DEP_DESC, DEP_TP_CD, DEP_TITLE, LISTAGG(U.USER_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY U.USER_NM) USER_NM, ROLE_ID, MAX(U.EMAIL) EMAIL FROM C_DEP_INFO D, C_USER U, C_USER_GROUP_ROLE R WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.DEP_ID = U.DEP_ID AND U.USER_ID = R.USER_ID AND R.ROLE_ID = '6' GROUP BY D.DEP_ID, DEP_DESC, DEP_TP_CD, DEP_TITLE, ROLE_ID, U.USER_ID ) BON ,( SELECT DISTINCT BRNO, BRNO_NM FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO) BRNO_NM , CASE WHEN G.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL AND A.CNT_PNT = 0 THEN '0' WHEN G.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL AND A.CNT_PNT > 0 THEN '5' ELSE G.GYLJ_S_C END AS GYLJ_S_C , CASE WHEN A.BRNO = '20500' AND G.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL AND A.CNT_PNT >= 0 THEN '본점담당자' WHEN A.BRNO = '20500' AND G.GYLJ_S_C IN ( '0','5','22' ) THEN '본점담당자' WHEN G.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL AND A.CNT_PNT >= 0 THEN 'RBA 담당자' WHEN G.GYLJ_S_C IN ( '0','5','22' ) THEN 'RBA 담당자' WHEN G.GYLJ_S_C IN ( '12' ) THEN '본점책임자' WHEN G.GYLJ_S_C IN ( '13' ) THEN 'RBA/AML 책임자' WHEN G.GYLJ_S_C = '23' THEN '본점담당자' WHEN G.GYLJ_S_C = '32' THEN '본점책임자' WHEN G.GYLJ_S_C = '3' THEN ' ' ELSE '업무' END AS ROLEID FROM SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M A , SRBA_APPR_M G WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM} AND A.BAS_YYMM = G.BAS_YYMM(+) AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = G.LV3(+) AND A.BRNO = G.BRNO(+) AND 'SRBA_V_CNTL_ELMN_M' = G.TABLE_NM(+) AND ( A.BRNO, A.CNTL_ELMN_C ) IN ( SELECT BRNO, CNTL_ELMN_C FROM SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_ITEM WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM} GROUP BY CNTL_ELMN_C , BRNO ) ) WHERE GYLJ_S_C != '3' ) BR WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM} AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND A.BRNO = BR.BRNO AND A.BRNO != '20500' AND A.BRNO = JI.DEP_DESC(+) AND A.BRNO = BON.DEP_DESC(+) ) WHERE RXEMAIL IS NOT NULL ORDER BY BRNO , BXEMAIL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO) BRNO_NM , A.HGRK_BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HGRK_BRNO) HGRK_BRNO_NM , A.AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO , B.MOFC_BRN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('M043',B.MOFC_BRN_CCD) AS MOFC_BRN_NAME , (SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT from SRBA_CNTL_BRNO_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND BRNO = A.BRNO AND TGT_YN = '1') AS COUNT , (SELECT ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPY_NO = TO_CHAR(JI.USER_ID) ) R_ENTY_ID, JI.USER_NM RNM, JI.EMAIL AS RXEMAIL, JI.EMAIL AS REMAIL, (SELECT ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPY_NO = TO_CHAR(BON.USER_ID) ) B_ENTY_ID, BON.USER_NM BNM, BON.EMAIL AS BXEMAIL, BON.EMAIL AS BEMAIL FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A , NIC41B B , ( SELECT D.DEP_ID, U.USER_ID, DEP_DESC, DEP_TP_CD, DEP_TITLE, LISTAGG(U.USER_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY U.USER_NM) USER_NM, ROLE_ID, MAX(U.EMAIL) EMAIL FROM C_DEP_INFO D, C_USER U, C_USER_GROUP_ROLE R WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.DEP_ID = U.DEP_ID AND U.USER_ID = R.USER_ID AND R.ROLE_ID = '105' GROUP BY D.DEP_ID, DEP_DESC, DEP_TP_CD, DEP_TITLE, ROLE_ID, U.USER_ID ) JI, (SELECT D.DEP_ID, U.USER_ID, DEP_DESC, DEP_TP_CD, DEP_TITLE, LISTAGG(U.USER_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY U.USER_NM) USER_NM, ROLE_ID, MAX(U.EMAIL) EMAIL FROM C_DEP_INFO D, C_USER U, C_USER_GROUP_ROLE R WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.DEP_ID = U.DEP_ID AND U.USER_ID = R.USER_ID AND R.ROLE_ID = '6' GROUP BY D.DEP_ID, DEP_DESC, DEP_TP_CD, DEP_TITLE, ROLE_ID, U.USER_ID ) BON WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM} AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND A.BRNO != '20500' AND A.BRNO = JI.DEP_DESC(+) AND A.BRNO = BON.DEP_DESC(+) ) WHERE RXEMAIL IS NOT NULL ORDER BY BRNO , BXEMAIL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.BRNO) BRNO_NM , A.HGRK_BRNO , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HGRK_BRNO) HGRK_BRNO_NM , A.AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO , B.MOFC_BRN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('M043',B.MOFC_BRN_CCD) AS MOFC_BRN_NAME , (SELECT ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPY_NO = TO_CHAR(JI.USER_ID) ) ENTY_ID, JI.USER_NM EMPY_NAME, JI.EMAIL AS CXEMAIL, JI.EMAIL AS REMAIL FROM SRBA_VALT_BRNO A , NIC41B B , ( SELECT D.DEP_ID, U.USER_ID, DEP_DESC, DEP_TP_CD, DEP_TITLE, LISTAGG(U.USER_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY U.USER_NM) USER_NM, ROLE_ID, MAX(U.EMAIL) EMAIL FROM C_DEP_INFO D, C_USER U, C_USER_GROUP_ROLE R WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.DEP_ID = U.DEP_ID AND U.USER_ID = R.USER_ID AND R.ROLE_ID IN ( '4' , '5' ) GROUP BY D.DEP_ID, DEP_DESC, DEP_TP_CD, DEP_TITLE, ROLE_ID, U.USER_ID ) JI WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM} AND A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD AND A.BRNO = '20500' AND A.BRNO = JI.DEP_DESC(+) ) WHERE ENTY_ID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY BRNO , CXEMAIL

SELECT SNO , DATA02 AS BRNO_NM --부서명 , DATA03 AS CUST_NM --고객명 , DATA04 AS CUST_EN_NM --고객영문명 , DATA05 AS DATA05 -- 실명확인번호 , DATA06 AS CDD_RGDT --CDD등록일자 , DATA07 AS RG_NOTE --등록사유 , DATA08 AS PRXY_NM --대리인고객명 , DATA09 AS PRXY_EN_NM --대리인영문명 , DATA10 AS DATA10 -- 대리인실명번호 , DATA11 AS PRXY_CDD_RGDT --대리인CDD등록일자 , DATA12 AS RNMCNO , VALT_BRNO FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY BAS_YYYY, TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, VALT_BRNO , DATA12
